title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 1

chapter.arabicTitle: وَضُوءُ النَّائِمِ إِذَا قَامَ إِلَى الصَّلَاةِ
chapter.englishTitle: The ablution of the sleeping person when he gets up for prayer.

englishRaw: When anyone amongst you wakes up from sleep, he must not put his hand in the utensil till he has washed it three times, for he does not know where his hand was during the night.
body: When anyone amongst you wakes up from sleep, he must not put his hand in the utensil till he has washed it three times, for he does not know where his hand was during the night.
arabic: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ قَالَ «إِذَا اسْتَيْقَظَ أَحَدُكُمْ مِنْ نَوْمِهِ فَلَا يَغْمِسْ يَدَهُ فِي وَضُوئِهِ حَتَّى يَغْسِلَهَا ثَلَاثًا فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَدْرِي حَيْثُ بَاتَتْ يَدُهُ»
chain: Abū Bakr Muḥammad b. Muʿāwiyah al-Qurashī \u003e Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥman \u003e Abū Muḥammad \u003e Muḥammad b. al-Qāsim \u003e Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥman Aḥmad b. Shuʿayb b. ʿAlī b. Sinān al-Nasāʾī \u003e Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Sufyān \u003e al-Zuhrī \u003e Abū Salamah \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو بَكْرٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُعَاوِيَةَ الْقُرَشِيُّ أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ وَأَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو مُحَمَّدٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْقَاسِمِ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ أَحْمَدُ بْنُ شُعَيْبِ بْنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ سِنَانٍ النَّسَائِيُّ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ عَنِ الزُّهْرِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي سَلَمَةَ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 2

chapter.englishTitle: The Siwak When It Is Taken Out at Night.

englishRaw: Whenever the Prophet ﷺ got up at night, he used to clean his mouth with Siwak.
body: Whenever the Prophet ﷺ got up at night, he used to clean his mouth with Siwak.
arabic: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ إِذَا قَامَ مِنَ اللَّيْلِ «يَشُوصُ فَاهُ بِالسِّوَاكِ»
chain: Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm And Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Jarīr \u003e Manṣūr \u003e Abū Wāʾil \u003e Ḥudhayfah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَقُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ جَرِيرٍ عَنْ مَنْصُورٍ عَنْ أَبِي وَائِلٍ عَنْ حُذَيْفَةَ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 3

chapter.englishTitle: How does he extract?

englishRaw: "I came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ when he was using the Siwak, and the end of the Siwak was on his toungue, and he was saying, "'A','a'."
body: "I came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ when he was using the Siwak, and the end of the Siwak was on his toungue, and he was saying, "'A','a'."
arabic: دَخَلْتُ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ وَهُوَ يَسْتَنُّ وَطَرَفُ السِّوَاكِ عَلَى لِسَانِهِ وَهُوَ يَقُولُ «عَأْ عَأْ»
chain: Aḥmad b. ʿAbdah al-Baṣrī \u003e Ḥammād \u003e Ghaylān \u003e Abū Burdah \u003e Abū Mūsá
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ عَبْدَةَ الْبَصْرِيُّ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا حَمَّادٌ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا غَيْلَانَ عَنْ أَبِي بُرْدَةَ عَنْ أَبِي مُوسَى قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 4

chapter.englishTitle: Encouragement in siwak

englishRaw: ʿThe siwak is cleansing to the mouth and pleasing to the Lordʿ
body: ʿThe siwak is cleansing to the mouth and pleasing to the Lordʿ
arabic: عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ قَالَ «السِّوَاكُ مَطْهَرَةٌ لِلْفَمِ مَرْضَاةٌ لِلرَّبِّ»
chain: Ḥumayd b. Masʿadah al-Baṣrī And Muḥammad b. ʿAbd al-Aʿlá \u003e Yazīd \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. Abū ʿAtīq from my father \u003e ʿĀʾishah Tuḥaddith
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا حُمَيْدُ بْنُ مَسْعَدَةَ الْبَصْرِيُّ وَمُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْأَعْلَى عَنْ يَزِيدَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ أَبِي عَتِيقٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي قَالَ سَمِعْتُ عَائِشَةَ تُحَدِّثُ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 5

chapter.englishTitle: Increasing the use of Miswak

englishRaw: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I have indeed urged you with regard to the Siwak.'"
body: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I have indeed urged you with regard to the Siwak.'"
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «قَدْ أَكْثَرْتُ عَلَيْكُمْ فِي السِّوَاكِ»
chain: ʿImrān b. Mūsá And Ḥumayd b. Masʿadah \u003e ʿAbd al-Wārith \u003e Shuʿayb b. al-Ḥabḥāb \u003e Anas b. Mālik
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عِمْرَانُ بْنُ مُوسَى وَحُمَيْدُ بْنُ مَسْعَدَةَ قَالَا حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الْوَارِثِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا شُعَيْبُ بْنُ الْحَبْحَابِ عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 6

chapter.englishTitle: License during evening in Ramadan

englishRaw: The Prophet ﷺ said: ʿWere it not that it would be too difficult for the ummah, I would have commanded them to use the siwak at the time of every prayer.”
body: The Prophet ﷺ said: ʿWere it not that it would be too difficult for the ummah, I would have commanded them to use the siwak at the time of every prayer.”
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «لَوْلَا أَنْ أَشُقَّ عَلَى أُمَّتِي لَأَمَرْتُهُمْ بِالسِّوَاكِ عِنْدَ كُلِّ صَلَاةٍ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Mālik \u003e Abū al-Zinād \u003e al-Aʿraj \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ مَالِكٍ عَنْ أَبِي الزِّنَادِ عَنِ الْأَعْرَجِ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 7

chapter.englishTitle: The Siwak at all times.

englishRaw: "What would the Messenger of Allah ﷺ do as soon as he entered the house?" She replied: "(He would use) the siwak."
body: "What would the Messenger of Allah ﷺ do as soon as he entered the house?" She replied: "(He would use) the siwak."
arabic: قُلْتُ لِعَائِشَةَ بِأَيِّ شَيْءٍ كَانَ يَبْدَأُ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ إِذَا دَخَلَ بَيْتَهُ؟ قَالَتْ بِالسِّوَاكِ
chain: ʿAlī b. Khashram al-Marwazī \u003e ʿĪsá / Ibn Yūnus \u003e Misʿar \u003e al-Miqdām b. Shurayḥ from his father
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ خَشْرَمٍ الْمَرْوَزِيُّ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا عِيسَى يَعْنِي ابْنَ يُونُسَ عَنْ مِسْعَرٍ عَنِ الْمِقْدَامِ بْنِ شُرَيْحٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 8

chapter.englishTitle: Does the Imam judge in the presence of his congregation?

englishRaw: "I came to the Prophet ﷺ when he was using the Siwak and with me were two men of the Ash'aris - one on my right and the other on my left - who were seeking to be appointed as officials. I said: 'By the One Who sent you as a Prophet with the truth, they did not tell me why they wanted to come with me and I did not realize that they were seeking to be appointed as officials.' And I could see his Siwak beneath his lip, then it slipped and he said: 'We do not' - or; 'We will never appoint as an official anyone who seeks that. Rather you should go.'" So he sent his (Abu Musa) to Yemen, then he sent Mu'adh bin Jabal to go after him - may Allah be pleased with them.
body: "I came to the Prophet ﷺ when he was using the Siwak and with me were two men of the Ash'aris - one on my right and the other on my left - who were seeking to be appointed as officials. I said: 'By the One Who sent you as a Prophet with the truth, they did not tell me why they wanted to come with me and I did not realize that they were seeking to be appointed as officials.' And I could see his Siwak beneath his lip, then it slipped and he said: 'We do not' - or; 'We will never appoint as an official anyone who seeks that. Rather you should go.'" So he sent his (Abu Musa) to Yemen, then he sent Mu'adh bin Jabal to go after him - may Allah be pleased with them.
arabic: دَخَلْتُ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ ﷺ وَمَعِي رَجُلَانِ مِنَ الْأَشْعَرِيِّينَ أَحَدُهُمَا عَنْ يَمِينِي وَالْآخَرُ عَنْ يَسَارِي وَرَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ يَسْتَاكُ فَكِلَاهُمَا سَأَلَ الْعَمَلَ قُلْتُ وَالَّذِي بَعَثَكَ بِالْحَقِّ مَا أَطْلَعَانِي عَلَى مَا فِي أَنْفُسِهِمَا وَمَا شَعَرْتُ أَنَّهُمَا يَطْلُبَانِ الْعَمَلَ فَكَأَنِّي أَنْظُرُ إِلَى سِوَاكِهِ تَحْتَ شَفَتِهِ قَلَصَتْ قَالَ «إِنَّا لَا أَوْ لَنْ نَسْتَعْمِلَ عَلَى عَمِلْنَا مَنْ أَرَادَهُ»
chain: ʿAmr b. ʿAlī \u003e Yaḥyá \u003e Qurrah \u003e Ḥumayd b. Hilāl \u003e Abū Burdah \u003e Abū Mūsá
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ عَلِيٍّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا قُرَّةُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي حُمَيْدُ بْنُ هِلَالٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو بُرْدَةَ عَنْ أَبِي مُوسَى قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 9

chapter.englishTitle: The number of Fitrah

englishRaw: "The Fitrah are five: Circumcision, shaving the pubes, plucking the armpit hairs, clipping the nails and taking from the mustache."
body: "The Fitrah are five: Circumcision, shaving the pubes, plucking the armpit hairs, clipping the nails and taking from the mustache."
arabic: عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ قَالَ الْفِطْرَةُ خَمْسٌ الْخِتَانُ وَحَلَقُ الْعَانَةِ وَنَتْفُ الْإِبْطِ وَتَقْلِيمُ الْأَظْفَارِ وَحَلْقُ الشَّارِبِ
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿAbdullāh b. Yazīd al-Muqriʾ al-Makkī \u003e Sufyān \u003e al-Zuhrī \u003e Saʿīd b. al-Musayyib \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ يَزِيدَ الْمُقْرِئُ الْمَكِّيُّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ عَنِ الزُّهْرِيِّ عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ الْمُسَيِّبِ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 10

chapter.englishTitle: The number of Fitrah

englishRaw: The Prophet ﷺ said "Five things are in accordance with Al Fitra (i.e. the tradition of prophets): to be circumcised, to shave the pelvic region, to pull out the hair of the armpits, to cut short the moustaches, and to clip the nails.'
body: The Prophet ﷺ said "Five things are in accordance with Al Fitra (i.e. the tradition of prophets): to be circumcised, to shave the pelvic region, to pull out the hair of the armpits, to cut short the moustaches, and to clip the nails.'
arabic: عَنْ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ قَالَ الْفِطْرَةُ خَمْسٌ الِاخْتِتَانُ وَالِاسْتِحْدَادُ وَقَصُّ الشَّارِبِ وَتَقْلِيمُ الْأَظَافِرِ وَنَتْفُ الْإِبْطِ
chain: al-Ḥārith b. Miskīn \u003e Ibn Wahb \u003e Yūnus \u003e Ibn Shihāb al-Zuhrī \u003e Saʿīd b. al-Musayyib \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: قُرِئَ عَلَى الْحَارِثِ بْنِ مِسْكِينٍ وَأَنَا أَسْمَعُ عَنِ ابْنِ وَهْبٍ عَنْ يُونُسَ عَنِ ابْنِ شِهَابٍ الزُّهْرِيِّ عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ الْمُسَيِّبِ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 11

chapter.englishTitle: The number of Fitrah

englishRaw: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The Fitrah are five: Trimming the mustache, plucking the armpit hairs, clipping the nails, removing the pubes, and circumcision.'"
body: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The Fitrah are five: Trimming the mustache, plucking the armpit hairs, clipping the nails, removing the pubes, and circumcision.'"
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «خَمْسٌ مِنَ الْفِطْرَةِ قَصُّ الشَّارِبِ وَنَتْفُ الْإِبْطِ وَتَقْلِيمُ الْأَظَافِرِ وَالِاسْتِحْدَادُ وَالْخِتَانُ»
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿAbd al-Aʿlá \u003e Muʿtamir \u003e Maʿmar \u003e al-Zuhrī \u003e Ibn al-Musayyib \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْأَعْلَى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُعْتَمِرٌ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ مَعْمَرًا عَنِ الزُّهْرِيِّ عَنِ ابْنِ الْمُسَيِّبِ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 12

chapter.englishTitle: The number of Fitrah

englishRaw: "The deeds connected to the Fitrah are: Clipping the nails, removing the mustache and shaving the pubes."
body: "The deeds connected to the Fitrah are: Clipping the nails, removing the mustache and shaving the pubes."
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ قَالَ «الْفِطْرَةُ قَصُّ الْأَظْفَارِ وَحَلْقُ الْعَانَةِ وَأَخْذُ الشَّارِبِ»
chain: al-Ḥārith b. Miskīn \u003e Ibn Wahb \u003e Ḥanẓalah b. Abū Sufyān \u003e Nāfiʿ \u003e Ibn ʿUmar
chainArabic: قُرِئَ عَلَى الْحَارِثِ بْنِ مِسْكِينٍ وَأَنَا أَسْمَعُ عَنِ ابْنِ وَهْبٍ عَنْ حَنْظَلَةَ بْنِ أَبِي سُفْيَانَ عَنْ نَافِعٍ عَنِ ابْنِ عُمَرَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 13

chapter.englishTitle: The command to keep the mustaches and shave the beards.

englishRaw: The Apostle of Allah ﷺ said: Trim closely the moustache, and let the beard grow.
body: The Apostle of Allah ﷺ said: Trim closely the moustache, and let the beard grow.
arabic: عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ قَالَ «أَحْفُوا الشَّوَارِبَ وَأَعْفُوا اللِّحَى»
chain: ʿUbaydullāh b. Saʿīd \u003e Yaḥyá \u003e ʿUbaydullāh \u003e Nāfiʿ \u003e Ibn ʿUmar
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللهِ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى عَنْ عُبَيْدِ اللهِ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي نَافِعٌ عَنِ ابْنِ عُمَرَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 14

chapter.englishTitle: Trimming the mustache

englishRaw: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever does not trim his mustache, he is not from one of us.'"
body: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever does not trim his mustache, he is not from one of us.'"
arabic: عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ قَالَ «مَنْ لَمْ يَأْخُذْ مِنْ شَارِبِهِ فَلَيْسَ مِنَّا»
chain: ʿAbdullāh b. Muḥammad b. Isḥāq \u003e Yaḥyá b. Saʿīd \u003e Yūsuf b. Ṣuhayb \u003e Ḥabīb b. Yasār \u003e Zayd b. Arqam
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْحَاقَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ يُوسُفَ بْنِ صُهَيْبٍ عَنْ حَبِيبِ بْنِ يَسَارٍ عَنْ زَيْدِ بْنِ أَرْقَمَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 15

chapter.englishTitle: The timing at that time.

englishRaw: "A time limit was set for us, by the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, regarding trimming the mustache, clipping the nails and plucking the pubes; we were not to leave that for more than forty days," on one occasion he said: "Forty nights."
body: "A time limit was set for us, by the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, regarding trimming the mustache, clipping the nails and plucking the pubes; we were not to leave that for more than forty days," on one occasion he said: "Forty nights."
arabic: وُقَّتَ لَنَا فِي قَصِّ الشَّارِبِ وَتَقْلِيمِ الْأَظْفَارِ وَحَلَقِ الْعَانَةِ وَنَتْفِ الْإِبْطِ أَنْ لَا نَتْرُكَ أَكْثَرَ مِنْ أَرْبَعِينَ يَوْمًا وَقَالَ مَرَّةً أُخْرَى أَرْبَعِينَ لَيْلَةً
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Jaʿfar \u003e Abū ʿImrān al-Jawnī \u003e Anas b. Mālik
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا جَعْفَرٌ عَنْ أَبِي عِمْرَانَ الْجَوْنِيِّ عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 16

chapter.englishTitle: Separation according to necessity's will

englishRaw: "Bring me (water for) Wudu'." So I brought him (water for) Wudu', and he performed Wudu' and wiped over his Khuffs. The Shaikh [1] said: "Isma'il (one of the narrators) is Ibn Ja'far bin Abi Kathir Al-Qari. [1] Meaning the author, and it appears that Ibn As-Sunni who heard the text, said this.
body: "Bring me (water for) Wudu'." So I brought him (water for) Wudu', and he performed Wudu' and wiped over his Khuffs. The Shaikh [1] said: "Isma'il (one of the narrators) is Ibn Ja'far bin Abi Kathir Al-Qari. [1] Meaning the author, and it appears that Ibn As-Sunni who heard the text, said this.
arabic: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ كَانَ إِذَا ذَهَبَ الْمَذْهَبَ أَبَعْدَ قَالَ فَذَهَبَ لِحَاجَتِهِ وَهُوَ فِي بَعْضِ أَسْفَارِهِ فَقَالَ «ائْتِنِي بِوَضُوءٍ» فَأَتَيْتُهُ بِوَضُوءٍ «فَتَوَضَّأَ وَمَسَحَ عَلَى الْخُفَّيْنِ»
chain: ʿAlī b. Ḥujr \u003e Ismāʿīl \u003e Muḥammad b. ʿAmr \u003e Abū Salamah \u003e al-Mughīrah b. Shuʿbah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ حُجْرٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو عَنْ أَبِي سَلَمَةَ عَنِ الْمُغِيرَةِ بْنِ شُعْبَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 17

chapter.englishTitle: Separation according to necessity's will

englishRaw: "I went out with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ to an isolated area, and when he wanted to relieve himself he moved far away."
body: "I went out with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ to an isolated area, and when he wanted to relieve himself he moved far away."
arabic: «خَرَجْتُ مَعَ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ إِلَى الْخَلَاءِ وَكَانَ إِذَا أَرَادَ الْحَاجَةَ أَبَعْدَ»
chain: ʿAmr b. ʿAlī \u003e Yaḥyá b. Saʿīd \u003e Abū Jaʿfar al-Khaṭmī ʿUmayr b. Yazīd \u003e al-Ḥārith b. Fuḍayl And ʿUmārah b. Khuzaymah b. Thābit \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. Abū Qurād
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ عَلِيٍّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ الْخَطْمِيُّ عُمَيْرُ بْنُ يَزِيدَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي الْحَارِثُ بْنُ فُضَيْلٍ وَعُمَارَةُ بْنُ خُزَيْمَةَ بْنِ ثَابِتٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي قُرَادٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 18

chapter.englishTitle: The license to abandon it

englishRaw: "I was walking with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and he came to some people's garbage dump and urinated while standing up. I turned to go away, but he called me back (to conceal him), and I was just behind him. Then when he had finished, he performed Wudu' and wiped over his Khuffs."
body: "I was walking with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and he came to some people's garbage dump and urinated while standing up. I turned to go away, but he called me back (to conceal him), and I was just behind him. Then when he had finished, he performed Wudu' and wiped over his Khuffs."
arabic: «كُنْتُ أَمْشِي مَعَ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ فَانْتَهَى إِلَى سُبَاطَةِ قَوْمٍ فَبَالَ قَائِمًا فَتَنَحَّيْتُ عَنْهُ فَدَعَانِي فَكُنْتُ عِنْدَ عَقِبِهِ حَتَّى فَرَغَ ثُمَّ تَوَضَّأَ وَمَسَحَ عَلَى خُفَّيْهِ»
chain: Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm \u003e ʿĪsá b. Yūnus \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e Shaqīq \u003e Ḥudhayfah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا عِيسَى بْنُ يُونُسَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا الْأَعْمَشُ عَنْ شَقِيقٍ عَنْ حُذَيْفَةَ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 19

chapter.englishTitle: The saying when entering the restroom

englishRaw: Whenever the Prophet ﷺ went to the lavatory, he used to say: "Allahumma inni aʿudhu bika min al-khubuthi wal khaba'ith."
body: Whenever the Prophet ﷺ went to the lavatory, he used to say: "Allahumma inni aʿudhu bika min al-khubuthi wal khaba'ith."
arabic: كَانَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ إِذَا دَخَلَ الْخَلَاءَ قَالَ «اللهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْخُبُثِ وَالْخَبَائِثِ»
chain: Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Ismāʿīl \u003e ʿAbd al-ʿAzīz b. Ṣuhayb \u003e Anas b. Mālik
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ عَنْ عَبْدِ الْعَزِيزِ بْنِ صُهَيْبٍ عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 20

chapter.arabicTitle: النَّهْيُ عَنِ اسْتِقْبَالِ الْقِبْلَةِ، وَعَنِ اسْتِدْبَارِهَا عِنْدَ الْحَاجَةِ، وَالْأَمْرُ بِاسْتِقْبَالِ الْمَشْرِقِ وَالْمَغْرِبِ
chapter.englishTitle: Prohibition of Facing the Qibla, and of Turning to it when Neces...

englishRaw: "Do not face towards the Qiblah nor turn your backs toward it when defecating or urinating, rather face toward the east or the west."
body: "Do not face towards the Qiblah nor turn your backs toward it when defecating or urinating, rather face toward the east or the west."
arabic: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ قَالَ «لَا تَسْتَقْبِلُوا الْقِبْلَةَ وَلَا تَسْتَدْبِرُوهَا لِغَائِطٍ وَلَا بَوْلٍ وَلَكِنْ شَرِّقُوا أَوْ غَرِّبُوا»
chain: Muḥammad b. Manṣūr \u003e Sufyān \u003e al-Zuhrī \u003e ʿAṭāʾ b. Yazīd \u003e Abū Ayyūb al-Anṣārī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مَنْصُورٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ عَنِ الزُّهْرِيِّ عَنْ عَطَاءِ بْنِ يَزِيدَ عَنْ أَبِي أَيُّوبَ الْأَنْصَارِيُّ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 21

chapter.arabicTitle: النَّهْيُ عَنِ اسْتِقْبَالِ الْقِبْلَةِ، وَعَنِ اسْتِدْبَارِهَا عِنْدَ الْحَاجَةِ، وَالْأَمْرُ بِاسْتِقْبَالِ الْمَشْرِقِ وَالْمَغْرِبِ
chapter.englishTitle: Prohibition of Facing the Qibla, and of Turning to it when Neces...

englishRaw: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When any one of you goes to defecate, let him not face toward the Qiblah, rather let him face towards the east or the west.'"
body: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When any one of you goes to defecate, let him not face toward the Qiblah, rather let him face towards the east or the west.'"
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «إِذَا أَتَى أَحَدُكُمُ الْغَائِطَ فَلَا يَسْتَقْبِلِ الْقِبْلَةَ وَلَكِنْ لِيُشَرِّقْ أَوْ لِيُغَرِّبْ»
chain: Yaʿqūb b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Ghundar \u003e Maʿmar \u003e Ibn Shihāb \u003e ʿAṭāʾ b. Yazīd \u003e Abū Ayyūb al-Anṣārī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا يَعْقُوبُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا غُنْدَرٌ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مَعْمَرٌ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا ابْنُ شِهَابٍ عَنْ عَطَاءِ بْنِ يَزِيدَ عَنْ أَبِي أَيُّوبَ الْأَنْصَارِيُّ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 22

chapter.englishTitle: The license in that in the houses

englishRaw: I ascended the roof of the house and saw the Apostle of Allaah ( sal Allaahu alayhi wa sallam) sitting on two bricks facing Jerusalem (Bait al-Maqdis) for relieving himself.
body: I ascended the roof of the house and saw the Apostle of Allaah ( sal Allaahu alayhi wa sallam) sitting on two bricks facing Jerusalem (Bait al-Maqdis) for relieving himself.
arabic: «لَقَدِ ارْتَقَيْتُ عَلَى ظَهَرِ بَيْتِنَا فَرَأَيْتُ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ عَلَى لَبِنَتَيْنِ مُسْتَقْبِلَ بَيْتِ الْمَقْدِسِ لِحَاجَتِهِ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Mālik \u003e Yaḥyá b. Saʿīd \u003e Muḥammad b. Yaḥyá b. Ḥabbān from his uncle Wāsiʿ b. Ḥabbān \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. ʿUmar
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ مَالِكٍ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ يَحْيَى بْنِ حَبَّانَ عَنْ عَمِّهِ وَاسِعِ بْنِ حَبَّانَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ عُمَرَ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 23

chapter.englishTitle: The license is valid in the urine.

englishRaw: It was narrated from Hudhifah that the Messenger of Allah ﷺcame to some people's garbage dump and urinated while standing.
body: It was narrated from Hudhifah that the Messenger of Allah ﷺcame to some people's garbage dump and urinated while standing.
arabic: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ «مَشَى إِلَى سُبَاطَةِ قَوْمٍ فَبَالَ قَائِمًا»
chain: Sulaymān b. ʿUbaydullāh \u003e Bahz \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e Sulaymān And Manṣūr \u003e Abū Wāʾil \u003e Ḥudhayfah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ عُبَيْدِ اللهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا بَهْزٌ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ وَمَنْصُورٍ عَنْ أَبِي وَائِلٍ عَنْ حُذَيْفَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 24

chapter.englishTitle: The license is valid in the urine.

englishRaw: It was narrated from Hudhifah that the Messenger of Allah ﷺcame to some people's garbage dump and urinated while standing.
body: It was narrated from Hudhifah that the Messenger of Allah ﷺcame to some people's garbage dump and urinated while standing.
arabic: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ «أَتَى سُبَاطَةَ قَوْمٍ فَبَالَ قَائِمًا»
chain: al-Muʾammal b. Hishām \u003e Ismāʿīl \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e Sulaymān \u003e Abū Wāʾil \u003e Ḥudhayfah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا الْمُؤَمَّلُ بْنُ هِشَامٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ عَنْ أَبِي وَائِلٍ عَنْ حُذَيْفَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 25

chapter.englishTitle: Al-Bawl Jalisan

englishRaw: "Whoever tells you that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ urinated standing up, do not believe him, for he would not urinate except while squatting."
body: "Whoever tells you that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ urinated standing up, do not believe him, for he would not urinate except while squatting."
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ بَالَ قَائِمًا فَلَا تُصَدِّقُوهُ مَا كَانَ يَبُولُ إِلَّا جَالِسًا»
chain: ʿAlī b. Ḥajar b. Iyās \u003e Sharīk \u003e al-Miqdām b. Shurayḥ from his father \u003e ʿĀʾishah \u003e Man Ḥaddathakum
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ حَجَرِ بْنِ إِيَاسٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا شَرِيكٌ عَنِ الْمِقْدَامِ بْنِ شُرَيْحٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ «§مَنْ حَدَّثَكُمْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 26

chapter.englishTitle: Urine covering up/being covered by something.

englishRaw: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ came out to us with a small leather shield in his hand. He put it down, then he sat behind it and urinated toward it. Some of the people said: 'Look, he is urinating like a woman.' He heard that and said: 'Do you not know what happened to the companion of the Children of Israel? If they got any urine on themselves they would clip that part of their garments off. Their companion told them not to do that and he was punished in his grave.'"
body: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ came out to us with a small leather shield in his hand. He put it down, then he sat behind it and urinated toward it. Some of the people said: 'Look, he is urinating like a woman.' He heard that and said: 'Do you not know what happened to the companion of the Children of Israel? If they got any urine on themselves they would clip that part of their garments off. Their companion told them not to do that and he was punished in his grave.'"
arabic: خَرَجَ عَلَيْنَا رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ وَفِي يَدِهِ كَهَيْئَةِ الدَّرَقَةِ فَوَضَعَهَا ثُمَّ جَلَسَ فَبَالَ إِلَيْهَا فَقَالَ بَعْضُ الْقَوْمِ انْظُرُوا يَبُولُ كَمَا تَبُولُ الْمَرْأَةُ فَسَمِعَهُ فَقَالَ «أَوَمَا عَلِمْتَ مَا أَصَابَ صَاحِبَ بَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ كَانُوا إِذَا أَصَابَهُمْ شَيْءٌ مِنَ الْبَوْلِ قَطَعُوهُ بِالْمَقَارِيضِ فَنَهَاهُمْ فَعُذِّبَ فِي قَبْرِهِ»
chain: Hannād b. al-Sarī \u003e Abū Muʿāwiyah \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e Zayd b. Wahb \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. Ḥasanah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا هَنَّادُ بْنُ السَّرِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي مُعَاوِيَةَ عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنْ زَيْدِ بْنِ وَهْبٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ حَسَنَةَ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 27

chapter.englishTitle: Going out for a walk

englishRaw: Messenger of Allah ﷺ passed by two graves and said, "Both of them (persons in the grave) are being tortured, and they are not being tortured for a major sin. This one used not to save himself from being soiled with his urine, and the other used to go about with calumnies (among the people to rouse hostilities, e.g., one goes to a person and tells him that so-and-so says about him such-and-such evil things). The Prophet ﷺ then asked for a green leaf of a date-palm tree, split it into two pieces and planted one on each grave and said, "It is hoped that their punishment may be abated till those two pieces of the leaf get dried." (See Hadith No 215, Vol 1).
body: Messenger of Allah ﷺ passed by two graves and said, "Both of them (persons in the grave) are being tortured, and they are not being tortured for a major sin. This one used not to save himself from being soiled with his urine, and the other used to go about with calumnies (among the people to rouse hostilities, e.g., one goes to a person and tells him that so-and-so says about him such-and-such evil things). The Prophet ﷺ then asked for a green leaf of a date-palm tree, split it into two pieces and planted one on each grave and said, "It is hoped that their punishment may be abated till those two pieces of the leaf get dried." (See Hadith No 215, Vol 1).
arabic: مَرَّ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ عَلَى قَبْرَيْنِ فَقَالَ إِنَّهُمَا يُعَذَّبَانِ وَمَا يُعَذَّبَانِ فِي كَبِيرٍ أَمَّا هَذَا فَكَانَ لَا يَسْتَنْزِهُ مِنْ بَوْلِهِ وَأَمَّا هَذَا فَكَانَ يَمْشِي بِالنَّمِيمَةِ ثُمَّ دَعَا بِعَسِيبٍ رَطْبٍ فَشَقَّهُ بِاثْنَيْنِ فَغَرَسَ عَلَى هَذَا وَاحِدًا وَعَلَى هَذَا وَاحِدًا ثُمَّ قَالَ «لَعَلَّهُ أَنْ يُخَفَّفَ عَنْهُمَا مَا لَمْ يَيْبَسَا»
chain: Hannād b. al-Sarī \u003e Wakīʿ \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e Mujāhid \u003e Ṭāwūs \u003e Ibn ʿAbbās
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا هَنَّادُ بْنُ السَّرِيِّ عَنْ وَكِيعٍ عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ مُجَاهِدًا يُحَدِّثُ عَنْ طَاوُوسٍ عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 28

chapter.arabicTitle: النَّهْيُ عَنْ أَخْذِ الذَّكَرِ بِالْيَمِينِ عِنْدَ الْبَوْلِ
chapter.englishTitle: Prohibition of taking the male organ with the right hand when ur...

englishRaw: "When any one of you urinates, let him not hold his penis in his right hand."
body: "When any one of you urinates, let him not hold his penis in his right hand."
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ قَالَ «إِذَا بَالَ أَحَدُكُمْ فَلَا يَأْخُذْ ذَكَرَهُ بِيَمِينِهِ»
chain: Yaḥyá b. Durust \u003e Abū Ismāʿīl \u003e Yaḥyá b. Abū Kathīr \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Abū Qatādah from his father
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ دُرُسْتَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو إِسْمَاعِيلَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ أَبِي كَثِيرٍ أَنَّ عَبْدَ اللهِ بْنَ أَبِي قَتَادَةَ حَدَّثَهُ عَنْ أَبِيهِ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 29

chapter.arabicTitle: النَّهْيُ عَنْ أَخْذِ الذَّكَرِ بِالْيَمِينِ عِنْدَ الْبَوْلِ
chapter.englishTitle: Prohibition of taking the male organ with the right hand when ur...

englishRaw: When anyone amongst you enters the privy he should not touch his penis with his right hand.
body: When anyone amongst you enters the privy he should not touch his penis with his right hand.
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «إِذَا دَخَلَ أَحَدُكُمُ الْخَلَاءَ فَلَا يَمَسَّ ذَكَرَهُ بِيَمِينِهِ»
chain: Hannād b. al-Sarī \u003e Wakīʿ \u003e Hishām \u003e Yaḥyá \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Abū Qatādah from his father
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا هَنَّادُ بْنُ السَّرِيِّ عَنْ وَكِيعٍ عَنْ هِشَامٍ عَنْ يَحْيَى عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ أَبِي قَتَادَةَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 30

chapter.englishTitle: Disgust in urine in the burrow

englishRaw: "None of you should urinate into a burrow in the ground." They said to Qatadah: "Why is it disliked to urinate into a burrow in the ground?" He said: "It is said that these are dwelling-places of the jinn."
body: "None of you should urinate into a burrow in the ground." They said to Qatadah: "Why is it disliked to urinate into a burrow in the ground?" He said: "It is said that these are dwelling-places of the jinn."
arabic: «لَا يَبُولَنَّ أَحَدُكُمْ فِي جُحْرٍ» قِيلَ لِقَتَادَةَ وَمَا يُكْرَهُ مِنَ الْبَوْلِ فِي الْجُحْرِ؟ قَالَ يُقَالُ إِنَّهَا مَسَاكِنُ الْجِنِّ
chain: ʿUbaydullāh b. Saʿīd \u003e Muʿādh b. Hishām from my father \u003e Qatādah \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Sarjis \u003e Nabī Allāh ﷺ
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللهِ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُعَاذُ بْنُ هِشَامٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي عَنْ قَتَادَةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ سَرْجِسٍ أَنَّ نَبِيَّ اللهِ ﷺ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 31

chapter.englishTitle: Urinating in the container

englishRaw: "The Prophet ﷺ had a vessel made from a date tree in which he would urinate and place it under the bed."
body: "The Prophet ﷺ had a vessel made from a date tree in which he would urinate and place it under the bed."
arabic: كَانَ لِلنَّبِيِّ ﷺ «قَدَحٌ مِنْ عِيدَانٍ يَبُولُ فِيهِ وَيَضَعُهُ تَحْتَ السَّرِيرِ»
chain: Ayyūb b. Muḥammad al-Raqqī al-Wazzān \u003e Ḥajjāj / Ibn Muḥammad \u003e Ibn Jurayj Akhbartinī Ḥukaymah b. Umaymah \u003e Ummihā Umaymah b. Ruqayqah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنِي أَيُّوبُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ الرَّقِّيُّ الْوَزَّانُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا حَجَّاجُ يَعْنِي ابْنَ مُحَمَّدٍ قَالَ قَالَ ابْنُ جُرَيْجٍ أَخْبَرْتِنِي حُكَيْمَةُ بِنْتُ أُمَيْمَةَ عَنْ أُمِّهَا أُمَيْمَةَ بِنْتِ رُقَيْقَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 32

chapter.arabicTitle: ذِكْرُ نَهْيِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ عَنِ الْبَوْلِ فِي الْمَاءِ الرَّاكِدِ
chapter.englishTitle: The Prophet's noble admonition about urinating in stagnant water.

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah forbade urinating into standing water.
body: The Messenger of Allah forbade urinating into standing water.
arabic: عَنْ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ أَنَّهُ «نَهَى عَنِ الْبَوْلِ فِي الْمَاءِ الرَّاكِدِ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e al-Layth \u003e Abū al-Zubayr \u003e Jābir
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا اللَّيْثُ عَنْ أَبِي الزُّبَيْرِ عَنْ جَابِرٍ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 33

chapter.englishTitle: Aversion in Urine in the Bathroom

englishRaw: "None of you should urinate in the place where he bathes, for most Waswas (devilish whispers) [1] come from that." [1] I.e., with regard to whether the urine has soiled his body or not.
body: "None of you should urinate in the place where he bathes, for most Waswas (devilish whispers) [1] come from that." [1] I.e., with regard to whether the urine has soiled his body or not.
arabic: عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ قَالَ «لَا يَبُولَنَّ أَحَدُكُمْ فِي مُسْتَحَمِّهِ فَإِنَّ عَامَّةَ الْوَسْوَاسِ مِنْهُ»
chain: ʿAlī b. Ḥujr b. Iyās \u003e Khbrnā Ibn al-Mubārak \u003e Maʿmar \u003e al-Ashʿath b. ʿAbdullāh \u003e al-Ḥasan \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Mughaffal
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ حُجْرِ بْنِ إِيَاسٍ قَالَ أخبرنا ابْنُ الْمُبَارَكِ عَنْ مَعْمَرٍ عَنِ الْأَشْعَثِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللهِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ مُغَفَّلٍ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 34

chapter.englishTitle: Peace be upon those who urinate.

englishRaw: It was narrated from Al-Muhajir bin Qunfudh that he greeted the Prophet ﷺ with Salam while he was urinating, and he did not return the greeting until he had performed Wudu'. When he had performed Wudu' he returned the greeting.
body: It was narrated from Al-Muhajir bin Qunfudh that he greeted the Prophet ﷺ with Salam while he was urinating, and he did not return the greeting until he had performed Wudu'. When he had performed Wudu' he returned the greeting.
arabic: أَنَّهُ «سَلَّمَ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ ﷺ وَهُوَ يَبُولُ فَلَمْ يُرِدَّ عَلَيْهِ حَتَّى تَوَضَّأَ فَلَمَّا تَوَضَّأَ رَدَّ عَلَيْهِ»
chain: Muḥammad b. Bashhār \u003e Khbrnā Muʿādh b. Muʿādh \u003e Saʿīd \u003e Qatādah \u003e al-Ḥasan \u003e al-Ḥuḍayn b. al-Mundhir Abū Sāsān \u003e al-Muhājir b. Qunfudh
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ قَالَ أخبرنا مُعَاذُ بْنُ مُعَاذٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سَعِيدٌ عَنْ قَتَادَةَ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ الحُضَيْنِ بْنِ الْمُنْذِرِ أَبِي سَاسَانَ عَنِ الْمُهَاجِرِ بْنِ قُنْفُذٍ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 35

chapter.englishTitle: The prohibition for those who have performed ablution to speak

englishRaw: The Prophet ﷺ said, "Two should not go out to relieve themselves and sit with their private parts exposed, for Allah dislikes that."
body: The Prophet ﷺ said, "Two should not go out to relieve themselves and sit with their private parts exposed, for Allah dislikes that."
arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ «لَا يَخْرُجُ اثْنَانِ إِلَى الْغَائِطِ فَيَجْلِسَانِ كَاشِفَيْنِ عَنْ عَوْرَتِهِمَا فَإِنَّ اللهَ يَمْقُتُ عَلَى ذَلِكَ»
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿAbdullāh b. ʿUbayd b. ʿUqayl from my father \u003e ʿIkrimah b. ʿAmmār \u003e Yaḥyá b. Abū Kathīr \u003e Abū Salamah \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ عُبَيْدِ بْنِ عُقَيْلٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا جَدِّي قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عِكْرِمَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ أَبِي كَثِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي سَلَمَةَ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 36

chapter.englishTitle: The prohibition for those who have performed ablution to speak

englishRaw: The Prophet ﷺ forbade the two people wearing lipsticks to speak because Allah dislikes that.
body: The Prophet ﷺ forbade the two people wearing lipsticks to speak because Allah dislikes that.
arabic: «نَهَى رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ الْمُتَغَوِّطَيْنِ أَنْ يَتَحَدَّثَا فَإِنَّ اللهَ يَمْقُتُ عَلَى ذَلِكَ»
chain: Aḥmad b. Ḥarb \u003e Qāsim \u003e Sufyān \u003e ʿIkrimah \u003e Yaḥyá \u003e ʿIyāḍ \u003e Abū Saʿīd
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ حَرْبٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا قَاسِمٌ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ عَنْ عِكْرِمَةَ عَنْ يَحْيَى عَنْ عِيَاضٍ عَنْ أَبِي سَعِيدٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 37

chapter.englishTitle: The prohibition for those who have performed ablution to speak

englishRaw: I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: When two persons go together for relieving themselves uncovering their private parts and talking together, Allah, the Great and Majestic, becomes wrathful at this (action). Abu Dawud said: This tradition has been narrated only by 'Ikrimah b. 'Ammar.
body: I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: When two persons go together for relieving themselves uncovering their private parts and talking together, Allah, the Great and Majestic, becomes wrathful at this (action). Abu Dawud said: This tradition has been narrated only by 'Ikrimah b. 'Ammar.
arabic: سَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ يَقُولُ «لَا يَخْرُجُ الرَّجُلَانِ عَلَى الْغَائِطِ كَاشِفَيْنِ عَنْ عَوْرَتَيْهِمَا يَتَحَدَّثَانِ فَإِنَّ اللهَ يَمْقُتُ عَلَى ذَلِكَ»
chain: ʿAmr b. ʿAlī \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman \u003e ʿIkrimah b. ʿAmmār \u003e Yaḥyá \u003e Hilāl b. ʿIyāḍ \u003e Abū Saʿīd
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ عَلِيٍّ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عِكْرِمَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ يَحْيَى عَنْ هِلَالِ بْنِ عِيَاضٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو سَعِيدٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 38

chapter.arabicTitle: ذِكْرُ نَهْيِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ عَنِ الِاسْتِطَابَةِ بِالْعَظْمِ وَالرَّوَثِ "
chapter.englishTitle: The Prohibition of Seeking Blessing through Bones and Pieces of ...

englishRaw: It was narrated from 'Abdullah bin Mas'ud, that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade cleaning oneself with bones or dung.
body: It was narrated from 'Abdullah bin Mas'ud, that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade cleaning oneself with bones or dung.
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ «نَهَى أَنْ يَسْتَطِيبَ أَحَدُكُمْ بِعَظْمٍ أَوْ رَوْثٍ»
chain: Aḥmad b. ʿAmr b. al-Sarḥ \u003e Ibn Wahb \u003e Yūnus \u003e Ibn Shihāb \u003e Abū ʿUthmān b. Sannah al-Khuzāʿī \u003e Ibn Masʿūd
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ عَمْرِو بْنِ السَّرْحِ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا ابْنُ وَهْبٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي يُونُسُ عَنِ ابْنِ شِهَابٍ عَنْ أَبِي عُثْمَانَ بْنِ سَنَّةَ الْخُزَاعِيِّ عَنِ ابْنِ مَسْعُودٍ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 39

chapter.arabicTitle: ذِكْرُ نَهْيِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ عَنِ الِاسْتِطَابَةِ بِالْعَظْمِ وَالرَّوَثِ "
chapter.englishTitle: The Prohibition of Seeking Blessing through Bones and Pieces of ...

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Do not cleanse yourselves with dung or bones, for they are provisions for your brothers from among the jinn."
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Do not cleanse yourselves with dung or bones, for they are provisions for your brothers from among the jinn."
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «لَا تَسْتَنْجُوا بِالرَّوْثِ وَلَا بِالْعِظَامِ فَإِنَّهَا زَادُ إِخْوَانِكُمْ مِنَ الْجِنِّ»
chain: Hannād b. al-Sarī \u003e Ḥafṣ \u003e Dāwud \u003e al-Shaʿbī \u003e ʿAlqamah \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Masʿūd
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا هَنَّادُ بْنُ السَّرِيِّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا حَفْصٌ عَنْ دَاوُدَ عَنِ الشَّعْبِيِّ عَنْ عَلْقَمَةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ مَسْعُودٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 40

chapter.arabicTitle: ذِكْرُ نَهْيِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ عَنِ الِاسْتِطَابَةِ بِالْيَمِينِ
chapter.englishTitle: The prohibition of shaking hands with the right hand according t...

englishRaw: To face the Qibla with feces or urine or to clean ourselves with our oaths or to suffice with less than three stones.
body: To face the Qibla with feces or urine or to clean ourselves with our oaths or to suffice with less than three stones.
arabic: أَنْ نَسْتَقْبِلَ الْقِبْلَةَ بِغَائِطٍ أَوْ بَوْلٍ أَوْ نَسْتَنْجِيَ بِأَيْمَانِنَا أَوْ نَكْتَفِي بِأَقَلِّ مِنْ ثَلَاثَةِ أَحْجَارٍ»
chain: Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Abū Muʿāwiyah \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e Ibrāhīm \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. Yazīd \u003e Salmān \u003e Lah a man In Ṣāḥibakum Layuʿallimukum Ḥattá al-Khirāʾah \u003e Ajal Nahānā
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو مُعَاوِيَةَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا الْأَعْمَشُ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ يَزِيدَ عَنْ سَلْمَانَ قَالَ قَالَ لَهُ رَجُلٌ إِنَّ صَاحِبَكُمْ لَيُعَلِّمُكُمْ حَتَّى الْخِرَاءَةَ قَالَ أَجَلْ «§نَهَانَا

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 41

chapter.arabicTitle: ذِكْرُ نَهْيِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ عَنِ الِاسْتِطَابَةِ بِالْيَمِينِ
chapter.englishTitle: The prohibition of shaking hands with the right hand according t...

englishRaw: Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Whenever anyone of you drinks water, he should not breathe in the drinking utensil, and whenever anyone of you goes to a lavatory, he should neither touch his penis nor clean his private parts with his right hand."
body: Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Whenever anyone of you drinks water, he should not breathe in the drinking utensil, and whenever anyone of you goes to a lavatory, he should neither touch his penis nor clean his private parts with his right hand."
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ قَالَ «إِذَا شَرِبَ أَحَدُكُمْ فَلَا يَتَنَفَّسْ فِي إِنَائِهِ وَإِذَا أَتَى الْخَلَاءَ فَلَا يَمَسَّ ذَكَرَهُ بِيَمِينِهِ وَلَا يَتَمَسَّحْ بِيَمِينِهِ»
chain: Ismāʿīl b. Masʿūd \u003e Khālid \u003e Hishām \u003e Yaḥyá \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Abū Qatādah \u003e Abū Qatādah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ مَسْعُودٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا خَالِدٌ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا هِشَامٌ عَنْ يَحْيَى عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ أَبِي قَتَادَةَ عَنْ أَبِي قَتَادَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 42

chapter.arabicTitle: الِاجْتِزَاءُ فِي الِاسْتِطَابَةِ بِثَلَاثَةِ أَحْجَارٍ دُونَ غَيْرِهَا
chapter.englishTitle: The Mastery of Crafting with Three Stones, Excluding Others

englishRaw: "When any one of you goes to the Gha'it (toilet to defecate), let him take with him three stones and clean himself with them, for that will suffice him."
body: "When any one of you goes to the Gha'it (toilet to defecate), let him take with him three stones and clean himself with them, for that will suffice him."
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ قَالَ «إِذَا ذَهَبَ أَحَدُكُمُ الْغَائِطَ فَلْيَذْهَبْ مَعَهُ بِثَلَاثَةِ أَحْجَارٍ فَلْيَسْتَطِبْ بِهَا فَإِنَّهَا تُجْزِئُ عَنْهُ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e ʿAbd al-ʿAzīz b. Abū Ḥāzim from his father \u003e Muslim b. Qurṭ \u003e ʿUrwah \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الْعَزِيزِ بْنُ أَبِي حَازِمٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ مُسْلِمِ بْنِ قُرْطٍ عَنْ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 43

chapter.englishTitle: Self-sufficiency in obtaining two stones

englishRaw: "The Prophet ﷺ wanted to defecate, and he told me to bring him three stones. I found two stones and looked for a third, but I could not find any, so I picked up a piece of dung and brought them to the Prophet ﷺ. He took the two stones and three away the dung and said: "This is Riks." Abu 'Abdur-Rahman (An-Nasai') said: Riks is the food of the jinn.
body: "The Prophet ﷺ wanted to defecate, and he told me to bring him three stones. I found two stones and looked for a third, but I could not find any, so I picked up a piece of dung and brought them to the Prophet ﷺ. He took the two stones and three away the dung and said: "This is Riks." Abu 'Abdur-Rahman (An-Nasai') said: Riks is the food of the jinn.
arabic: أَنَّهُ سَمِعَ عَبْدَ اللهِ يَقُولُ أَتَى النَّبِيُّ ﷺ الْغَائِطَ وَأَمَرَنِي أَنْ آتِيَهُ بِثَلَاثَةِ أَحْجَارٍ فَوَجَدْتُ الْحَجَرَيْنِ وَالْتَمَسْتُ الثَّالِثَ فَلَمْ أَجِدْهُ فَأَخَذْتُ رَوْثَةً فَأَتَيْتُ بِهِنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ فَأَخَذَ الْحَجَرَيْنِ وَأَلْقَى الرَّوْثَةَ وَقَالَ «هَذِهِ رِكْسٌ»
chain: Aḥmad b. Sulaymān \u003e Abū Nuʿaym \u003e Zuhayr \u003e Abū Isḥāq \u003e Lays Abū ʿUbaydah Dhakarah And Lakin ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. al-Aswad from his father \u003e ʿAbdullāh
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو نُعَيْمٍ عَنْ زُهَيْرٍ عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ قَالَ لَيْسَ أَبُو عُبَيْدَةَ ذَكَرَهُ وَلَكِنْ عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ الْأَسْوَدِ عَنْ أَبِيهِ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 44

chapter.englishTitle: License in single stone quarrying

englishRaw: "When you perform Wudu', sniff water in your nose and blow it out, and when you use small stones (to remove filth), then make it off (numbered)."
body: "When you perform Wudu', sniff water in your nose and blow it out, and when you use small stones (to remove filth), then make it off (numbered)."
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ قَالَ «إِذَا تَوَضَّأْتَ فَاسْتَنْثِرْ وَإِذَا اسْتَجْمَرْتَ فَأَوْتِرْ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Ḥammād \u003e Manṣūr \u003e Hilāl \u003e Salamah b. Qays
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادٌ عَنْ مَنْصُورٍ عَنْ هِلَالٍ عَنْ سَلَمَةَ بْنِ قَيْسٍ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 45

chapter.englishTitle: License in single stone quarrying

englishRaw: "When you clean yourselves (with stones, after defecating), use an odd number."
body: "When you clean yourselves (with stones, after defecating), use an odd number."
arabic: عَنْ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ قَالَ «إِذَا اسْتَجْمَرْتَ فَأَوْتِرْ»
chain: Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Jarīr \u003e Manṣūr \u003e Hilāl b. Yasāf \u003e Salamah b. Qays
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا جَرِيرٌ عَنْ مَنْصُورٍ عَنْ هِلَالِ بْنِ يَسَافٍ عَنْ سَلَمَةَ بْنِ قَيْسٍ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 46

chapter.englishTitle: Hydration with Water

englishRaw: "Tell your husbands to clean themselves with water, for I am too shy to tell them myself. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to do that."
body: "Tell your husbands to clean themselves with water, for I am too shy to tell them myself. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to do that."
arabic: أَنْ يَسْتَطِيبُوا بِالْمَاءِ فَإِنِّي أَسْتَحْيِيهِمْ مِنْهُ إِنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ كَانَ يَفْعَلُهُ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Abū ʿAwānah \u003e Qatādah \u003e Muʿādhah \u003e ʿĀʾishah \u003e Murn Azwājakun
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَوَانَةَ عَنْ قَتَادَةَ عَنْ مُعَاذَةَ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ أَنَّهَا قَالَتْ «§مُرْنَ أَزْوَاجَكُنَّ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 47

chapter.englishTitle: Hydration with Water

englishRaw: "When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would go to the toilet, I and another boy like me would bring a small leather vessel of water and he would clean himself with water."
body: "When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would go to the toilet, I and another boy like me would bring a small leather vessel of water and he would clean himself with water."
arabic: سَمِعْتُ أَنَسَ بْنَ مَالِكٍ يَقُولُ كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «إِذَا دَخَلَ الْخَلَاءَ أَحْمِلُ أَنَا وَغُلَامٌ مَعِي نَحْوِي إِدَاوَةً مِنْ مَاءٍ فَيَسْتَنْجِي بِالْمَاءِ»
chain: Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm \u003e al-Naḍr \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e ʿAṭāʾ b. Abū Maymūnah \u003e Anas b. Mālik
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا النَّضْرُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ عَنْ عَطَاءِ بْنِ أَبِي مَيْمُونَةَ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 48

chapter.englishTitle: Wiping the hand on the ground after using the bathroom

englishRaw: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah that the Prophet ﷺ performed Wudu', and when he had performed Istinja' he rubbed his hand on the ground.
body: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah that the Prophet ﷺ performed Wudu', and when he had performed Istinja' he rubbed his hand on the ground.
arabic: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ «تَوَضَّأَ فَلَمَّا اسْتَنْجَى دَلَكَ يَدَهُ بِالْأَرْضِ»
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿAbdullāh b. al-Mubārak \u003e Wakīʿ \u003e Sharīk \u003e Ibrāhīm b. Jarīr \u003e Abū Zurʿah \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ الْمُبَارَكِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ عَنْ شَرِيكٌ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ جَرِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي زُرْعَةَ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 49

chapter.arabicTitle: ذِكْرُ مَا يُنَجِّسُ الْمَاءَ، وَمَا لَا يُنَجِّسُهُ
chapter.englishTitle: Mentioning what contaminates water and what doesn't contaminate ...

englishRaw: From the Prophet ﷺ, he said, "Nothing can make water impure."
body: From the Prophet ﷺ, he said, "Nothing can make water impure."
arabic: عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ قَالَ «الْمَاءُ لَا يُنَجِّسُهُ شَيْءٌ»
chain: Muḥammad b. al-Muthanná \u003e Abū Aḥmad \u003e Sharīk \u003e al-Miqdām b. Shurayḥ from his father \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو أَحْمَدَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا شَرِيكٌ عَنِ الْمِقْدَامِ بْنِ شُرَيْحٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 50

chapter.englishTitle: Timing in Water

englishRaw: The Prophet ﷺ, was asked about water (in desert country) and what is frequented by animals and wild beasts. He replied: When there is enough water to fill two pitchers, it bears no impurity.
body: The Prophet ﷺ, was asked about water (in desert country) and what is frequented by animals and wild beasts. He replied: When there is enough water to fill two pitchers, it bears no impurity.
arabic: سُئِلَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ عَنِ الْمَاءِ وَمَا يَنُوبُهُ مِنَ الدَّوَابِّ وَالسِّبَاعِ؟ فَقَالَ «إِذَا كَانَ الْمَاءُ قُلَّتَيْنِ لَمْ يُحْمَلِ الْخَبَثَ»
chain: Hannād b. al-Sarī And al-Ḥusayn b. Ḥurayth \u003e Abū Usāmah \u003e al-Walīd b. Kathīr \u003e Muḥammad \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. ʿAbdullāh b. ʿUmar from his father
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا هَنَّادُ بْنُ السَّرِيِّ وَالْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ حُرَيْثٍ عَنْ أَبِي أُسَامَةَ عَنِ الْوَلِيدِ بْنِ كَثِيرٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ عُمَرَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 51

chapter.englishTitle: Abandonment of Timing in Water

englishRaw: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, 'Do not harm him.' When he finished, he called for a bucket and poured it on him."
body: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, 'Do not harm him.' When he finished, he called for a bucket and poured it on him."
arabic: رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «دَعُوهُ لَا تُزْرِمُوهُ» فَلَمَّا فَرَغَ دَعَا بِدَلْوٍ فَصَبَّهُ عَلَيْهِ
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Ḥammād \u003e Thābit \u003e Anas
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادٌ عَنْ ثَابِتٍ عَنْ أَنَسٍ أَنَّ أَعْرَابِيًا بَالَ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ فَقَامَ إِلَيْهِ بَعْضُ الْقَوْمِ فَقَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 52

chapter.englishTitle: Abandonment of Timing in Water

englishRaw: "A Bedouin urinated in the Masjid, and the Prophet ﷺ ordered that a bucket (be brought) and poured over it."
body: "A Bedouin urinated in the Masjid, and the Prophet ﷺ ordered that a bucket (be brought) and poured over it."
arabic: بَالَ أَعْرَابِيٌّ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ «فَأَمَرَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ بِدَلْوٍ مِنْ مَاءٍ فَصَبَّ عَلَيْهِ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e ʿAbīdah \u003e Yaḥyá b. Saʿīd \u003e Anas b. Mālik
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَبِيدَةُ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 53

chapter.englishTitle: Abandonment of Timing in Water

englishRaw: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, 'Leave him.' So they left him until he recovered, then he ordered to bring a container of water and poured it over him."
body: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, 'Leave him.' So they left him until he recovered, then he ordered to bring a container of water and poured it over him."
arabic: رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «اتْرُكُوهُ» فَتَرَكُوهُ حَتَّى بَالَ ثُمَّ أَمْرَ بِدَلْوٍ مِنْ مَاءٍ فَصُبَّ عَلَيْهِ
chain: Sūwayd b. Naṣr \u003e ʿAbdullāh \u003e Yaḥyá b. Saʿīd \u003e Anas b. Mālik \u003e Jāʾ Aʿrābī \u003e al-Masjid Fabāl Faṣāḥ Bih al-Nās
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا سُوَيْدُ بْنُ نَصْرٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَنَسَ بْنَ مَالِكٍ يَقُولُ جَاءَ أَعْرَابِيٌّ إِلَى الْمَسْجِدِ فَبَالَ فَصَاحَ بِهِ النَّاسُ فَقَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 54

chapter.englishTitle: Abandonment of Timing in Water

englishRaw: "A Bedouin stood up and urinated in the Masjid, ans the people started shouting. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to them: 'Leave him alone, and spill a bucket of water over his urine. For you have been sent to make things easy for people, you have not been sent to make things difficult.'"
body: "A Bedouin stood up and urinated in the Masjid, ans the people started shouting. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to them: 'Leave him alone, and spill a bucket of water over his urine. For you have been sent to make things easy for people, you have not been sent to make things difficult.'"
arabic: لَهُمْ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «دَعُوهُ وَأَهْرِيقُوا عَلَى بَوْلِهِ دَلْوًا مِنْ مَاءٍ فَإِنَّمَا بُعِثْتُمْ مُيَسِّرِينَ وَلَمْ تُبْعَثُوا مُعَسِّرِينَ»
chain: ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. Ibrāhīm \u003e ʿUmar b. ʿAbd al-Wāḥid \u003e al-Awzāʿī \u003e Muḥammad b. al-Walīd al-Zubaydī \u003e al-Zuhrī \u003e ʿUbaydullāh b. ʿAbdullāh \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ عُمَرَ بْنِ عَبْدِ الْوَاحِدِ عَنِ الْأَوْزَاعِيِّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْوَلِيدِ الزُّبَيْدِيِّ عَنِ الزُّهْرِيِّ عَنْ عُبَيْدِ اللهِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللهِ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ قَامَ أَعْرَابِيٌّ فَبَالَ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ فَتَنَاوَلَهُ النَّاسُ فَقَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 55

chapter.englishTitle: The eternal water

englishRaw: "From the Messenger of Allah ﷺ , he said: 'None of you should urinate in standing water, then perform ablution with it.' And Khilas narrated from Abu Hurairah from the Prophet ﷺ similar to it."
body: "From the Messenger of Allah ﷺ , he said: 'None of you should urinate in standing water, then perform ablution with it.' And Khilas narrated from Abu Hurairah from the Prophet ﷺ similar to it."
arabic: عَنْ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ قَالَ «لَا يَبُولَنَّ أَحَدُكُمْ فِي الْمَاءِ الدَّائِمِ ثُمَّ يَتَوَضَّأُ مِنْهُ» 56 وَقَالَ خِلَاسٌ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ مِثْلَهُ
chain: Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm \u003e ʿĪsá b. Yūnus \u003e ʿAwf \u003e Muḥammad \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا عِيسَى بْنُ يُونُسَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَوْفٌ عَنْ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 57

chapter.englishTitle: The eternal water

englishRaw: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'None of you should urinate in still water and perform Ghusl with it.'" Abu 'Abdur-Rahman (An-Nasa'i) said: "ya'qub would not narrate this Hadith except for a Dinar."[1] [1] Ya'qub bin Ibrahim Ad-Dawrqi, and the meaning is that he held the view that it is permissible to accept a payment for narrating, contrary to many others.
body: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'None of you should urinate in still water and perform Ghusl with it.'" Abu 'Abdur-Rahman (An-Nasa'i) said: "ya'qub would not narrate this Hadith except for a Dinar."[1] [1] Ya'qub bin Ibrahim Ad-Dawrqi, and the meaning is that he held the view that it is permissible to accept a payment for narrating, contrary to many others.
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «لَا يَبُولَنَّ أَحَدُكُمْ فِي الْمَاءِ الدَّائِمِ ثُمَّ يَغْتَسِلُ مِنْهُ» قَالَ النَّسَائِيُّ كَانَ يَعْقُوبُ لَا يُحَدِّثُ بِهَذَا الْحَدِيثِ إِلَّا بِدِينَارٍ
chain: Yaʿqūb b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Ismāʿīl \u003e Yaḥyá b. ʿAtīq \u003e Muḥammad b. Sīrīn \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا يَعْقُوبُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ عَتِيقٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سِيرِينَ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 58

chapter.englishTitle: The mention of seawater and performing ablution with it

englishRaw: A man asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ: Messenger of Allah, we travel on the sea and take a small quantity of water with us. If we use this for ablution, we would suffer from thirst. Can we perform ablution with sea water? The Messenger ﷺ replied: Its water is pure and what dies in it is lawful food.
body: A man asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ: Messenger of Allah, we travel on the sea and take a small quantity of water with us. If we use this for ablution, we would suffer from thirst. Can we perform ablution with sea water? The Messenger ﷺ replied: Its water is pure and what dies in it is lawful food.
arabic: أَخْبَرَهُ أَنَّهُ سَمِعَ أَبَا هُرَيْرَةَ يَقُولُ سَأَلَ رَجُلٌ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ فَقَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اللهِ إِنَّا نَرْكَبُ الْبَحْرَ وَنَحْمِلُ مَعَنَا الْقَلِيلَ مِنَ الْمَاءِ فَإِنْ تَوَضَّأْنَا بِهِ عَطِشْنَا أَفَنَتَوَضَّأُ مِنْ مَاءِ الْبَحْرِ؟ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «هُوَ الطَّهُورُ مَاؤُهُ الْحِلُّ مَيْتَتُهُ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Mālik \u003e Ṣafwān b. Sulaym \u003e Saʿīd b. Salamah \u003e al-Mughīrah b. Abū Burdah \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ مَالِكٍ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ بْنِ سُلَيْمٍ عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ سَلَمَةَ أَنَّ الْمُغِيرَةَ بْنَ أَبِي بُرْدَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 59

chapter.englishTitle: The water of snow and hail.

englishRaw: "The Prophet ﷺ used to say: 'Allahumaghsil khatayaya bi-ma'ith-thalj wal-barad was naqqi qalbi min al-khataya kama naqayta ath-thawb al-abyad min ad-danas (O Allah, was away my sins with the water of snow and hail, and cleanse my heart of sin as a white garment is cleansed of filth.'"
body: "The Prophet ﷺ used to say: 'Allahumaghsil khatayaya bi-ma'ith-thalj wal-barad was naqqi qalbi min al-khataya kama naqayta ath-thawb al-abyad min ad-danas (O Allah, was away my sins with the water of snow and hail, and cleanse my heart of sin as a white garment is cleansed of filth.'"
arabic: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ يَقُولُ «اللهُمَّ اغْسِلْ خَطَايَايَ بِمَاءِ الثَّلْجِ وَالْبَرَدِ وَنَقِّ قَلْبِي مِنَ الْخَطَايَا كَمَا نَقَّيْتَ الثَّوْبَ الْأَبْيَضَ مِنَ الدَّنَسِ»
chain: Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Jarīr \u003e Hishām b. ʿUrwah from his father \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا جَرِيرٌ عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 60

chapter.englishTitle: Performing ablution with snow and hail.

englishRaw: "When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ started Salah, he would remain silent for a short while. I said: 'May my father and mother be ransomed for you, O Messenger of Allah! What do you say when you remain silent between the Takbir and the recitation (in the Salah)?' He said: 'I say: Allahumma ba'id baini was baina khatayaya kama ba'adta baina al-mashriq wal-maghrib; Allahumma naqqini min khatayaya kama yunaqqath-thawb al-abyad min ad-danas; Allahummaghsilni min khatayaya bith-thalji wal-ma'i wal-barad (O Allah, out a great distance between me and my sins, as great as the distance You have made between the East and the West; O Allah, cleanse me of of sin as a white garment is cleansed from filth; Wash away my sins with snow, water, and hail)'."
body: "When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ started Salah, he would remain silent for a short while. I said: 'May my father and mother be ransomed for you, O Messenger of Allah! What do you say when you remain silent between the Takbir and the recitation (in the Salah)?' He said: 'I say: Allahumma ba'id baini was baina khatayaya kama ba'adta baina al-mashriq wal-maghrib; Allahumma naqqini min khatayaya kama yunaqqath-thawb al-abyad min ad-danas; Allahummaghsilni min khatayaya bith-thalji wal-ma'i wal-barad (O Allah, out a great distance between me and my sins, as great as the distance You have made between the East and the West; O Allah, cleanse me of of sin as a white garment is cleansed from filth; Wash away my sins with snow, water, and hail)'."
arabic: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ إِذَا اسْتَفْتَحَ الصَّلَاةَ سَكَتَ هُنَيْهَةً فَقُلْتُ بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَأُمِّي يَا رَسُولَ اللهِ مَا تَقُولُ فِي سُكُوتِكَ بَيْنَ التَّكْبِيرِ وَالْقِرَاءَةِ؟ قَالَ أَقُولُ «اللهُمَّ بَاعِدْ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ خَطَايَايَ كَمَا بَاعَدْتَ بَيْنَ الْمَشْرِقِ وَالْمَغْرِبِ اللهُمَّ نَقِّنِي مِنْ خَطَايَايَ كَمَا يُنَقَّى الثَّوْبُ الْأَبْيَضُ مِنَ الدَّنَسِ اللهُمُ اغْسِلْنِي مِنْ خَطَايَايَ بِالثَّلْجِ وَالْمَاءِ وَالْبَرَدِ»
chain: ʿAlī b. Ḥajar b. Iyās \u003e Jarīr \u003e ʿUmārah b. al-Qaʿqāʿ \u003e Abū Zurʿah b. ʿAmr b. Jarīr \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ حَجَرِ بْنِ إِيَاسٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا جَرِيرٌ عَنْ عُمَارَةَ بْنِ الْقَعْقَاعِ عَنْ أَبِي زُرْعَةَ بْنِ عَمْرِو بْنِ جَرِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 61

chapter.englishTitle: The secretions of menstruation

englishRaw: "I would drink while I was menstruating, then I would hand it to the Prophet ﷺ, and he would put his mouth where mine had been and drink. And I would nibble at the bone on which some bits of meat were left while I was menstruating, then I would give it to the Prophet ﷺ and he would put his mouth where my mouth had been."
body: "I would drink while I was menstruating, then I would hand it to the Prophet ﷺ, and he would put his mouth where mine had been and drink. And I would nibble at the bone on which some bits of meat were left while I was menstruating, then I would give it to the Prophet ﷺ and he would put his mouth where my mouth had been."
arabic: كُنْتُ أَشْرَبُ وَأَنَا حَائِضٌ فَأُنَاوِلُهُ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ فَيَضَعُ فَاهُ عَلَى مَوْضِعِ فِيَّ فَيَشْرَبُهُ وَأَتَعَرَّقُ الْعَرْقَ وَأَنَا حَائِضٌ فَأُنَاوِلُهُ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ «فَيَضَعُ فَاهُ عَلَى مَوْضِعِ فِيَّ»
chain: Maḥmūd b. Ghaylān al-Marwazī \u003e Wakīʿ \u003e Misʿar And Sufyān \u003e al-Miqdām b. Shurayḥ from his father \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مَحْمُودُ بْنُ غَيْلَانَ الْمَرْوَزِيُّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مِسْعَرٌ وَسُفْيَانُ عَنِ الْمِقْدَامِ بْنِ شُرَيْحٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 62

chapter.englishTitle: The secretions of menstruation

englishRaw: "While I was menstruating, I would nibble meat from a bone, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would put his mouth where mine had been. And while I was menstruating, I would drink from a vessel and he would put his mouth where mine had been."
body: "While I was menstruating, I would nibble meat from a bone, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would put his mouth where mine had been. And while I was menstruating, I would drink from a vessel and he would put his mouth where mine had been."
arabic: كُنْتُ أَتَعَرَّقُ الْعَرْقَ «فَيَضَعُ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ فَاهُ حَيْثُ وَضَعْتُ وَأَنَا حَائِضٌ وَكُنْتُ أَشْرَبُ مِنَ الْإِنَاءِ فَيَضَعُ فَاهُ حَيْثُ وَضَعْتُ وَأَنَا حَائِضٌ»
chain: ʿAmr b. ʿAlī \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman \u003e Sufyān \u003e al-Miqdām b. Shurayḥ from his father \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: وَأَخْبَرَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ عَلِيٍّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ عَنْ سُفْيَانَ عَنِ الْمِقْدَامِ بْنِ شُرَيْحٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 63

chapter.englishTitle: The walls of the cat

englishRaw: Kabshah, daughter of Ka'b ibn Malik and wife of Ibn AbuQatadah, reported: AbuQatadah visited (me) and I poured out water for him for ablution. A cat came and drank some of it and he tilted the vessel for it until it drank some of it. Kabshah said: He saw me looking at him; he asked me: Are you surprised, my niece? I said: Yes. He then reported the Messenger of Allah ﷺ as saying: It is not unclean; it is one of those (males or females) who go round among you.
body: Kabshah, daughter of Ka'b ibn Malik and wife of Ibn AbuQatadah, reported: AbuQatadah visited (me) and I poured out water for him for ablution. A cat came and drank some of it and he tilted the vessel for it until it drank some of it. Kabshah said: He saw me looking at him; he asked me: Are you surprised, my niece? I said: Yes. He then reported the Messenger of Allah ﷺ as saying: It is not unclean; it is one of those (males or females) who go round among you.
arabic: أَنَّ أَبَا قَتَادَةَ دَخَلَ عَلَيْهَا وَذَكَرَ كَلِمَةً مَعْنَاهَا فَسَكَبْتُ لَهُ وُضُوءًا فَجَاءَتْ هِرَّةٌ فَشَرِبَتْ مِنْهُ فَأَصْغَى لَهَا الْإِنَاءَ حَتَّى شَرِبَتْ قَالَتْ كَبْشَةُ فَرَآنِي أَنْظُرُ إِلَيْهِ فَقَالَ أَتَعْجَبِينَ يَا ابْنَةَ أَخِي؟ فَقُلْتُ نَعَمْ قَالَ إِنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ قَالَ «إِنَّهَا لَيْسَتْ بِنَجَسٍ إِنَّمَا هِيَ مِنَ الطَّوَّافِينَ عَلَيْكُمْ وَالطَّوَّافَاتِ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Mālik \u003e Isḥāq b. ʿAbdullāh b. Abū Ṭalḥah \u003e Ḥumaydah b. ʿUbayd b. Rifāʿah \u003e Kabshah b. Kaʿb b. Mālik
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ مَالِكٍ عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ أَبِي طَلْحَةَ عَنْ حُمَيْدَةَ بِنْتِ عُبَيْدِ بْنِ رِفَاعَةَ عَنْ كَبْشَةَ بِنْتِ كَعْبِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 64

chapter.englishTitle: The male donkey's tail.

englishRaw: "An announcer came to us from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and said: 'Allah and His Messenger forbid you from (eating) the flesh of domestic donkeys, for it is filth.'"
body: "An announcer came to us from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and said: 'Allah and His Messenger forbid you from (eating) the flesh of domestic donkeys, for it is filth.'"
arabic: أَتَانًا مُنَادِي رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ فَقَالَ إِنَّ «اللهَ وَرَسُولَهُ يَنْهَاكُمْ عَنِ لُحُومِ الْحَمِيرِ فَإِنَّهَا رِجْسٌ»
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿAbdullāh \u003e Sufyān \u003e Ayyūb \u003e Muḥammad \u003e Anas
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ عَنْ أَيُّوبَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَنَسٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 65

chapter.arabicTitle: سُؤْرُ الْكَلْبِ وَإِرَاقَةُ مَا فِي الْإِنَاءِ الَّذِي يَلِغُ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: The heading translates to: "Filling the dog's bowl and pouring w...

englishRaw: When a dog licks a utensil belonging to any one of you, (the thing contained in it) should be thrown away and then (the utensil) should be washed seven times.
body: When a dog licks a utensil belonging to any one of you, (the thing contained in it) should be thrown away and then (the utensil) should be washed seven times.
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «إِذَا وَلَغَ الْكَلْبُ فِي إِنَاءِ أَحَدِكُمْ فَلْيُرِقْهُ ثُمَّ لِيَغْسِلْهُ سَبْعَ مَرَّاتٍ»
chain: ʿAlī b. Ḥajar b. Iyās \u003e ʿAlī / Ibn Mushir \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e Abū Razīn And ʾAbī Ṣāliḥ \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ حَجَرِ بْنِ إِيَاسٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا عَلِيٌّ يَعْنِي ابْنَ مُسْهِرٍ عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنْ أَبِي رَزِينٍ وَأَبِي صَالِحٍ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 66

chapter.arabicTitle: غَسْلُ الْإِنَاءِ مِنْ وُلُوغِ الْكَلْبِ سَبْعًا
chapter.englishTitle: Washing the vessel from the impurities of the dog seven times

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "If a dog licks the utensil of any one of you, let him wash it seven times." 67 Ibrahim ibn al-Hasan informed me, he said: Haggag informed us, he said: Ibn Juraij informed us, he said: Ziyad ibn Saad informed me that Hilal ibn Usama informed him that he heard Abu Salama narrating from Abu Hurairah, from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ with a similar narration.
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "If a dog licks the utensil of any one of you, let him wash it seven times." 67 Ibrahim ibn al-Hasan informed me, he said: Haggag informed us, he said: Ibn Juraij informed us, he said: Ziyad ibn Saad informed me that Hilal ibn Usama informed him that he heard Abu Salama narrating from Abu Hurairah, from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ with a similar narration.
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «إِذَا وَلَغَ الْكَلْبُ فِي إِنَاءِ أَحَدِكُمْ فَلْيَغْسِلْهُ سَبْعَ مَرَّاتٍ» 67 أَخْبَرَنِي إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا حَجَّاجٌ قَالَ ابْنُ جُرَيْجٍ أَخْبَرَنِي زِيَادُ بْنُ سَعْدٍ أَنَّهُ أَخْبَرَهُ هِلَالُ بْنُ أُسَامَةَ أَنَّهُ سَمِعَ أَبَا سَلَمَةَ يُخْبِرُ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ عَنْ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ مِثْلَهُ
chain: Ibrāhīm b. al-Ḥasan \u003e Ḥajjāj \u003e Ibn Jurayj \u003e Ziyād b. Saʿd \u003e Thābit a freed slave of ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. Zayd \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنِي إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا حَجَّاجٌ قَالَ قَالَ ابْنُ جُرَيْجٍ أَخْبَرَنِي زِيَادُ بْنُ سَعْدٍ أَنَّ ثَابِتًا مَوْلَى عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ زَيْدٍ أَخْبَرَهُ أَنَّهُ سَمِعَ أَبَا هُرَيْرَةَ يَقُولُ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 68

chapter.arabicTitle: غَسْلُ الْإِنَاءِ مِنْ وُلُوغِ الْكَلْبِ سَبْعًا
chapter.englishTitle: Washing the vessel from the impurities of the dog seven times

englishRaw: "If a dog licks the vessel of any one of you, let him wash it seven times, the first time with dust."
body: "If a dog licks the vessel of any one of you, let him wash it seven times, the first time with dust."
arabic: عَنْ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ قَالَ «إِذَا وَلَغَ الْكَلْبُ فِي إِنَاءِ أَحَدِكُمْ فَلْيَغْسِلْهُ سَبْعَ مَرَّاتٍ أُولَاهُنَّ بِالتُّرَابِ» خَالَفَهُ هِشَامٌ
chain: Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm \u003e ʿAbdah b. Sulaymān \u003e Ibn Abū ʿArūbah \u003e Qatādah \u003e Ibn Sīrīn \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدَةُ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ أَبِي عَرُوبَةَ عَنْ قَتَادَةَ عَنِ ابْنِ سِيرِينَ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 69

chapter.arabicTitle: غَسْلُ الْإِنَاءِ مِنْ وُلُوغِ الْكَلْبِ سَبْعًا
chapter.englishTitle: Washing the vessel from the impurities of the dog seven times

englishRaw: "If a dog licks the vessel of any one of you, let him wash it seven times, the first time with dust."
body: "If a dog licks the vessel of any one of you, let him wash it seven times, the first time with dust."
arabic: عَنْ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ قَالَ «إِذَا وَلَغَ الْكَلْبُ فِي إِنَاءِ أَحَدِكُمْ فَلْيَغْسِلْهُ سَبْعَ مَرَّاتٍ إِحْدَاهُنَّ بِالتُّرَابِ»
chain: Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Muʿādh b. Hishām from my father \u003e Qatādah \u003e Khilās \u003e Abū Rāfiʿ \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا مُعَاذُ بْنُ هِشَامَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي عَنْ قَتَادَةَ عَنْ خِلَاسٍ عَنْ أَبِي رَافِعٍ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 70

chapter.arabicTitle: تَعْفِيرُ الْإِنَاءِ الَّذِي يَلْغُ فِيهِ الْكَلْبُ بِالتُّرَابِ بَعْدَ غَسْلِهِ سَبْعَ مَرَّاتٍ
chapter.englishTitle: The Disinfection of the Container in Which the Dog Licks with So...

englishRaw: "If a dog licks a vessel then wash it seven times, and rub it the eighth time with dust."
body: "If a dog licks a vessel then wash it seven times, and rub it the eighth time with dust."
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ أَمَرَ بِقَتْلِ الْكِلَابِ وَرَخَّصَ فِي كَلْبِ الصَّيْدِ وَالْغَنَمِ وَقَالَ «إِذَا وَلَغَ الْكَلْبُ فِي الْإِنَاءِ فَاغْسِلُوهُ سَبْعُ مَرَّاتٍ وَعَفِّرُوا الثَّامِنَةَ بِالتُّرَابِ»
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿAbd al-Aʿlá \u003e Khālid / Ibn al-Ḥārith \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e Abū al-Tayyāḥ \u003e Muṭarrif \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Mughaffal
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْأَعْلَى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا خَالِدٌ يَعْنِي ابْنَ الْحَارِثِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ عَنْ أَبِي التَّيَّاحِ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ مُطَرِّفًا عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ مُغَفَّلٍ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 71

chapter.englishTitle: The Used Water

englishRaw: "I heard Jabir say: 'I fell sick, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and Abu Bakr came to visit me. They found me unconscious, so the Messenger of Allah ﷺ performed Wudu' and poured his Wudu' water over me.'"
body: "I heard Jabir say: 'I fell sick, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and Abu Bakr came to visit me. They found me unconscious, so the Messenger of Allah ﷺ performed Wudu' and poured his Wudu' water over me.'"
arabic: سَمِعْتُ جَابِرًا يَقُولُ «مَرِضْتُ فَأَتَانِي رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ وَأَبُو بَكْرٍ يَعُودَانِي فَوَجَدَانِي قَدْ أُغْمِيَ عَلَيَّ» فَتَوَضَّأَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ فَصَبَّ عَلَيَّ وَضُوءَهُ
chain: Muḥammad b. Manṣūr \u003e Sufyān \u003e Ibn al-Munkadir \u003e Jābir
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مَنْصُورٍ عَنْ سُفْيَانَ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ ابْنَ الْمُنْكَدِرِ يَقُولُ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 72

chapter.englishTitle: The ablution of men and women all.

englishRaw: "During the lifetime of Messenger of Allah ﷺ men and women used to perform ablution together."
body: "During the lifetime of Messenger of Allah ﷺ men and women used to perform ablution together."
arabic: «كَانَ الرِّجَالُ وَالنِّسَاءُ يَتَوَضَّؤُونَ فِي زَمَانِ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ جَمِيعًا»
chain: Hārūn b. ʿAbdullāh \u003e Maʿn \u003e Mālik \u003e Nāfiʿ \u003e Ibn ʿUmar
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا هَارُونُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مَعْنٌ عَنْ مَالِكٍ عَنْ نَافِعٍ عَنِ ابْنِ عُمَرَ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 73

chapter.englishTitle: The purity due to janabah.

englishRaw: It was narrated from 'Aishah that she used to perform Ghusl with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ from a single vessel.
body: It was narrated from 'Aishah that she used to perform Ghusl with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ from a single vessel.
arabic: أَنَّهَا كَانَتْ «تَغْتَسِلُ مَعَ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ فِي الْإِنَاءِ الْوَاحِدِ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e al-Layth \u003e Ibn Shihāb \u003e ʿUrwah \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا اللَّيْثُ عَنِ ابْنِ شِهَابٍ عَنْ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ أَنَّهَا أَخْبَرَتْهُ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 74

chapter.arabicTitle: الْقَدْرُ الَّذِي يَكْتَفِي بِهِ الرَّجُلُ مِنَ الْمَاءِ لِلْوُضُوءِ
chapter.englishTitle: The amount of water sufficient for a person to perform ablution.

englishRaw: "I heard Anas bin Malik say: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to perform Wudu' with a Makkuk (cup) and Ghusl with five Makkuks (cups).'"
body: "I heard Anas bin Malik say: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to perform Wudu' with a Makkuk (cup) and Ghusl with five Makkuks (cups).'"
arabic: سَمِعْتُ أَنَسَ بْنَ مَالِكٍ يَقُولُ كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «يَتَوَضَّأُ بِمَكُّوكٍ وَيَغْتَسِلُ بِخَمْسِ مَكَاكِيَّ»
chain: ʿAmr b. ʿAlī \u003e Yaḥyá \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. ʿAbdullāh b. Jabr \u003e Anas b. Mālik
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ عَلِيٍّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ جَبْرٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 75

chapter.arabicTitle: الْقَدْرُ الَّذِي يَكْتَفِي بِهِ الرَّجُلُ مِنَ الْمَاءِ لِلْوُضُوءِ
chapter.englishTitle: The amount of water sufficient for a person to perform ablution.

englishRaw: "I heard Anas bin Malik say: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to perform Wudu' with a Makkuk (cup) and Ghusl with five Makkuks (cups).'"
body: "I heard Anas bin Malik say: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to perform Wudu' with a Makkuk (cup) and Ghusl with five Makkuks (cups).'"
arabic: سَمِعْتُ أَنَسَ بْنَ مَالِكٍ يَقُولُ كَانَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ «يَتَوَضَّأُ بِمَكُّوكٍ وَيَغْتَسِلُ بِخَمْسِ مَكَاكِيَّ»
chain: Sūwayd b. Naṣr \u003e ʿAbdullāh \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Jabr \u003e Anas b. Mālik
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا سُوَيْدُ بْنُ نَصْرٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ عَنْ شُعْبَةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ جَبْرٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 76

chapter.arabicTitle: الْقَدْرُ الَّذِي يَكْتَفِي بِهِ الرَّجُلُ مِنَ الْمَاءِ لِلْوُضُوءِ
chapter.englishTitle: The amount of water sufficient for a person to perform ablution.

englishRaw: "I heard 'Abbad bin Tamim narrate from my grandmother - who was Umm 'Umarah bint Ka'b - that the Prophet ﷺ performed Wudu', and he was brought a vessel in which there were two-thirds of a Mudd." Shu'bah said: "I remember that he washed his forearms and started rubbing them, and he wiped the inside of his ear, but I do not remember whether he wiped the outside of them."
body: "I heard 'Abbad bin Tamim narrate from my grandmother - who was Umm 'Umarah bint Ka'b - that the Prophet ﷺ performed Wudu', and he was brought a vessel in which there were two-thirds of a Mudd." Shu'bah said: "I remember that he washed his forearms and started rubbing them, and he wiped the inside of his ear, but I do not remember whether he wiped the outside of them."
arabic: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ تَوَضَّأَ فَأُتِيَ بِمَاءٍ فِي إِنَاءٍ قَدْرَ ثُلُثَيِ الْمُدِّ قَالَ شُعْبَةُ فَأَحْفَظُ أَنَّهُ غَسَلَ ذِرَاعَيْهِ وَجَعَلَ يَدْلُكُهُمَا وَمَسَحَ أُذُنَيْهِ بَاطِنَهُمَا وَلَا أَحْفَظُ أَنَّهُ مَسَحَ ظَاهِرَهُمَا
chain: Muḥammad b. Bashhār \u003e Muḥammad Thum Dhakar Kalimah Maʿnāhā \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e Ḥabīb \u003e ʿAbbād b. Tamīm \u003e Jaddatih And Hī Um ʿUmārah b. Kaʿb
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدٌ ثُمَّ ذَكَرَ كَلِمَةً مَعْنَاهَا حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ عَنْ حَبِيبٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ عَبَّادَ بْنَ تَمِيمٍ يُحَدِّثُ عَنْ جَدَّتِهِ وَهِيَ أُمُّ عُمَارَةَ بِنْتُ كَعْبٍ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 77

chapter.arabicTitle: الْوُضُوءُ مِنَ الْإِنَاءِ وَالْوُضُوءُ فِي الطَّسْتِ
chapter.englishTitle: Wudu from a vessel and wudu in the container

englishRaw: "We came to 'Ali bin Abi Talib, may Allah be pleased with him, and he had prayed. He called for water and we said: 'What is he going to do with it when he has (already) prayed? He only wants to teach us.' A vessel of water and a basin were brought to him. He poured some water onto his hand and washed it three times, then he rinsed his mouth and nose three times from the hand with which he took the water. Then he washed his face three times, and he washed his right hand three times, and his left hand three times, and wiped his head once, then he washed his right foot three times and his left foot three times. Then he said: 'Whoever would like to learn how the Messenger of Allah ﷺ did Wudu', this is it.'"
body: "We came to 'Ali bin Abi Talib, may Allah be pleased with him, and he had prayed. He called for water and we said: 'What is he going to do with it when he has (already) prayed? He only wants to teach us.' A vessel of water and a basin were brought to him. He poured some water onto his hand and washed it three times, then he rinsed his mouth and nose three times from the hand with which he took the water. Then he washed his face three times, and he washed his right hand three times, and his left hand three times, and wiped his head once, then he washed his right foot three times and his left foot three times. Then he said: 'Whoever would like to learn how the Messenger of Allah ﷺ did Wudu', this is it.'"
arabic: أَنْ يَعْلَمَ وُضُوءَ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ فَهُوَ هَذَا
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Abū ʿAwānah \u003e Khālid b. ʿAlqamah \u003e ʿAbd Khayr \u003e Ataynā ʿAlī b. Abū Ṭālib And Qad Ṣallá Fadaʿā Biṭahūr Faqulnā Mā Yaṣnaʿ Waqad Ṣallá Mā Yurīd Illā Liyuʿallimanā Faʾutī Biʾināʾ Fīh Māʾ Waṭast Faʾafragh from al-Ināʾ \u003e Yadih Faghasalahā Thalāth Thum Maḍmaḍ Wāstanshaq Thalāth from al-Kaf al--Adhī Yaʾkhudh Bih al-Māʾ Thum Ghasal Wajhah Thalāth Waghasal Yadah al-Yumná Thalāth Wayadah al-Shimāl Thalāth Wamasaḥ Raʾsah Marrah Wāḥidah Thum Ghasal Rijlah al-Yumná Thalāth Warijlah al-Shimāl Thalāth Thum \u003e Man Sarrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَوَانَةَ عَنْ خَالِدِ بْنِ عَلْقَمَةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ خَيْرٍ قَالَ أَتَيْنَا عَلِيَّ بْنَ أَبِي طَالِبٍ وَقَدْ صَلَّى فَدَعَا بِطَهُورٍ فَقُلْنَا مَا يَصْنَعُ وَقَدْ صَلَّى؟ مَا يُرِيدُ إِلَّا لِيُعَلِّمَنَا §فَأُتِيَ بِإِنَاءٍ فِيهِ مَاءٌ وَطَسْتٍ فَأَفْرَغَ مِنَ الْإِنَاءِ عَلَى يَدِهِ فَغَسَلَهَا ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ مَضْمَضَ وَاسْتَنْشَقَ ثَلَاثًا مِنَ الْكَفِّ الَّذِي يَأْخُذُ بِهِ الْمَاءَ ثُمَّ غَسَلَ وَجْهَهُ ثَلَاثًا وَغَسَلَ يَدَهُ الْيُمْنَى ثَلَاثًا وَيَدَهُ الشِّمَالَ ثَلَاثًا وَمَسَحَ رَأْسَهُ مَرَّةً وَاحِدَةً ثُمَّ غَسَلَ رِجْلَهُ الْيُمْنَى ثَلَاثًا وَرِجْلَهُ الشِّمَالَ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ قَالَ مَنْ سَرَّهُ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 78

chapter.englishTitle: The Intention in Wudu

englishRaw: I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: “Action is but by intention and each person will have but that which he intended. So whoever migrated for the sake of Allah and His Messenger, then his migration was for the sake of Allah and His Messenger, whoever migrated for some worldly purpose or for the sake of a woman whom he could marry, his migration was for the purpose for which he migrated.”
body: I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: “Action is but by intention and each person will have but that which he intended. So whoever migrated for the sake of Allah and His Messenger, then his migration was for the sake of Allah and His Messenger, whoever migrated for some worldly purpose or for the sake of a woman whom he could marry, his migration was for the purpose for which he migrated.”
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «إِنَّمَا الْأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّةِ وَإِنَّمَا لِامْرِئٍ مَا نَوَى فَمَنْ كَانَتْ هِجْرَتُهُ إِلَى اللهِ وَإِلَى رَسُولِهِ فَهِجْرَتُهُ إِلَى اللهِ وَإِلَى رَسُولِهِ وَمَنْ كَانَتْ هِجْرَتُهُ إِلَى دُنْيَا يُصِيبُهَا أَوِ امْرَأَةٍ يَنْكِحُهَا فَهِجْرَتُهُ إِلَى مَا هَاجَرَ إِلَيْهِ»
chain: Sulaymān b. Manṣūr al-Balkhī \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. al-Mubārak \u003e Yaḥyá b. Ḥabīb b. ʿArabī \u003e Ḥammād b. Zayd And al-Lafẓ Liāb. al-Mubārak \u003e Yaḥyá b. Saʿīd \u003e Muḥammad b. Ibrāhīm \u003e ʿAlqamah b. Waqqāṣ \u003e ʿUmar b. al-Khaṭṭāb
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ مَنْصُورٍ الْبَلْخِيُّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ الْمُبَارَكِ وَأَخْبَرَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ حَبِيبِ بْنِ عَرَبِيٍّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ زَيْدٍ وَاللَّفْظُ لِابْنِ الْمُبَارَكِ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ عَلْقَمَةَ بْنِ وَقَّاصٍ عَنْ عُمَرَ بْنِ الْخَطَّابِ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 79

chapter.englishTitle: The virtue of ablution

englishRaw: The Prophet ﷺ said: Allah does not accept charity from goods acquired by embezzlement as He does not accept prayer without purification.
body: The Prophet ﷺ said: Allah does not accept charity from goods acquired by embezzlement as He does not accept prayer without purification.
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «لَا تُقْبَلُ صَلَاةٌ بِغَيْرِ طُهُورٍ وَلَا صَدَقَةٌ مِنْ غُلُولٍ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Abū ʿAwānah \u003e Qatādah \u003e Abū al-Malīḥ from his father
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَوَانَةَ عَنْ قَتَادَةَ عَنْ أَبِي الْمَلِيحِ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 80

chapter.englishTitle: How is one invited to purification?

englishRaw: We were with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and they could not find water. So a container was brought and he put his hand in it. I saw the water gushing out between his fingers and he said, "Blessed and pure, from Allah."
body: We were with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and they could not find water. So a container was brought and he put his hand in it. I saw the water gushing out between his fingers and he said, "Blessed and pure, from Allah."
