englishRaw: that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ wiped upon the two cloth socks and the two sandals.
body: that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ wiped upon the two cloth socks and the two sandals.
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ «مَسَحَ عَلَى الْجَوْرَبَيْنِ وَالنَّعْلَيْنِ» قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ مَا نَعْلَمُ أَنَّ أَحَدًا تَابَعَ أَبَا قَيْسٍ عَلَى هَذِهِ الرِّوَايَةِ وَالصَّحِيحُ عَنِ الْمُغِيرَةِ أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ مَسَحَ عَلَى الْخُفَّيْنِ وَاللهُ أَعْلَمُ
chain: Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Wakīʿ \u003e Sufyān \u003e Abū Qays \u003e Huzayl b. Shuraḥbīl \u003e al-Mughīrah b. Shuʿbah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا وَكِيعٌ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ عَنْ أَبِي قَيْسٍ عَنْ هُزَيْلِ بْنِ شُرَحْبِيلَ عَنِ الْمُغِيرَةِ بْنِ شُعْبَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 130

chapter.arabicTitle: التَّوْقِيتُ فِي الْمَسْحِ عَلَى الْخُفَّيْنِ لِلْمُقِيمِ وَالْمُسَافِرِ
chapter.englishTitle: Timing in wiping over the socks for the resident and the travele...

englishRaw: "I asked 'Aishah about wiping over the leather socks and she said: 'Go to 'Ali and ask him, for he knows more about that than I do.' So I went to 'Ali and asked him about wiping. He said: 'The Messenger of Allah used to tell us that the resident could wipe for one day and one night, and the traveler could do so for three days.'"
body: "I asked 'Aishah about wiping over the leather socks and she said: 'Go to 'Ali and ask him, for he knows more about that than I do.' So I went to 'Ali and asked him about wiping. He said: 'The Messenger of Allah used to tell us that the resident could wipe for one day and one night, and the traveler could do so for three days.'"
arabic: ائْتِ عَلِيًّا فَإِنَّهُ أَعْلَمُ بِذَلِكَ مِنِّي فَأَتَيْتُ عَلِيًّا فَسَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الْمَسْحِ؟ فَقَالَ كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «يَأْمُرُنَا أَنْ يَمْسَحَ الْمُقِيمُ يَوْمًا وَلَيْلَةً وَالْمُسَافِرُ ثَلَاثَةَ أَيَّامٍ»
chain: Hannād b. al-Sarī \u003e Abū Muʿāwiyah \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e al-Ḥakam \u003e al-Qāsim b. Mukhaymirah \u003e Shurayḥ b. Hāniʾ \u003e Saʾalt ʿĀʾishah \u003e al-Masḥ \u003e al-Khuffayn
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا هَنَّادُ بْنُ السَّرِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي مُعَاوِيَةَ عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنِ الْحَكَمِ عَنِ الْقَاسِمِ بْنِ مُخَيْمِرَةَ عَنْ شُرَيْحِ بْنِ هَانِئٍ قَالَ سَأَلْتُ عَائِشَةَ عَنِ الْمَسْحِ عَلَى الْخُفَّيْنِ؟ فَقَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 131

chapter.arabicTitle: التَّوْقِيتُ فِي الْمَسْحِ عَلَى الْخُفَّيْنِ لِلْمُقِيمِ وَالْمُسَافِرِ
chapter.englishTitle: Timing in wiping over the socks for the resident and the travele...

englishRaw: "I came to a man called Safwan bin 'Assal and sat at his door. He came out and said: 'What do you want?' I said: 'I am seeking knowledge.' He said: 'The angels lower their wings for the seeker of knowledge out of pleasure at what he is seeking.' He said: 'What do you want to know about?' I said: 'About the Khuffs.' He said: 'When we were with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ on a journey, he told us not to take them off for three days except in the case of Janabah, but not in the case of defecation, urinating or sleep.'"
body: "I came to a man called Safwan bin 'Assal and sat at his door. He came out and said: 'What do you want?' I said: 'I am seeking knowledge.' He said: 'The angels lower their wings for the seeker of knowledge out of pleasure at what he is seeking.' He said: 'What do you want to know about?' I said: 'About the Khuffs.' He said: 'When we were with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ on a journey, he told us not to take them off for three days except in the case of Janabah, but not in the case of defecation, urinating or sleep.'"
arabic: إِنَّ الْمَلَائِكَةَ تَضَعُ أَجْنِحَتَهَا لِطَالِبِ الْعِلْمِ رِضًى بِمَا يَطْلُبُ قَالَ عَنْ أَيِّ شَيْءٍ تَسْأَلُ؟ قُلْتُ عَنِ الْخُفَّيْنِ قَالَ كُنَّا إِذَا كُنَّا مَعَ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ فِي سَفَرٍ «أَمَرَنَا أَنْ لَا نَنْزِعَهُ ثَلَاثًا إِلَّا مِنْ جَنَابَةٍ وَلَكِنْ مِنْ غَائِطٍ وَبَوْلٍ وَنَوْمٍ»
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿAbd al-Aʿlá \u003e Khālid \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e ʿĀṣim \u003e Zir b. Ḥubaysh
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْأَعْلَى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا خَالِدٌ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا شُعْبَةُ عَنْ عَاصِمٍ أَنَّهُ سَمِعَ زِرَّ بْنَ حُبَيْشٍ يُحَدِّثُ قَالَ أَتَيْتُ رَجُلًا يُدْعَى صَفْوَانُ بْنُ عَسَّالٍ فَقَعَدْتُ عَلَى بَابِهِ فَخَرَجَ فَقَالَ مَا شَأْنُكَ؟ فَقُلْتُ أَطْلُبُ الْعِلْمَ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 132

chapter.englishTitle: The Description of Wudu without Impurity

englishRaw: I heard an-Nazzal bin Sabrah say: I saw ‘Ali ؓ praying Zuhr, then he sat to listen to the peopleʿs needs. When the time for ‘Asr came, a stone vessel of water was brought to him. He took a handful from it and wiped his face, forearms, head and feet. Then he took the leftover water and drank it whilst standing, and he said: Some people dislike this, but I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ do it. And this is the wudoo’ of one who has not broken his wudoo’.
body: I heard an-Nazzal bin Sabrah say: I saw ‘Ali ؓ praying Zuhr, then he sat to listen to the peopleʿs needs. When the time for ‘Asr came, a stone vessel of water was brought to him. He took a handful from it and wiped his face, forearms, head and feet. Then he took the leftover water and drank it whilst standing, and he said: Some people dislike this, but I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ do it. And this is the wudoo’ of one who has not broken his wudoo’.
arabic: رَأَيْتُ عَلِيًّا صَلَّى الظُّهْرَ ثُمَّ قَعَدَ لِحَوَائِجِ النَّاسِ فَلَمَّا حَضَرَتِ الْعَصْرُ أُتِيَ بِتَوْرٍ مِنْ مَاءٍ فَأَخَذَ مِنْهُ كَفًّا فَمَسَحَ وَجْهَهُ وَذِرَاعَيْهِ وَرَأْسَهُ وَرِجْلَيْهِ ثُمَّ أَخَذَ فَضْلَهُ فَشَرِبَ قَائِمًا وَقَالَ إِنَّ نَاسًا يَكْرَهُونَ هَذَا وَقَدْ رَأَيْتُ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ يَفْعَلُهُ وَهَذَا وُضُوءُ مَنْ لَمْ يُحْدِثْ
chain: ʿAmr b. Yazīd al-Baṣrī \u003e Bahz b. Asad \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e ʿAbd al-Malik b. Maysarah \u003e al-Nazzāl b. Sabrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ يَزِيدَ الْبَصْرِيُّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا بَهْزُ بْنُ أَسَدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ عَنْ عَبْدِ الْمَلِكِ بْنِ مَيْسَرَةَ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ النَّزَّالَ بْنَ سَبْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 133

chapter.englishTitle: Wudu for every prayer

englishRaw: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to perform Wudu' for every prayer. One the day of the Conquest (of Makkah), he offered all the prayers with one Wudu'. 'Umar said to him: 'You have done something that you never did before.' He said: 'I did that deliberately, O 'Umar.'"
body: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to perform Wudu' for every prayer. One the day of the Conquest (of Makkah), he offered all the prayers with one Wudu'. 'Umar said to him: 'You have done something that you never did before.' He said: 'I did that deliberately, O 'Umar.'"
arabic: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ يَتَوَضَّأُ لِكُلِّ صَلَاةٍ فَلَمَّا كَانَ يَوْمُ الْفَتْحِ صَلَّى الصَّلَوَاتُ بِوُضُوءٍ وَاحِدٍ فَقَالَ لَهُ عُمَرُ فَعَلْتَ شَيْئًا لَمْ تَكُنْ تَفْعَلُهُ فَقَالَ «عَمْدًا فَعَلْتُهُ يَا عُمَرُ»
chain: ʿUbaydullāh b. Saʿīd \u003e Yaḥyá \u003e Sufyān \u003e ʿAlqamah b. Marthad \u003e Ibn Buraydah from his father
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللهِ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى عَنْ سُفْيَانَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَلْقَمَةُ بْنُ مَرْثَدٍ عَنِ ابْنِ بُرَيْدَةَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 134

chapter.englishTitle: Al-Nadhu

englishRaw: "He would sprinkle his private parts with it." [1] Shaikh Ibn As-Sunni said: "Al-Hakam (one of the narrators) is Ibn Sufyan Ath-Thaqafi. [1] The purpose is to ward off devilish whispers lest the person think any emission has taken place, and thus think that his Wudu' has been invalidated.
body: "He would sprinkle his private parts with it." [1] Shaikh Ibn As-Sunni said: "Al-Hakam (one of the narrators) is Ibn Sufyan Ath-Thaqafi. [1] The purpose is to ward off devilish whispers lest the person think any emission has taken place, and thus think that his Wudu' has been invalidated.
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ «كَانَ إِذَا تَوَضَّأَ أَخَذَ حَفْنَةً مِنْ مَاءٍ فَقَالَ بِهَا هَكَذَا وَوَصَفَ شُعْبَةُ نَضَحَ بِهِ فَرْجَهُ» فَذَكَرْتُهُ لِإِبْرَاهِيمَ فَأَعْجَبَهُ
chain: Ismāʿīl b. Masʿūd \u003e Khālid b. al-Ḥārith \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e Manṣūr \u003e Mujāhid \u003e al-Ḥakam from his father
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ مَسْعُودٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا خَالِدُ بْنُ الْحَارِثِ عَنْ شُعْبَةَ عَنْ مَنْصُورٍ عَنْ مُجَاهِدٍ عَنِ الْحَكَمِ عَنْ أَبِيهِ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 135

chapter.englishTitle: The benefits of ablution

englishRaw: "I saw the Prophet ﷺ in Al-Batha'. Bilal brought out the water left over from his Wudu' and the people rushed toward it and I got some of it. Then a short spear was planted in the ground and he led the people in prayer, while donkeys, dogs and women were passing in front of him."
body: "I saw the Prophet ﷺ in Al-Batha'. Bilal brought out the water left over from his Wudu' and the people rushed toward it and I got some of it. Then a short spear was planted in the ground and he led the people in prayer, while donkeys, dogs and women were passing in front of him."
arabic: شَهِدْتُ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ بِالْبَطْحَاءِ «وَأَخْرَجَ بِلَالٌ فَضْلَ وَضُوئِهِ فَابْتَدَرَهُ النَّاسُ وَرَكَزَ لَهُ الْعَنَزَةَ فَصَلَّى بِالنَّاسِ وَالْحُمُرُ وَالْكِلَابُ وَالْمَرْأَةُ يَمُرُّونَ بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ»
chain: Muḥammad b. Manṣūr \u003e Sufyān \u003e Mālik b. Mighwal \u003e ʿAwn b. Abū Juḥayfah from his father
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مَنْصُورٍ عَنْ سُفْيَانَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مَالِكُ بْنُ مِغْوَلٍ عَنْ عَوْنِ بْنِ أَبِي جُحَيْفَةَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 136

chapter.englishTitle: Command to perform ablution

englishRaw: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Do Wudu' properly.'" [1] [1] Isbighu Al-Wudu'. And this narration supports the claim that some of them used this expression to mean "three times" for each limb, rather than "properly."
body: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Do Wudu' properly.'" [1] [1] Isbighu Al-Wudu'. And this narration supports the claim that some of them used this expression to mean "three times" for each limb, rather than "properly."
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «أَسْبِغُوا الْوُضُوءَ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Jarīr \u003e Manṣūr \u003e Hilāl b. Yasāf \u003e Abū Yaḥyá \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. ʿAmr
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا جَرِيرٌ عَنْ مَنْصُورٍ عَنْ هِلَالِ بْنِ يَسَافٍ عَنْ أَبِي يَحْيَى عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 137

chapter.englishTitle: Command to perform ablution

englishRaw: "We were sitting with 'Abdullah bin 'Abbas and he said: 'By Allah, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not say specifically anything for us above the people, except for three things: He commanded us to do Wudu' properly, [2] not to consume charity, and not to mate donkeys with horses.'" [1] Isbagh Al-Wudu' [2] An Nusbig Al-Wudu'
body: "We were sitting with 'Abdullah bin 'Abbas and he said: 'By Allah, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not say specifically anything for us above the people, except for three things: He commanded us to do Wudu' properly, [2] not to consume charity, and not to mate donkeys with horses.'" [1] Isbagh Al-Wudu' [2] An Nusbig Al-Wudu'
arabic: وَاللهِ «مَا خَصَّنَا رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ بِشَيْءٍ دُونَ النَّاسِ إِلَّا ثَلَاثَةَ أَشْيَاءٍ فَإِنَّهُ أُمِرْنَا أَنْ نُسْبِغَ الْوُضُوءَ وَلَا نَأْكُلُ الصَّدَقَةَ وَلَا نُنْزِيَ الْحُمُرَ عَلَى الْخَيْلِ»
chain: Yaḥyá b. Ḥabīb b. ʿArabī \u003e Ḥammād \u003e Abū Jahḍam \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. ʿUbaydullāh b. ʿAbbās
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ حَبِيبِ بْنِ عَرَبِيٍّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادٌ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو جَهْضَمٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ عُبَيْدِ اللهِ بْنِ عَبَّاسٍ قَالَ كُنَّا جُلُوسًا إِلَى عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ عَبَّاسٍ فَقَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 138

chapter.englishTitle: The virtue in that

englishRaw: "Shall I not tell you of that by means of which Allah erases sins and raises (people) in status? Doing Wudu' properly [1] even when it is inconvenient, taking a lot of steps to the Masjid, and waiting for one Salah after another. That is the Ribat for you, that is the Ribat for you, that is the Ribat for you." [1] Isbagh Al-Wudu'
body: "Shall I not tell you of that by means of which Allah erases sins and raises (people) in status? Doing Wudu' properly [1] even when it is inconvenient, taking a lot of steps to the Masjid, and waiting for one Salah after another. That is the Ribat for you, that is the Ribat for you, that is the Ribat for you." [1] Isbagh Al-Wudu'
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ قَالَ «أَلَا أُخْبِرُكُمْ بِمَا يَمْحُو اللهُ بِهِ الْخَطَايَا وَيَرْفَعُ بِهِ الدَّرَجَاتُ إِسْبَاغُ الْوُضُوءِ عَلَى الْمَكَارِهِ وَكَثْرَةُ الْخُطَا إِلَى الْمَسَاجِدِ وَانْتِظَارُ الصَّلَاةِ بَعْدَ الصَّلَاةِ فَذَلِكُمُ الرِّبَاطُ فَذَلِكُمُ الرِّبَاطُ فَذَلِكُمُ الرِّبَاطُ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Mālik \u003e al-ʿAlāʾ b. ʿAbd al-Raḥman from his father \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ مَالِكٍ عَنِ الْعَلَاءِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 139

chapter.englishTitle: The reward of the one who performs ablution as instructed.

englishRaw: I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saying, "Whoever performs ablution as commanded and prays as commanded, will have all his previous sins forgiven." Is it so, O 'Uqbah? He replied, "Yes."
body: I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saying, "Whoever performs ablution as commanded and prays as commanded, will have all his previous sins forgiven." Is it so, O 'Uqbah? He replied, "Yes."
arabic: سَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ يَقُولُ «مَنْ تَوَضَّأَ كَمَا أُمِرَ وَصَلَّى كَمَا أُمِرَ غُفِرَ لَهُ مَا قَدَّمَ مِنْ عَمَلٍ» أَكَذَاكَ يَا عُقْبَةُ؟ قَالَ نَعَمْ
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e al-Layth \u003e Abū al-Zubayr \u003e Sufyān b. ʿAbd al-Raḥman
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا اللَّيْثُ عَنْ أَبِي الزُّبَيْرِ عَنْ سُفْيَانَ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ عَنْ عَاصِمِ بْنِ سُفْيَانَ الثَّقَفِيُّ أَنَّهُمْ غَزَوْا غَزْوَةَ السَّلَاسِلِ فَفَاتَهُمُ الْغَزْوُ فَرَابَطُوا ثُمَّ رَجَعُوا إِلَى مُعَاوِيَةَ وَعِنْدَهُ أَبُو أَيُّوبَ وَعُقْبَةُ بْنُ عَامِرٍ فَقَالَ عَاصِمٌ يَا أَبَا أَيُّوبَ فَاتَنَا الْغَزْوُ الْعَامَ وَقَدْ أُخْبِرْنَا أَنَّهُ مَنْ صَلَّى فِي الْمَسَاجِدِ الْأَرْبَعَةِ غُفِرَ لَهُ ذَنْبُهُ فَقَالَ يَا ابْنَ أَخِي أَدُلُّكَ عَلَى أَيْسَرَ مِنْ ذَلِكَ إِنِّي

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 140

chapter.englishTitle: The statement after completing ablution

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Whoever performs wudu (ablution) and does it well, then says: 'Ashhadu an la ilaha illallah wa ashhadu anna Muhammadan 'abduhu wa rasuluhu (I bear witness that there is no deity worthy of worship except Allah, and I bear witness that Muhammad is His servant and Messenger),' eight gates of Paradise will be opened for him, and he may enter through any of them he wishes." This hadith is narrated by Rabia bin Sulaiman, who narrated it from Asad bin Musa, who narrated it from Muawiyah bin Salih, from Rabiah bin Yazid, from Abu Idris and Abu Uthman, from Uqbah bin Amir.
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Whoever performs wudu (ablution) and does it well, then says: 'Ashhadu an la ilaha illallah wa ashhadu anna Muhammadan 'abduhu wa rasuluhu (I bear witness that there is no deity worthy of worship except Allah, and I bear witness that Muhammad is His servant and Messenger),' eight gates of Paradise will be opened for him, and he may enter through any of them he wishes." This hadith is narrated by Rabia bin Sulaiman, who narrated it from Asad bin Musa, who narrated it from Muawiyah bin Salih, from Rabiah bin Yazid, from Abu Idris and Abu Uthman, from Uqbah bin Amir.
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ مَنْ تَوَضَّأَ فَأَحْسَنَ الْوُضُوءَ ثُمَّ قَالَ أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ فُتِحَتْ لَهُ ثَمَانِيَةُ أَبْوَابٍ مِنَ الْجَنَّةِ يَدْخُلُ مِنْ أَيِّهَا شَاءَ 141 عَنْ الرَّبِيعِ بْنِ سُلَيْمَانَ عَنْ أَسَدِ بْنِ مُوسَى عَنْ مُعَاوِيَةَ بْنِ صَالِحٍ عَنْ رَبِيعَةَ بْنِ يَزِيدَ عَنْ أَبِي إِدْرِيسَ وَأَبِي عُثْمَانَ عَنْ عُقْبَةَ بْنِ عَامِرٍ بِهِ
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿAlī b. Ḥarb al-Marwazī Yuqāl Lah Turk \u003e Zayd b. Ḥubāb \u003e Muʿāwiyah b. Ṣāliḥ \u003e Rabīʿah b. Yazīd \u003e Abū Idrīs al-Khawlānī And ʾAbī ʿUthmān \u003e ʿUqbah b. ʿĀmir \u003e ʿUmar b. al-Khaṭṭāb
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِيِّ بْنِ حَرْبٍ الْمَرْوَزِيُّ يُقَالُ لَهُ تُرْكٌ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا زَيْدُ بْنُ حُبَابٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ صَالِحٍ عَنْ رَبِيعَةَ بْنِ يَزِيدَ عَنْ أَبِي إِدْرِيسَ الْخَوْلَانِيِّ وَأَبِي عُثْمَانَ عَنْ عُقْبَةَ بْنِ عَامِرٍ عَنْ عُمَرَ بْنِ الْخَطَّابِ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 142

chapter.englishTitle: The Adornment of Ritual Ablution

englishRaw: I was behind Abu Huraira as he was performing ablution for prayer, and he would extend his hands until he reached his armpits. I heard my beloved (Prophet Muhammad) say, "The beautiful garment of a believer extends to where the ablution reaches."
body: I was behind Abu Huraira as he was performing ablution for prayer, and he would extend his hands until he reached his armpits. I heard my beloved (Prophet Muhammad) say, "The beautiful garment of a believer extends to where the ablution reaches."
arabic: كُنْتُ خَلْفَ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ وَهُوَ يَتَوَضَّأُ لِلصَّلَاةِ فَكَانَ يَمُدُّ يَدَيْهِ حَتَّى يَبْلُغَ إِبْطَيْهِ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ خَلِيلِي يَقُولُ «تَبْلُغُ الْحِلْيَةُ مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِ حَيْثُ يَبْلُغُ الْوُضُوءُ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Khalf b. Khalīfah \u003e Abū Mālik al-Ashjaʿī \u003e Abū Ḥāzim
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ خَلْفِ بْنِ خَلِيفَةَ عَنْ أَبِي مَالِكٍ الْأَشْجَعِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي حَازِمٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 143

chapter.englishTitle: The Adornment of Ritual Ablution

englishRaw: "Peace be upon you, abode of believing people. If Allah wills, we shall join you soon. Would that I had seen our brothers." They said: "O Messenger of Allah, are we not your brother?" He said: "You are my Companions. My brothers are those who have not come yet. And I will reach the Hawd before you." They said: "O Messenger of Allah, how will you know those of your Ummah who come after you?" He said: "Don't you think that if a man has a horse with a white blaze and white feet among horses that are solid black, he will recognize his horse?" They said: "Of course." He said: "They will come on the Day of Resurrection with glittering white faces and glittering white hands and feet because of Wudu', and I will reach the Hawd before them."
body: "Peace be upon you, abode of believing people. If Allah wills, we shall join you soon. Would that I had seen our brothers." They said: "O Messenger of Allah, are we not your brother?" He said: "You are my Companions. My brothers are those who have not come yet. And I will reach the Hawd before you." They said: "O Messenger of Allah, how will you know those of your Ummah who come after you?" He said: "Don't you think that if a man has a horse with a white blaze and white feet among horses that are solid black, he will recognize his horse?" They said: "Of course." He said: "They will come on the Day of Resurrection with glittering white faces and glittering white hands and feet because of Wudu', and I will reach the Hawd before them."
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ خَرَجَ إِلَى الْمَقْبُرَةِ فَقَالَ «السَّلَامُ عَلَيْكُمْ دَارَ قَوْمٍ مُؤْمِنِينَ وَإِنَّا إِنْ شَاءَ اللهُ بِكُمْ لَاحِقُونَ وَدِدْتُ أَنِّي قَدْ رَأَيْتُ إِخْوَانَنَا» قَالُوا يَا رَسُولَ اللهِ أَلَسْنَا بِإِخْوَانِكَ؟ قَالَ «بَلْ أَنْتُمْ أَصْحَابِي وَإِخْوَانُنَا الَّذِي لَمْ يَأْتُوا بَعْدُ وَأَنَا فَرَطُهُمْ عَلَى الْحَوْضِ» قَالُوا يَا رَسُولَ اللهِ كَيْفَ تَعْرِفُ مَنْ يَأْتِي بَعْدَكَ مِنْ أُمَّتِكَ؟ قَالَ «أَرَأَيْتَ لَوْ كَانَ لِرَجُلٍ خَيْلٌ غُرٌّ مُحَجَّلَةٌ فِي خَيْلٍ دُهْمٍ بُهْمٍ أَلَا يُعْرَفُ خَيْلَهُ؟» قَالُوا بَلَى قَالَ «فَإِنَّهُمْ يَأْتُونَ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ غُرًّا مُحَجَّلِينَ مِنْ الْوُضُوءِ وَأنا فَرَطُهُمْ عَلَى الْحَوْضِ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Mālik \u003e al-ʿAlāʾ b. ʿAbd al-Raḥman from his father \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ مَالِكٍ عَنِ الْعَلَاءِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 144

chapter.englishTitle: The command of performing ablution after defecation and urinatio...

englishRaw: "I asked Safwan bin 'Assal about wiping over the Khuffs, and he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to tell us, when we were travelling, to wipe over our Khuffs and not take them off for three nights in the event of defecating, urinating or sleeping; only in the case of Janabah.'"
body: "I asked Safwan bin 'Assal about wiping over the Khuffs, and he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to tell us, when we were travelling, to wipe over our Khuffs and not take them off for three nights in the event of defecating, urinating or sleeping; only in the case of Janabah.'"
arabic: «كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ» يَأْمُرُنَا إِذَا كُنَّا مُسَافِرِينَ أَنْ نَمْسَحَ عَلَى خِفَافِنَا وَلَا نَنْزِعُهَا ثَلَاثَةَ أَيَّامٍ مِنْ غَائِطٍ وَبَوْلٍ وَنَوْمٍ إِلَّا مِنْ جَنَابَةٍ اللَّفْظُ لِأَحْمَدَ
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Sufyān \u003e ʿĀṣim \u003e Aḥmad b. Sulaymān \u003e Yaḥyá b. Ādam \u003e Sufyān al-Thawrī And Mālik b. Mighwal Wazuhayr Waʾabū Bakr b. ʿAyyāsh And Sufyān b. ʿUyaynah \u003e ʿĀṣim \u003e Zir \u003e Saʾalt Ṣafwān b. ʿAssāl \u003e al-Masḥ \u003e al-Khuffayn
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ عَنْ عَاصِمٍ وَأَخْبَرَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ آدَمَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ الثَّوْرِيُّ وَمَالِكُ بْنُ مِغْوَلٍ وَزُهَيْرٌ وَأَبُو بَكْرِ بْنِ عَيَّاشٍ وَسُفْيَانُ بْنُ عُيَيْنَةَ عَنْ عَاصِمٍ عَنْ زِرٍّ قَالَ سَأَلْتُ صَفْوَانَ بْنَ عَسَّالٍ عَنِ الْمَسْحِ عَلَى الْخُفَّيْنِ؟ فَقَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 145

chapter.englishTitle: The command of performing ablution after defecation and urinatio...

englishRaw: "I came to a man called Safwan bin 'Assal and sat at his door. He came out and said: 'What do you want?' I said: 'I am seeking knowledge.' He said: 'The angels lower their wings for the seeker of knowledge out of pleasure at what he is seeking.' He said: 'What do you want to know about?' I said: 'About the Khuffs.' He said: 'When we were with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ on a journey, he told us not to take them off for three days except in the case of Janabah, but not in the case of defecation, urinating or sleep.'"
body: "I came to a man called Safwan bin 'Assal and sat at his door. He came out and said: 'What do you want?' I said: 'I am seeking knowledge.' He said: 'The angels lower their wings for the seeker of knowledge out of pleasure at what he is seeking.' He said: 'What do you want to know about?' I said: 'About the Khuffs.' He said: 'When we were with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ on a journey, he told us not to take them off for three days except in the case of Janabah, but not in the case of defecation, urinating or sleep.'"
arabic: إِنَّ الْمَلَائِكَةَ تَضَعُ أَجْنِحَتَهَا لِطَالِبِ الْعِلْمِ رِضًى بِمَا يَطْلُبُ قَالَ عَنْ أَيِّ شَيْءٍ تَسْأَلُ؟ قُلْتُ عَنِ الْخُفَّيْنِ قَالَ كُنَّا إِذَا كُنَّا مَعَ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ فِي سَفَرٍ «أَمَرَنَا أَنْ لَا نَنْزِعَهُ ثَلَاثًا إِلَّا مِنْ جَنَابَةٍ وَلَكِنْ مِنْ غَائِطٍ وَبَوْلٍ وَنَوْمٍ»
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿAbd al-Aʿlá \u003e Khālid \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e ʿĀṣim \u003e Zir b. Ḥubaysh
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْأَعْلَى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا خَالِدٌ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ عَنْ عَاصِمٍ أَنَّهُ سَمِعَ زِرِّ بْنِ حُبَيْشٍ يُحَدِّثُ قَالَ أَتَيْتُ رَجُلًا يُدْعَى صَفْوَانُ بْنُ عَسَّالٍ فَقَعَدْتُ عَلَى بَابِهِ فَخَرَجَ فَقَالَ مَا شَأْنُكَ؟ قُلْتُ أَطْلُبُ الْعِلْمَ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 146

chapter.englishTitle: The command to perform ablution from impurity.

englishRaw: "I was a man who had a lot of prostatic discharge, and the daughter of the Prophet ﷺ was married to me, so I felt shy to ask him (about that). I said to a man who was sitting beside me: 'Ask him,' so he asked him and he said: 'Perform Wudu' for that.'"
body: "I was a man who had a lot of prostatic discharge, and the daughter of the Prophet ﷺ was married to me, so I felt shy to ask him (about that). I said to a man who was sitting beside me: 'Ask him,' so he asked him and he said: 'Perform Wudu' for that.'"
arabic: قَالَ عَلِيٌّ كُنْتُ رَجُلًا مَذَّاءً وَكَانَتْ بِنْتُ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ عِنْدِي فَاسْتَحْيَيْتُ أَنْ أَسْأَلَهُ فَقُلْتُ لِرَجُلٍ جَالِسٍ إِلَى جَنْبِي سَلْهُ فَسَأَلَهُ فَقَالَ «فِيهِ الْوُضُوءُ»
chain: Hannād b. al-Sarī \u003e Abū Bakr b. ʿAyyāsh \u003e Abū Ḥuṣayn \u003e Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥman
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا هَنَّادُ بْنُ السَّرِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي بَكْرِ بْنِ عَيَّاشٍ عَنْ أَبِي حُصَيْنٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 147

chapter.englishTitle: The command to perform ablution from impurity.

englishRaw: "I said to Al-Miqdad: 'If a man is intimate with his wife and excretes prostatic fluid but does not have intercourse - ask the Prophet ﷺ about that, for I am too shy to ask him about it since his daughter is married to me.' So he asked him, and he said: 'Let him wash his male member and perform Wudu' as for Salah.'"
body: "I said to Al-Miqdad: 'If a man is intimate with his wife and excretes prostatic fluid but does not have intercourse - ask the Prophet ﷺ about that, for I am too shy to ask him about it since his daughter is married to me.' So he asked him, and he said: 'Let him wash his male member and perform Wudu' as for Salah.'"
arabic: قُلْتُ لِلْمِقْدَادِ إِذَا دَنَا الرَّجُلُ مِنْ أَهْلِهِ فَأَمْذَى وَلَمْ يُجَامِعْ فَسَلْ لِيَ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ عَنْ ذَلِكَ فَإِنِّي أَسْتَحْيِي أَنْ أَسْأَلَهُ عَنْ ذَلِكَ وَابْنَتُهُ تَحْتِي فَسَأَلَهُ فَقَالَ «يَغْسِلُ مَذَاكِيرَهُ وَيَتَوَضَّأُ وُضُوءَهُ لِلصَّلَاةِ»
chain: Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Jarīr \u003e Hishām b. ʿUrwah from his father \u003e ʿAlī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا جَرِيرٌ عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَلِيٍّ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 148

chapter.englishTitle: The command to perform ablution from impurity.

englishRaw: I felt shy of asking about prostatic fluid from the Apostle ﷺ because of Fatimah. I, therefore, asked al-Miqdad (to ask on my behalf) and he asked. He (the Holy Prophet) said: Ablution is obligatory in such a case.
body: I felt shy of asking about prostatic fluid from the Apostle ﷺ because of Fatimah. I, therefore, asked al-Miqdad (to ask on my behalf) and he asked. He (the Holy Prophet) said: Ablution is obligatory in such a case.
arabic: أَنْ أَسْأَلَ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ عَنِ الْمَذْيِ مِنْ أَجْلِ فَاطِمَةَ فَأَمَرْتُ الْمِقْدَادَ فَسَأَلَهُ؟ فَقَالَ «فِيهِ الْوُضُوءُ»
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿAbd al-Aʿlá \u003e Khālid / Ibn al-Ḥārith \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e Sulaymān \u003e Mundhir \u003e Muḥammad b. ʿAlī \u003e ʿAlī \u003e Āstaḥyayt
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْأَعْلَى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا خَالِدٌ يَعْنِي ابْنَ الْحَارِثِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي سُلَيْمَانُ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ مُنْذِرًا عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ عَنْ عَلِيٍّ قَالَ §اسْتَحْيَيْتُ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 149

chapter.englishTitle: The command to perform ablution from impurity.

englishRaw: "I was a man who had a lot of prostatic discharge, so I told 'Ammar bin Yasir to ask the Messenger of Allah ﷺ (about it) because his daughter was married to me. He said: 'Wudu' is sufficient for that.'"
body: "I was a man who had a lot of prostatic discharge, so I told 'Ammar bin Yasir to ask the Messenger of Allah ﷺ (about it) because his daughter was married to me. He said: 'Wudu' is sufficient for that.'"
arabic: كُنْتُ رَجُلًا مَذَّاءً فَأَمَرْتُ عَمَّارَ بْنَ يَاسِرٍ يَسْأَلُ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ مِنْ أَجْلِ ابْنَتِهِ عِنْدِي فَقَالَ «يَكْفِي مِنْ ذَلِكَ الْوُضُوءُ»
chain: Qutaybah \u003e Sufyān \u003e ʿAmr \u003e ʿAṭāʾ \u003e ʿĀʾish b. Anas \u003e ʿAlī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ عَنْ عَمْرٍو عَنْ عَطَاءِ عَنْ عَائِشِ بْنِ أَنَسٍ أَنَّ عَلِيًّا قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 150

chapter.englishTitle: The command to perform ablution from impurity.

englishRaw: 'Let him wash his male member and perform Wudu'.'"
body: 'Let him wash his male member and perform Wudu'.'"
arabic: أَنْ يَسْأَلَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ عَنِ الْمَذْيِ فَقَالَ «يَغْسِلُ مَذَاكِيرَهُ وَيَتَوَضَّأُ»
chain: ʿUthmān b. ʿAbdullāh \u003e Umayyah \u003e Yazīd b. Zurayʿ \u003e Rawḥ / Ibn al-Qāsim \u003e Ibn Abū Najīḥ \u003e ʿAṭāʾ \u003e Iyās b. Khalīfah \u003e Rāfiʿ b. Khadīj \u003e ʿAlī Amr ʿAmmār
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عُثْمَانُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أُمَيَّةُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا يَزِيدُ بْنُ زُرَيْعٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا رَوْحٌ وَهُوَ ابْنُ الْقَاسِمِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي نَجِيحٍ عَنْ عَطَاءِ عَنْ إِيَاسِ بْنِ خَلِيفَةَ عَنْ رَافِعِ بْنِ خَدِيجٍ أَنَّ عَلِيًّا أَمْرَ عَمَّارًا

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 151
englishRaw: "A complaint was made to the Prophet about a man who sensed something (some doubt about his ablution) during prayer. He said: 'No (he does not have to perform ablution) unless he notices a smell or hears a sound.'"
body: "A complaint was made to the Prophet about a man who sensed something (some doubt about his ablution) during prayer. He said: 'No (he does not have to perform ablution) unless he notices a smell or hears a sound.'"
arabic: شُكِيَ إِلَى النَّبِيِّ ﷺ الرَّجُلُ يَجِدُ الشَّيْءَ فِي الصَّلَاةِ فَقَالَ «لَا يَنْصَرِفْ حَتَّى يَجِدَ رِيحًا أَوْ يُسْمَعَ صَوْتًا»
chain: Muḥammad b. Manṣūr \u003e Sufyān \u003e al-Zuhrī \u003e Saʿīd And ʿAbbād b. Tamīm \u003e ʿAmmih
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مَنْصُورٍ عَنْ سُفْيَانَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا الزُّهْرِيُّ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي سَعِيدٌ وَعَبَّادُ بْنُ تَمِيمٍ عَنْ عَمِّهِ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 152

chapter.englishTitle: The command for performing wudu for the lying down sleeper

englishRaw: "When any one of you wakes from sleep, let him not put his hand into the vessel until he has washed it three times, because he does not know where his hand spent the night."
body: "When any one of you wakes from sleep, let him not put his hand into the vessel until he has washed it three times, because he does not know where his hand spent the night."
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ قَالَ إِذَا اسْتَيْقَظَ أَحَدُكُمْ مِنْ مَنَامِهِ فَلَا يُدْخِلْ يَدَهُ فِي الْإِنَاءِ حَتَّى يُفْرِغَ عَلَيْهَا ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَدْرِي أَيْنَ بَاتَتْ يَدَهُ
chain: Ismāʿīl b. Masʿūd \u003e Yazīd / Ibn Zurayʿ \u003e Maʿmar \u003e al-Zuhrī \u003e Abū Salamah \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ مَسْعُودٍ عَنْ يَزِيدَ وَهُوَ ابْنُ زُرَيْعٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي مَعْمَرٌ عَنِ الزُّهْرِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي سَلَمَةَ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 153

chapter.englishTitle: The drowsiness

englishRaw: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'If a man feels drowsy when he is praying, let him stop, lest he supplicate against himself without realizing.'"
body: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'If a man feels drowsy when he is praying, let him stop, lest he supplicate against himself without realizing.'"
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «إِذَا نَعَسَ الرَّجُلُ وَهُوَ يُصَلِّي فَلْيَنْصَرِفْ لَعَلَّهُ يَدْعُو عَلَى نَفْسِهِ وَهُوَ لَا يَدْرِي»
chain: Bishr b. Hilāl \u003e ʿAbd al-Wārith \u003e Ayyūb \u003e Hishām b. ʿUrwah from his father \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا بِشْرُ بْنُ هِلَالٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الْوَارِثِ عَنْ أَيُّوبَ عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 154

chapter.englishTitle: The drowsiness

englishRaw: "If anyone of you feels drowsy during his Salah, let him go and take a nap."
body: "If anyone of you feels drowsy during his Salah, let him go and take a nap."
arabic: عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ قَالَ «إِذَا نَعِسَ أَحَدُكُمْ فِي صَلَاتِهِ فَلْيَنْصِرِفْ فَلْيَنَمْ»
chain: Yaʿqūb b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Muḥammad b. ʿAbd al-Raḥman al-Ṭafāwī \u003e Ayyūb \u003e Abū Qilābah \u003e Anas
chainArabic: عَنْ يَعْقُوبَ بْنِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ الطَّفَاوِيِّ عَنْ أَيُّوبَ عَنْ أَبِي قِلَابَةَ عَنْ أَنَسٍ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 155

chapter.englishTitle: Leaving Wudu from the Qibla.

englishRaw: "There is nothing for this chapter which is better than this hadith, even though it is Mursal. And Al-A'mash reported this Hadith from Habib bin Abi Thabit, from 'Urwah, from 'Aishah. Yahya Al-Qattan said: "This is the Hadith of Habib from 'Urwah, from 'Aishah. And the Hadith of Habib from 'Urwah, from 'Aishah: "She prays even if blood drips on the mat" is nothing.
body: "There is nothing for this chapter which is better than this hadith, even though it is Mursal. And Al-A'mash reported this Hadith from Habib bin Abi Thabit, from 'Urwah, from 'Aishah. Yahya Al-Qattan said: "This is the Hadith of Habib from 'Urwah, from 'Aishah. And the Hadith of Habib from 'Urwah, from 'Aishah: "She prays even if blood drips on the mat" is nothing.
arabic: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ كَانَ «يُقَبِّلُ بَعْضَ أَزْوَاجِهِ ثُمَّ يُصَلِّي وَلَا يَتَوَضَّأُ» قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ وَقَدْ رُوِيَ هَذَا الْحَدِيثُ عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنْ حَبِيبِ بْنِ أَبِي ثَابِتٍ عَنْ عُرْوَةَ وَقَالَ يَحْيَى الْقَطَّانُ حَدِيثُ حَبِيبٍ عَنْ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ هَذَا وَحَدِيثُ حَبِيبٍ عَنْ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ تُصَلِّي وَإِنْ قَطَّرَ الدَّمُ عَلَى الْحَصِيرِ قَطْرًا شِبْهُ لَا شَيْءٍ
chain: Muḥammad b. al-Muthanná \u003e Yaḥyá \u003e Sufyān \u003e Abū Rawq \u003e Ibrāhīm al-Taymī \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى عَنْ يَحْيَى عَنْ سُفْيَانَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو رَوْقٍ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ التَّيْمِيِّ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 156

chapter.arabicTitle: تَرْكُ الْوُضُوءِ مِنْ مَسِّ الرَّجُلِ امْرَأَتَهُ لِغَيْرِ شَهْوَةٍ
chapter.englishTitle: Leaving ablution from touching one's wife without desire

englishRaw: I was sleeping in front of the Mcsseinger ef Allah ﷺ with my legs between him and the Qibla. When he prostrated himself he pinched me and I drew up my legs, and when be stood up, I stretched them out. She said: At that time there were no lamps in the houses.
body: I was sleeping in front of the Mcsseinger ef Allah ﷺ with my legs between him and the Qibla. When he prostrated himself he pinched me and I drew up my legs, and when be stood up, I stretched them out. She said: At that time there were no lamps in the houses.
arabic: «كُنْتُ أَنَامُ بَيْنَ يَدَيْ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ وَرِجْلَايَ فِي قِبْلَتِهِ فَإِذَا سَجَدَ غَمَزَنِي فَقَبَضْتُ رِجْلَيَّ فَإِذَا قَامَ بَسَطْتُهُمَا وَالْبُيُوتُ يَوْمَئِذٍ لَيْسَ لَهَا مَصَابِيحُ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Mālik \u003e Abū al-Naḍr \u003e Abū Salamah \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ مَالِكٍ عَنْ أَبِي النَّضْرِ عَنْ أَبِي سَلَمَةَ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 157

chapter.arabicTitle: تَرْكُ الْوُضُوءِ مِنْ مَسِّ الرَّجُلِ امْرَأَتَهُ لِغَيْرِ شَهْوَةٍ
chapter.englishTitle: Leaving ablution from touching one's wife without desire

englishRaw: "I remember lying in front of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was praying. When he wanted to prostrate he would nudge my foot and I would draw it up (out of the way) until he had finished prostrating."
body: "I remember lying in front of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was praying. When he wanted to prostrate he would nudge my foot and I would draw it up (out of the way) until he had finished prostrating."
arabic: لَقَدْ رَأَيْتُمُونِي وَأَنَا مُعْتَرِضَةً عَلَى فِرَاشِي بَيْنَ يَدَيْ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ وَرَسُولُ اللهِ يُصَلِّي فَإِذَا أَرَادَ أَنْ يَسْجُدَ غَمَزَ رِجْلِي فَضَمَمْتُهَا إِلَيَّ ثُمَّ يَسْجُدُ
chain: Yaʿqūb b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Yaḥyá \u003e ʿUbaydullāh \u003e al-Qāsim \u003e ʿĀʾishah \u003e Laqad Raʾaytumūnī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا يَعْقُوبُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى عَنْ عُبَيْدِ اللهِ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ الْقَاسِمَ يُحَدِّثُ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 158

chapter.arabicTitle: تَرْكُ الْوُضُوءِ مِنْ مَسِّ الرَّجُلِ امْرَأَتَهُ لِغَيْرِ شَهْوَةٍ
chapter.englishTitle: Leaving ablution from touching one's wife without desire

englishRaw: "I noticed the Prophet ﷺ was not there one night, so I started looking for him with my hand. My hand touched his feet and they were held upright, and he was prostrating and saying: 'I seek refuge in Your pleasure from Your anger, in Your forgiveness from Your punishment, and I seek refuge in You from You. I cannot praise You enough, You are as You have praised yourself.'"
body: "I noticed the Prophet ﷺ was not there one night, so I started looking for him with my hand. My hand touched his feet and they were held upright, and he was prostrating and saying: 'I seek refuge in Your pleasure from Your anger, in Your forgiveness from Your punishment, and I seek refuge in You from You. I cannot praise You enough, You are as You have praised yourself.'"
arabic: فَقَدْتُ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ ذَاتَ لَيْلَةٍ فَجَعَلْتُ أَطْلُبُهُ بِيَدِي فَوَقَعَتْ يَدِي عَلَى قَدَمَيْهِ وَهُمَا مَنْصُوبَتَانِ وَهُوَ سَاجِدٌ يَقُولُ «أَعُوذُ بِرِضَاكَ مِنْ سَخَطِكَ وَبِمُعَافَاتِكَ مِنْ عُقُوبَتِكَ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْكَ لَا أُحْصِي ثَنَاءً عَلَيْكَ أَنْتَ كَمَا أَثْنَيْتَ عَلَى نَفْسِكَ»
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿAbdullāh b. al-Mubārak And Nuṣayr b. al-Faraj \u003e Abū Usāmah \u003e ʿUbaydullāh b. ʿUmar \u003e Muḥammad b. Yaḥyá b. Ḥabbān \u003e al-Aʿraj \u003e Abū Hurayrah \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ الْمُبَارَكِ وَنُصَيْرُ بْنُ الْفَرَجِ وَاللَّفْظُ لَهُ قَالَا حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو أُسَامَةَ عَنْ عُبَيْدِ اللهِ بْنِ عُمَرَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ يَحْيَى بْنِ حَبَّانَ عَنِ الْأَعْرَجِ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 159

chapter.arabicTitle: الْأَمْرُ بِالْوَضُوءِ مِنْ مَسِّ الرَّجُلِ ذَكَرَهُ
chapter.englishTitle: Ordering a man to perform ablution when touching his penis

englishRaw: "The Messenger of Allah said: 'If anyone of you touches his penis, let him perform ablution.'"
body: "The Messenger of Allah said: 'If anyone of you touches his penis, let him perform ablution.'"
arabic: أَنَّهَا سَمِعَتْ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ يَقُولُ «إِذَا مَسَّ أَحَدُكُمْ ذَكَرَهُ فَلْيَتَوَضَّأْ»
chain: Hārūn b. ʿAbdullāh \u003e Maʿn \u003e Mālik \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Abū Bakr \u003e ʿUrwah b. al-Zubayr
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا هَارُونُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مَعْنٌ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مَالِكٌ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ أَبِي بَكْرٍ أَنَّهُ سَمِعَ عُرْوَةَ بْنَ الزُّبَيْرِ يَقُولُ دَخَلْتُ عَلَى مَرْوَانَ بْنِ الْحَكَمِ فَذَكَرْنَا مَا يَكُونُ مِنْهُ الْوُضُوءُ فَقَالَ مَرْوَانُ مِنْ مَسِّ الذَكَرِ فَقَالَ عُرْوَةُ مَا عَلِمْتُ ذَلِكَ فَقَالَ مَرْوَانُ أَخْبَرَتْنِي بُسْرَةُ بِنْتُ صَفْوَانَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 160

chapter.arabicTitle: الرُّخْصَةُ فِي تَرْكِ الْوُضُوءِ مِنْ مَسِّ الذَّكَرِ
chapter.englishTitle: The license to leave ablution from touching the male organ.

englishRaw: "We went out as a delegation and when we arrived with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ he accepted our oath of allegiance and we prayed with him. When he had finished the prayer, a man who looked like a Bedouin came to him and said: 'O Messenger of Allah, what do you think about a man who touched his penis during the Salah?' He said: 'It is just a part of you,' or 'a piece of you.'"
body: "We went out as a delegation and when we arrived with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ he accepted our oath of allegiance and we prayed with him. When he had finished the prayer, a man who looked like a Bedouin came to him and said: 'O Messenger of Allah, what do you think about a man who touched his penis during the Salah?' He said: 'It is just a part of you,' or 'a piece of you.'"
arabic: خَرَجْنَا وَفْدًا حَتَّى قَدِمْنَا عَلَى رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ فَبَايَعْنَاهُ وَصَلَّيْنَا مَعَهُ فَلَمَّا قَضَى الصَّلَاةَ جَاءَ رَجُلٌ كَأَنَّهُ بَدَوِيٌّ فَقَالَ يَا نَبِيَّ اللهِ مَا تَرَى فِي رَجُلٍ مَسَّ ذَكَرَهُ فِي الصَّلَاةِ؟ قَالَ «وَهَلْ هُوَ إِلَّا مُضْغَةٌ مِنْكَ أَوْ بِضْعَةٌ مِنْكَ؟»
chain: Hannād b. al-Sarī \u003e Mulāzim \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Badr \u003e Qays b. Ṭalq \u003e Abīh Ṭalq b. ʿAlī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا هَنَّادُ بْنُ السَّرِيِّ عَنْ مُلَازِمٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ بَدْرٍ عَنْ قَيْسِ بْنِ طَلْقٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ طَلْقِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 161

chapter.arabicTitle: الِاقْتِصَارُ عَلَى غَسْلِ الذِّرَاعَيْنِ فِي الْوُضُوءِ بَعْدَ غَسْلِ الْوَجْهِ دُونَ الْيَدَيْنِ وَذِكْرُ اخْتِلَافِ النَّاقِلِينَ لِلْخَبَرِ فِي ذ...
chapter.englishTitle: Restricting to washing the arms in ablution after washing the fa...

englishRaw: We prayed Fajr prayer with Ali, and when he finished his prayer, he stood up and we stood up with him. He walked until he reached the spacious area and sat down, leaning his back against the wall. He lifted his head and said, "O Kanbar, bring me the container and the pitcher." Kanbar came and Ali said to him, "Put it down." Kanbar placed the pitcher and Ali said, "Pour." Kanbar poured water on his hands and he washed them three times. Then Ali said, "Put it down." Kanbar put down the container and Ali inserted his right hand and took a handful of water, rinsed his mouth three times, and sniffed water into his nostrils three times. Then he inserted his right hand again and washed his face three times. After that, he inserted his right hand and washed his right arm three times, and then he inserted it again and washed his left arm three times. Then he inserted his right hand and spread his fingers in the water, then raised it and wiped his left hand with it, just as you would wipe your hands with oil. Then he wiped his head and ears with his hands and washed his feet three times. Then he inserted his right hand and took a handful of water, drank it, and then turned to us and said, "This is the wudhu' (ablution) of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ , and I wanted to show it to you."
body: We prayed Fajr prayer with Ali, and when he finished his prayer, he stood up and we stood up with him. He walked until he reached the spacious area and sat down, leaning his back against the wall. He lifted his head and said, "O Kanbar, bring me the container and the pitcher." Kanbar came and Ali said to him, "Put it down." Kanbar placed the pitcher and Ali said, "Pour." Kanbar poured water on his hands and he washed them three times. Then Ali said, "Put it down." Kanbar put down the container and Ali inserted his right hand and took a handful of water, rinsed his mouth three times, and sniffed water into his nostrils three times. Then he inserted his right hand again and washed his face three times. After that, he inserted his right hand and washed his right arm three times, and then he inserted it again and washed his left arm three times. Then he inserted his right hand and spread his fingers in the water, then raised it and wiped his left hand with it, just as you would wipe your hands with oil. Then he wiped his head and ears with his hands and washed his feet three times. Then he inserted his right hand and took a handful of water, drank it, and then turned to us and said, "This is the wudhu' (ablution) of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ , and I wanted to show it to you."
arabic: صَلَّيْنَا مَعَ عَلِيٍّ الْفَجْرَ فَلَمَّا سَلَّمَ قَامَ وَقُمْنَا مَعَهُ فَجَاءَ يَمْشِي حَتَّى انْتَهَى إِلَى الرَّحْبَةِ فَجَلَسَ وَأَسْنَدَ ظَهْرَهُ إِلَى الْحَائِطِ فَرَفَعَ رَأْسَهُ فَقَالَ يَا قَنْبَرُ ائْتِنِي بِالرَّكْوَةِ وَالطَّسْتِ فَجَاءَ قَنْبَرٌ فَقَالَ لَهُ ضَعْ فَوَضَعَ الطَّسْتَ ثُمَّ قَالَ لَهُ صُبَّ فَصَبَّ عَلَيْهِ فَغَسَلَ كَفَّيْهِ ثَلَاثًا ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ قَالَ لَهُ ضَعْ فَوَضَعَ الرَّكْوَةِ فَأَدْخَلَ يَدَهُ الْيُمْنَى فَأَخَذَ مِلْءَ كَفِّهِ مَاءً فَمَضْمَضَ ثَلَاثًا وَاسْتَنْشَقَ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ أَدْخَلَ كَفَّهُ فَغَسَلَ وَجْهَهُ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ أَدْخَلَ كَفَّهُ الْيُمْنَى فَغَسَلَ ذِرَاعَهُ الْأَيْمَنَ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ أَدْخَلَهَا فَغَسَلَ ذِرَاعَهُ الْأَيْسَرَ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ أَدْخَلَ كَفَّهُ الْيُمْنَى فَبَسَطَ أَصَابِعَهُ فِي الْمَاءِ بَسْطًا ثُمَّ رَفَعَهَا فَمَسَحَهَا عَلَى كَفِّهِ الْيُسْرَى كَمَسْحِكَ بِيَدَيْكَ بِالدُّهْنِ ثُمَّ مَسَحَ بِهِمَا رَأْسَهُ وَأُذُنَيْهِ وَغَسَلَ رِجْلَيْهِ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ أَدْخَلَ كَفَّهُ الْيُمْنَى فَأَخَذَ مِلْأَهَا مَاءً فَشَرِبَهَا ثُمَّ الْتَفَتَ إِلَيْنَا فَقَالَ هَذَا وُضُوءُ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ أَحْبَبْتُ أَنْ أُرِيَكُمُوهُ
chain: Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Mushir b. ʿAbd al-Malik b. Salʿ from my father \u003e ʿAbd Khayr
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا مُسْهِرُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْمَلِكِ بْنُ سَلْعٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي عَنْ عَبْدِ خَيْرٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 162

chapter.englishTitle: The number of washing feet

englishRaw: I saw 'Ali performing Wudu'. He washed his hands three times, and rinsed his mouth three times and his nose three times, and he washed his face three times and each forearm three times. Then he wiped his head and washed each foot three times. Then he said: 'This is the Wudu' of the Prophet ﷺ.'"
body: I saw 'Ali performing Wudu'. He washed his hands three times, and rinsed his mouth three times and his nose three times, and he washed his face three times and each forearm three times. Then he wiped his head and washed each foot three times. Then he said: 'This is the Wudu' of the Prophet ﷺ.'"
arabic: رَأَيْتُ عَلِيًّا تَوَضَّأَ فَغَسَلَ كَفَّيْهِ ثَلَاثًا وَتَمَضْمَضَ ثَلَاثًا وَاسْتَنْشَقَ ثَلَاثًا وَغَسَلَ وَجْهَهُ ثَلَاثًا وَذِرَاعَيْهِ ثَلَاثًا ثَلَاثًا وَمَسَحَ بِرَأْسِهِ وَغَسَلَ رِجْلَيْهِ ثَلَاثًا ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ قَالَ هَذَا وُضُوءُ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ
chain: Muḥammad b. Ādam \u003e Ibn Abū Zāʾidah \u003e Abū And Ghayruh \u003e Abū Isḥāq \u003e Abū Ḥayyah al-Wādiʿī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ آدَمَ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي زَائِدَةَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي وَغَيْرُهُ عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ عَنْ أَبِي حَيَّةَ الْوَادِعِيِّ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 163

chapter.englishTitle: The number of washing feet

englishRaw: "I do not know whether he brought his hands back or not. And he washed each foot three times, then he said: 'Whoever would like to see how the Messenger of Allah ﷺ purified himself, this is how he purified himself.'" Abu 'Abdur-Rahman said: "This is a mistake. What is correct is Khalid bin 'Alqamah, not Malik bin 'Urfutah."
body: "I do not know whether he brought his hands back or not. And he washed each foot three times, then he said: 'Whoever would like to see how the Messenger of Allah ﷺ purified himself, this is how he purified himself.'" Abu 'Abdur-Rahman said: "This is a mistake. What is correct is Khalid bin 'Alqamah, not Malik bin 'Urfutah."
arabic: أَنَّهُ أُتِيَ بِكُرْسِيٍّ فَقَعَدَ عَلَيْهِ ثُمَّ دَعَا بِتَوْرٍ فِيهِ مَاءٌ فَكَفَأَ عَلَى يَدَيْهِ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ تَمَضْمَضَ وَاسْتَنْشَقَ بِكَفٍّ وَاحِدَةٍ ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ وَغَسَلَ وَجْهَهُ ثَلَاثًا وَغَسَلَ ذِرَاعَيْهِ ثَلَاثًا ثَلَاثًا وَأَخَذَ مِنَ الْمَاءِ فَمَسَحَ بِرَأْسِهِ فَأَشَارَ شُعْبَةُ مِنْ نَاصِيَتِهِ إِلَى مُؤَخَّرِ رَأْسِهِ ثُمَّ قَالَ لَا أَدْرِي أَرَدَّهُمَا أَمْ لَا وَغَسَلَ رِجْلَيْهِ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ قَالَ مَنْ سَرَّهُ أَنْ يَنْظُرَ إِلَى طُهُورِ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ فَهَذَا طُهُورُهُ خَالَفَهُ يَزِيدُ بْنُ زُرَيْعٍ فَرَوَاهُ عَنْ شُعْبَةَ
chain: Sūwayd b. Naṣr \u003e ʿAbdullāh \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e Mālik b. ʿUrfuṭah \u003e ʿAbd Khayr \u003e ʿAlī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا سُوَيْدُ بْنُ نَصْرٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ عَنْ شُعْبَةَ عَنْ مَالِكِ بْنِ عُرْفُطَةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ خَيْرٍ عَنْ عَلِيٍّ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 164

chapter.englishTitle: The number of washing feet

englishRaw: "I saw 'Ali call for a chair and he sat down, then he called for water in a vessel and washed his hands three times, then he rinsed his mouth and nose with one hand, three times. Then he washed his face three times, and his hands three times. Then he dipped his hand in the vessel and wiped his head, then he washed each foot three times. Then he said: 'Whoever would like to see how the Messenger of Allah ﷺ performed Wudu', this is his Wudu'.'"
body: "I saw 'Ali call for a chair and he sat down, then he called for water in a vessel and washed his hands three times, then he rinsed his mouth and nose with one hand, three times. Then he washed his face three times, and his hands three times. Then he dipped his hand in the vessel and wiped his head, then he washed each foot three times. Then he said: 'Whoever would like to see how the Messenger of Allah ﷺ performed Wudu', this is his Wudu'.'"
arabic: شَهِدْتُ عَلِيًّا دَعَا بِكُرْسِيٍّ فَقَعَدَ عَلَيْهِ ثُمَّ دَعَا بِمَاءٍ فِي تَوْرٍ فَغَسَلَ يَدَيْهِ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ مَضْمَضَ وَاسْتَنْشَقَ بِكَفٍّ وَاحِدَةٍ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ غَسَلَ وَجْهَهُ ثَلَاثًا وَيَدَيْهِ ثَلَاثًا ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ غَمَسَ يَدَهُ فِي الْإِنَاءِ فَمَسَحَ رَأْسَهُ ثُمَّ غَسَلَ رِجْلَيْهِ ثَلَاثًا ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ قَالَ مَنْ سَرَّهُ أَنْ يَنْظُرَ إِلَى وُضُوءِ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ فَهَذَا وُضُوءُهُ
chain: ʿAmr b. ʿAlī \u003e Yazīd / Ibn Zurayʿ \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e Mālik b. ʿUrfuṭah \u003e ʿAbd Khayr
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ عَلِيٍّ عَنْ يَزِيدَ وَهُوَ ابْنُ زُرَيْعٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي شُعْبَةُ عَنْ مَالِكِ بْنِ عُرْفُطَةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ خَيْرٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 165

chapter.arabicTitle: ذِكْرُ اخْتِلَافِ أَلْفَاظِ النَّاقِلِينَ لِخَبَرِ الْمُغِيرَةِ بْنِ شُعْبَةَ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: Mentioning the difference in wording among the narrators regardi...

englishRaw: "I accompanied the Messenger of Allah ﷺ in the Battle of Tabuk. He stood up and returned to me, and I had with me a container of water. I poured water onto the hand of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ , he performed ablution, then he rinsed his mouth, sniffed water into his nostrils, washed his face three times. Then he intended to wash his hands before taking them out from underneath his cloak, but the sleeve became tight for him. So he took out his hands and washed his right hand three times and his left hand three times, and wiped his head with the wetness of his fingers without removing his two shoes."
body: "I accompanied the Messenger of Allah ﷺ in the Battle of Tabuk. He stood up and returned to me, and I had with me a container of water. I poured water onto the hand of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ , he performed ablution, then he rinsed his mouth, sniffed water into his nostrils, washed his face three times. Then he intended to wash his hands before taking them out from underneath his cloak, but the sleeve became tight for him. So he took out his hands and washed his right hand three times and his left hand three times, and wiped his head with the wetness of his fingers without removing his two shoes."
arabic: تَخَلَّفْتُ مَعَ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ فِي غَزْوَةِ تَبُوكَ «فَبَرَزَ ثُمَّ رَجَعَ إِلَيَّ وَمَعِي الْإِدَاوَةُ فَصَبَبْتُ عَلَى يَدِ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ وَضُوءَ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ ثُمَّ اسْتَنْثَرَ وَمَضْمَضَ وَغَسَلَ وَجْهَهُ ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ ثُمَّ أَرَادَ أَنْ يَغْسِلَ يَدَيْهِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يُخْرِجَهُمَا مِنْ كُمَّيْ جُبَّتِهِ فَضَاقَ عَلَيْهِ كُمَّاهَا فَأَخْرَجَ يَدَيْهِ مِنْ تَحْتِ الْجُبَّةِ فَغَسَلَ يَدَهُ الْيُمْنَى ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ وَيَدَهُ الْيُسْرَى ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ وَمَسَحَ بِخُفَّيْهِ وَلَمْ يَنْزِعْهُمَا»
chain: ʿUbaydullāh b. Saʿd b. Ibrāhīm b. Saʿd b. Ibrāhīm from my uncle from my father \u003e Ṣāliḥ \u003e Ibn Shihāb \u003e ʿAbbād b. Ziyād \u003e ʿUrwah b. al-Mughīrah from his father
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللهِ بْنُ سَعْدِ بْنِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ سَعْدِ بْنِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي عَمِّي قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبِي عَنْ صَالِحٍ عَنِ ابْنِ شِهَابٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي عَبَّادُ بْنُ زِيَادٍ عَنْ عُرْوَةَ بْنَ الْمُغِيرَةِ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 166

chapter.arabicTitle: ذِكْرُ اخْتِلَافِ أَلْفَاظِ النَّاقِلِينَ لِخَبَرِ الْمُغِيرَةِ بْنِ شُعْبَةَ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: Mentioning the difference in wording among the narrators regardi...

englishRaw: He informed him that he participated in the Battle of Tabuk with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. Al-Mughirah said, "So the Messenger of Allah ﷺ went out to relieve himself, and I had a water container with me before the Fajr prayer. When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ returned to me, I gave him the water container, and he washed his hands three times, then he washed his face. Then he began to unravel his sleeve from his arms, and his sleeves became tight. So the Messenger of Allah ﷺ inserted his hands into the sleeve until his arms came out from under the sleeve, and he washed his arms up to the elbows. Then I saw him mention wiping over his ankles."
body: He informed him that he participated in the Battle of Tabuk with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. Al-Mughirah said, "So the Messenger of Allah ﷺ went out to relieve himself, and I had a water container with me before the Fajr prayer. When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ returned to me, I gave him the water container, and he washed his hands three times, then he washed his face. Then he began to unravel his sleeve from his arms, and his sleeves became tight. So the Messenger of Allah ﷺ inserted his hands into the sleeve until his arms came out from under the sleeve, and he washed his arms up to the elbows. Then I saw him mention wiping over his ankles."
arabic: أَخْبَرَهُ أَنَّهُ غَزَا مَعَ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ غَزْوَةَ تَبُوكَ قَالَ الْمُغِيرَةُ «فَبَرَزَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ قِبَلَ الْغَائِطِ فَحَمَلْتُ مَعِي إِدَاوَةً قَبْلَ صَلَاةِ الْفَجْرِ فَلَمَّا رَجَعَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ إِلَيَّ أَخَذْتُ أُهَرِيقُ عَلَى يَدَيْهِ مِنَ الْإِدَاوَةِ فَغَسَلَ يَدَيْهِ ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ ثُمَّ غَسَلَ وَجْهَهُ ثُمَّ ذَهَبَ يَحْسِرُ جُبَّتَهُ عَنْ ذِرَاعَيْهِ فَضَاقَ كُمَّا جُبَّتِهِ فَأَدْخَلَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ يَدَيْهِ فِي الْجُبَّةِ حَتَّى أَخْرُجَ ذِرَاعَيْهِ مِنْ أَسْفَلِ الْجُبَّةِ وَغَسَلَ ذِرَاعَيْهِ إِلَى الْمِرْفَقَيْنِ ثُمَّ أُرَاهُ ذَكَرَ مَسَحَ عَلَى خُفَّيْهِ»
chain: Ibrāhīm b. al-Ḥasan \u003e Ḥajjāj b. Muḥammad \u003e Ibn Jurayj \u003e Ibn Shihāb \u003e ʿAbbād b. Ziyād \u003e ʿUrwah b. al-Mughīrah b. Shuʿbah \u003e al-Mughīrah b. Shuʿbah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنِي إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا حَجَّاجُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ قَالَ قَالَ ابْنُ جُرَيْجٍ حَدَّثَنِي ابْنُ شِهَابٍ عَنْ حَدِيثِ عَبَّادِ بْنِ زِيَادٍ أَنَّ عُرْوَةَ بْنَ الْمُغِيرَةِ بْنِ شُعْبَةَ أَخْبَرَهُ أَنَّ الْمُغِيرَةَ بْنَ شُعْبَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 167

chapter.arabicTitle: ذِكْرُ اخْتِلَافِ أَلْفَاظِ النَّاقِلِينَ لِخَبَرِ الْمُغِيرَةِ بْنِ شُعْبَةَ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: Mentioning the difference in wording among the narrators regardi...

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ fell behind to fulfill his needs, so he said, "Is there any water for ablution?" I followed him with a container of water. He washed his hands and face, then he would turn away from his arms. He reached under his garment and washed his arms. Then he wiped over his turban and socks, and then he mounted.
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ fell behind to fulfill his needs, so he said, "Is there any water for ablution?" I followed him with a container of water. He washed his hands and face, then he would turn away from his arms. He reached under his garment and washed his arms. Then he wiped over his turban and socks, and then he mounted.
arabic: تَخَلَّفَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ لِحَاجَتِهِ فَقَالَ «هَلْ مِنْ طُهُورٍ؟» فَأَتْبَعْتُهُ بِمِيضَأَةٍ فِيهَا مَاءٌ «فَغَسَلَ كَفَّيْهِ وَوَجْهَهُ ثُمَّ ذَهَبَ يَحْسِرُ عَنْ ذِرَاعَيْهِ وَكَانَ فِي يَدَيِ الْجُبَّةِ ضَيِّقٌ فَأَخْرَجَ يَدَيْهِ مِنْ تَحْتِ الْجُبَّةِ فَغَسَلَ ذِرَاعَيْهِ ثُمَّ مَسَحَ عَلَى عِمَامَتِهِ وَخُفَّيْهِ ثُمَّ رَكْبَ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Ibn Abū ʿAdī \u003e Ḥumayd \u003e Bakr \u003e Ḥamzah b. al-Mughīrah from his father
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ أَبِي عَدِيٍّ عَنْ حُمَيْدٍ عَنْ بَكْرٍ عَنْ حَمْزَةَ بْنِ الْمُغِيرَةِ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 168

chapter.arabicTitle: ذِكْرُ اخْتِلَافِ أَلْفَاظِ النَّاقِلِينَ لِخَبَرِ الْمُغِيرَةِ بْنِ شُعْبَةَ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: Mentioning the difference in wording among the narrators regardi...

englishRaw: We were traveling with the Prophet ﷺ, and when it was nighttime, he halted his camel and I thought that he had a need, so I offered to assist him. He went away from the people and got off his camel. Then he disappeared from my sight for a while, and when he returned, he asked, "Do you have water?" I replied, "Yes," and poured water for him. He washed his hands perfectly and then washed his face. He went back to feeling troubled about something on his arm, and he was wearing a narrow, Damascene cloak with tight sleeves that constricted him. He tried to remove his hand from under it, and in doing so, he washed his face and hands again. He mentioned in the narration that he washed his face twice, but I do not know whether he meant this as a description. Then he wiped the back of his head, wiped over his turban, and wiped over his two sandals. Then we mounted our camels.
body: We were traveling with the Prophet ﷺ, and when it was nighttime, he halted his camel and I thought that he had a need, so I offered to assist him. He went away from the people and got off his camel. Then he disappeared from my sight for a while, and when he returned, he asked, "Do you have water?" I replied, "Yes," and poured water for him. He washed his hands perfectly and then washed his face. He went back to feeling troubled about something on his arm, and he was wearing a narrow, Damascene cloak with tight sleeves that constricted him. He tried to remove his hand from under it, and in doing so, he washed his face and hands again. He mentioned in the narration that he washed his face twice, but I do not know whether he meant this as a description. Then he wiped the back of his head, wiped over his turban, and wiped over his two sandals. Then we mounted our camels.
arabic: كُنَّا مَعَ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ فِي سَفَرٍ فَلَمَّا كَانَ فِي السَّحَرِ ضَرَبَ عُنُقَ رَاحِلَتَيَّ فَظَنَنْتُ أَنَّ لَهُ حَاجَةً فَعَدَلْتُ مَعَهُ حَتَّى تَوَارَى عَنِ النَّاسِ فَنَزَلَ عَنْ رَاحِلَتِهِ ثُمَّ انْطَلَقَ فَتَغَيَّبَ عَنِّي حَتَّى مَا أُرَاهُ ثُمَّ مُكْثَ طَوِيلًا ثُمَّ جَاءَ فَقَالَ «هَلْ مَعَكَ مَاءٌ؟» فَقُلْتُ نَعَمْ فَصَبَبْتُ عَلَيْهِ فَغَسَلَ يَدَيْهِ فَأَحْسَنَ غَسَلَهُمَا ثُمَّ غَسَلَ وَجْهَهُ ثُمَّ ذَهَبَ يَحْسِرُ عَنْ ذِرَاعَيْهِ وَعَلَيْهِ جُبَّةٌ شَامِيَّةٌ ضَيِّقَةُ الْكُمَّيْنِ فَضَاقَتْ فَأَخْرَجَ يَدَهُ مِنْ تَحْتِهَا إِخْرَاجًا فَغَسَلَ وَجْهَهُ وَيَدَيْهِ قَالَ فِي الْحَدِيثِ غَسَلَ الْوَجْهَ مَرَّتَيْنِ فَلَا أَدْرِي هَكَذَا كَانَ أَمْ لَا ثُمَّ مَسَحَ بِنَاصِيَتِهِ وَمَسَحَ عَلَى الْعِمَامَةِ وَمَسَحَ عَلَى الْخُفَّيْنِ ثُمَّ رَكِبْنَا
chain: Ziyād b. Ayyūb \u003e Ismāʿīl Ibn ʿUlayyah \u003e Ayyūb \u003e Muḥammad b. Sīrīn \u003e ʿAmr b. And Hb
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا زِيَادُ بْنُ أَيُّوبَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ ابْنُ عُلَيَّةَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَيُّوبُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سِيرِينَ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ وَهْبٍ قَالَ كُنَّا عِنْدَ الْمُغِيرَةِ فَسُئِلَ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 169

chapter.arabicTitle: عَدَدُ مَسْحِ الرَّأْسِ وَذِكْرُ اخْتِلَافُ النَّاقِلِينَ لِلْخَبَرِ فِي ذَلِكَ
chapter.englishTitle: The number of head scans and the mention of the variation of rep...

englishRaw: "We came to 'Ali bin Abi Talib, may Allah be pleased with him, and he had prayed. He called for water and we said: 'What is he going to do with it when he has (already) prayed? He only wants to teach us.' A vessel of water and a basin were brought to him. He poured some water onto his hand and washed it three times, then he rinsed his mouth and nose three times from the hand with which he took the water. Then he washed his face three times, and he washed his right hand three times, and his left hand three times, and wiped his head once, then he washed his right foot three times and his left foot three times. Then he said: 'Whoever would like to learn how the Messenger of Allah ﷺ did Wudu', this is it.'"
body: "We came to 'Ali bin Abi Talib, may Allah be pleased with him, and he had prayed. He called for water and we said: 'What is he going to do with it when he has (already) prayed? He only wants to teach us.' A vessel of water and a basin were brought to him. He poured some water onto his hand and washed it three times, then he rinsed his mouth and nose three times from the hand with which he took the water. Then he washed his face three times, and he washed his right hand three times, and his left hand three times, and wiped his head once, then he washed his right foot three times and his left foot three times. Then he said: 'Whoever would like to learn how the Messenger of Allah ﷺ did Wudu', this is it.'"
arabic: أَنْ يَعْلَمَ وَضُوءَ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ فَهُوَ هَذَا
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Abū ʿAwānah \u003e Khālid b. ʿAlqamah \u003e ʿAbd Khayr \u003e Ataynā ʿAlī b. Abū Ṭālib And Qad Ṣallá Fadaʿā Biṭahūr Faqulnā Mā Yaṣnaʿ Waqad Ṣallá Fawaṣaf Wuḍūʾah \u003e Wamasaḥ Raʾsah Murrah Wāḥidah \u003e Man Sarrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَوَانَةَ عَنْ خَالِدِ بْنِ عَلْقَمَةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ خَيْرٍ قَالَ أَتَيْنَا عَلِيَّ بْنَ أَبِي طَالِبٍ وَقَدْ صَلَّى فَدَعَا بِطَهُورٍ فَقُلْنَا مَا يَصْنَعُ وَقَدْ صَلَّى فَوَصَفَ وُضُوءَهُ قَالَ §وَمَسَحَ رَأْسَهُ مُرَّةً وَاحِدَةً وَقَالَ مَنْ سَرَّهُ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 170

chapter.arabicTitle: عَدَدُ مَسْحِ الرَّأْسِ وَذِكْرُ اخْتِلَافُ النَّاقِلِينَ لِلْخَبَرِ فِي ذَلِكَ
chapter.englishTitle: The number of head scans and the mention of the variation of rep...

englishRaw: "I saw the Messenger of Allah performing ablution and he wiped his head once."
body: "I saw the Messenger of Allah performing ablution and he wiped his head once."
arabic: رَأَيْتُ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ «تَوَضَّأَ وَمَسَحَ بِرَأْسِهِ وَأُذُنَيْهِ مُرَّةً»
chain: al-Haytham b. Ayyūb \u003e ʿAbd al-ʿAzīz b. Muḥammad \u003e Zayd b. Aslam \u003e ʿAṭāʾ b. Yasār \u003e Ibn ʿAbbās
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا الْهَيْثَمُ بْنُ أَيُّوبَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الْعَزِيزِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا زَيْدُ بْنُ أَسْلَمَ عَنْ عَطَاءِ بْنِ يَسَارٍ عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 171

chapter.arabicTitle: عَدَدُ مَسْحِ الرَّأْسِ وَذِكْرُ اخْتِلَافُ النَّاقِلِينَ لِلْخَبَرِ فِي ذَلِكَ
chapter.englishTitle: The number of head scans and the mention of the variation of rep...

englishRaw: "I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ perform Wudu'; he washed his face three times and his hands twice, he washed his feet twice and wiped his head twice."
body: "I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ perform Wudu'; he washed his face three times and his hands twice, he washed his feet twice and wiped his head twice."
arabic: رَأَيْتُ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ «تَوَضَّأَ فَغَسَلَ وَجْهَهُ ثَلَاثًا وَيَدَيْهِ مَرَّتَيْنِ وَغَسَلَ رِجْلَيْهِ مَرَّتَيْنِ وَمَسَحَ بِرَأْسِهِ مَرَّتَيْنِ»
chain: Muḥammad b. Manṣūr \u003e Sufyān \u003e ʿAmr b. Yaḥyá from his father \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Zayd al--Adhī Urī al-Nidāʾ
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مَنْصُورٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ زَيْدٍ الَّذِي أُرِيَ النِّدَاءَ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 172

chapter.englishTitle: The obligation of ablution.

englishRaw: The Prophet ﷺ said: Allah does not accept charity from goods acquired by embezzlement as He does not accept prayer without purification.
body: The Prophet ﷺ said: Allah does not accept charity from goods acquired by embezzlement as He does not accept prayer without purification.
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «لَا تُقْبَلُ صَلَاةٌ بِغَيْرِ طُهُورٍ وَلَا صَدَقَةٌ مِنْ غُلُولٍ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Abū ʿAwānah \u003e Qatādah \u003e Abū al-Malīḥ from his father
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَوَانَةَ عَنْ قَتَادَةَ عَنْ أَبِي الْمَلِيحِ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 173

chapter.englishTitle: The reward of those who perform ablution and perfect their ritua...

englishRaw: "I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'There is no man who performs Wudu' and does it well, then prays, but when he prays it, he will be forgiven whatever (sins he commits) between that and the next prayer."
body: "I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'There is no man who performs Wudu' and does it well, then prays, but when he prays it, he will be forgiven whatever (sins he commits) between that and the next prayer."
arabic: سَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ يَقُولُ «مَا مِنَ امْرِئٍ يَتَوَضَّأُ فَيُحْسِنُ وُضُوءَهُ ثُمَّ يُصَلِّي الصَّلَاةَ إِلَّا غُفِرَ لَهُ مَا بَيْنَهُ وَبَيْنَ الصَّلَاةِ الْأُخْرَى حَتَّى يُصَلِّيَهَا»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Mālik \u003e Hishām b. ʿUrwah from his father \u003e Ḥumrān \u003e ʿUthmān
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ مَالِكٍ عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ حُمْرَانَ أَنَّ عُثْمَانَ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 174

chapter.arabicTitle: ثَوَابُ مَنْ تَوَضَّأَ ثُمَّ أَتَى الْمَسْجِدَ فَرَكَعَ فِيهِ رَكْعَتَيْنِ
chapter.englishTitle: The reward for one who performs ablution then comes to the mosqu...

englishRaw: I came to ‘Uthman bin ʿAffan ؓ when he was sitting in al-Maqaʿid. He did wudoo and did it well, then he said: I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ when he was in this place; he did wudoo’ and did it well, then he said: “Whoever does wudoo’ as I have done, then goes to the mosque and prays two rakats, his previous sins will be forgiven.” And he said: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: ʿDo not become complacent.”
body: I came to ‘Uthman bin ʿAffan ؓ when he was sitting in al-Maqaʿid. He did wudoo and did it well, then he said: I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ when he was in this place; he did wudoo’ and did it well, then he said: “Whoever does wudoo’ as I have done, then goes to the mosque and prays two rakats, his previous sins will be forgiven.” And he said: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: ʿDo not become complacent.”
arabic: رَأَيْتُ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ تَوَضَّأَ فَأَحْسَنَ الْوُضُوءَ ثُمَّ قَالَ «مَنْ تَوَضَّأَ مِثْلَ هَذَا الْوُضُوءِ ثُمَّ أَتَى الْمَسْجِدَ فَرَكَعَ فِيهِ رَكْعَتَيْنِ غُفِرَ لَهُ مَا تَقَدَّمَ مِنْ ذَنْبِهِ»
chain: Isḥāq b. Manṣūr \u003e ʿUbaydullāh \u003e Shaybān \u003e Yaḥyá b. Abū Kathīr \u003e Muḥammad b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Muʿādh b. ʿAbd al-Raḥman \u003e Ḥumrān b. Abān \u003e Atayt ʿUthmān Biṭahūr Fatawaḍḍaʾ Faʾaḥsan al-Wuḍūʾ Thum
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ مَنْصُورٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللهِ عَنْ شَيْبَانَ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ أَبِي كَثِيرٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي مُعَاذُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ أَنَّ حُمْرَانَ بْنَ أَبَانَ أَخْبَرَهُ قَالَ أَتَيْتُ عُثْمَانَ بِطَهُورٍ فَتَوَضَّأَ فَأَحْسَنَ الْوُضُوءَ ثُمَّ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 175

chapter.arabicTitle: ثَوَابُ مَنْ تَوَضَّأَ ثُمَّ أَتَى الْمَسْجِدَ فَرَكَعَ فِيهِ رَكْعَتَيْنِ
chapter.englishTitle: The reward for one who performs ablution then comes to the mosqu...

englishRaw: I saw ‘ Uthman’ b. ‘Affan while he performed ablution. He poured water over his hands three times and then washed them. He then rinsed his mouth and then cleansed his nose with water (three times). He then washed his right arm up to the elbow three times, then washed his left arm in a similar manner; then wiped his head; then washed his right foot three times, then washed his left foot in a similar manner, and then said : I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ performing ablution like this ablution of mine. Then he (the Prophet) said: He who performs ablution like this ablution of mine and then offered two rakhahs of prayer without allowing his thoughts to be distracted, Allah will pardon all his past sins.
body: I saw ‘ Uthman’ b. ‘Affan while he performed ablution. He poured water over his hands three times and then washed them. He then rinsed his mouth and then cleansed his nose with water (three times). He then washed his right arm up to the elbow three times, then washed his left arm in a similar manner; then wiped his head; then washed his right foot three times, then washed his left foot in a similar manner, and then said : I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ performing ablution like this ablution of mine. Then he (the Prophet) said: He who performs ablution like this ablution of mine and then offered two rakhahs of prayer without allowing his thoughts to be distracted, Allah will pardon all his past sins.
arabic: رَأَيْتُ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ تَوَضَّأَ مِثْلَ وُضُوئِي هَذَا ثُمَّ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «مَنْ تَوَضَّأَ مِثْلَ وُضُوئِي هَذَا ثُمَّ قَامَ فَصَلَّى رَكْعَتَيْنِ غُفِرَ لَهُ مَا تَقَدَّمَ مِنْ ذَنْبِهِ»
chain: Maḥmūd b. Khālid \u003e al-Walīd \u003e Abū ʿAmr al-Awzāʿī \u003e Yaḥyá \u003e Muḥammad b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Shaqīq b. Salamah \u003e Ḥumrān \u003e Raʾayt ʿUthmān Tawaḍḍaʾ Thum
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مَحْمُودُ بْنُ خَالِدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا الْوَلِيدُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَمْرٍو الْأَوْزَاعِيُّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي يَحْيَى قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ أَنَّ شَقِيقَ بْنَ سَلَمَةَ حَدَّثَهُ أَنَّ حُمْرَانَ قَالَ رَأَيْتُ عُثْمَانَ تَوَضَّأَ ثُمَّ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 176

chapter.arabicTitle: ثَوَابُ مَنْ تَوَضَّأَ ثُمَّ أَتَى الْمَسْجِدَ فَرَكَعَ فِيهِ رَكْعَتَيْنِ
chapter.englishTitle: The reward for one who performs ablution then comes to the mosqu...

englishRaw: "I said: 'O Messenger of Allah! How is Wudu' done?' He said: 'As for Wudu', when you perform Wudu', and you wash your hands to clean them, your sins come out from between your fingers and fingertips. When you rinse your mouth and nostrils, and wash your face and hands up to the elbows, and wipe your head, and wash your feet up to the ankles, you are cleansed of all your sins. When you prostrate your face to Allah, may He be exalted, you emerge from your sins like the day your mother bore you.'" Abu Umamah said: "I said: 'O 'Amr bin 'Abasah! Look at what you are saying! Was all of that given in one sitting? He said: 'By Allah, I have grown old, my appointed time is near and I am not so poor that I should tell lies about the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. I heard it with my own ears and understood it in my heart from the Messenger of Allah.'"
body: "I said: 'O Messenger of Allah! How is Wudu' done?' He said: 'As for Wudu', when you perform Wudu', and you wash your hands to clean them, your sins come out from between your fingers and fingertips. When you rinse your mouth and nostrils, and wash your face and hands up to the elbows, and wipe your head, and wash your feet up to the ankles, you are cleansed of all your sins. When you prostrate your face to Allah, may He be exalted, you emerge from your sins like the day your mother bore you.'" Abu Umamah said: "I said: 'O 'Amr bin 'Abasah! Look at what you are saying! Was all of that given in one sitting? He said: 'By Allah, I have grown old, my appointed time is near and I am not so poor that I should tell lies about the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. I heard it with my own ears and understood it in my heart from the Messenger of Allah.'"
arabic: سَمِعْتُ عَمْرُو بْنُ عَبَسَةَ يَقُولُ قُلْتُ يَا رَسُولَ اللهِ كَيْفَ الْوُضُوءُ؟ قَالَ «أَمَّا الْوُضُوءُ فَإِنَّكَ إِذَا تَوَضَّأْتَ فَغَسَلْتَ كَفَّيْكَ فَأَنْقَيْتَهُمَا خَرَجَتْ خَطَايَاكَ مِنْ بَيْنِ أَظْفَارِكَ وَأَنَامِلِكَ فَإِذَا مَضْمَضْتَ وَاسْتَنْشَقْتَ مَنْخَرَيْكَ وَغَسَلْتَ وَجْهَكَ وَيَدَيْكَ إِلَى الْمِرْفَقَيْنِ وَمَسَحْتَ بِرَأْسِكَ وَغَسَلْتَ رِجْلَيْكَ إِلَى الْكَعْبَيْنِ اغْتَسَلْتَ مِنْ عَامَّةِ خَطَايَاكَ فَإِنْ أَنْتَ وَضَعْتَ وَجْهَكَ لِلَّهِ خَرَجْتَ مِنْ خَطَايَاكَ كَيَوْمِ وَلَدَتْكَ أُمُّكَ»
chain: ʿAmr b. Manṣūr \u003e Ādam \u003e al-Layth b. Saʿd \u003e Muʿāwiyah b. Ṣāliḥ \u003e Abū Yaḥyá Sulaym b. ʿĀmir And Ḍamrah b. Ḥabīb Waʾabū Ṭalḥah Nuʿaym b. Ziyād \u003e Abū Umāmah al-Bāhilī \u003e ʿAmr b. ʿAbasah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ مَنْصُورٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا آدَمُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا اللَّيْثُ بْنُ سَعْدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ صَالِحٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي أَبُو يَحْيَى سُلَيْمُ بْنُ عَامِرٍ وَضَمْرَةُ بْنُ حَبِيبٍ وَأَبُو طَلْحَةَ نُعَيْمُ بْنُ زِيَادٍ قَالُوا سَمِعْنَا أَبَا أُمَامَةَ الْبَاهِلِيَّ يَقُولُ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 177

chapter.arabicTitle: ثَوَابُ مَنْ أَحْسَنَ الْوُضُوءَ ثُمَّ صَلَّى رَكْعَتَيْنِ
chapter.englishTitle: Reward for those who perform the best ablution and then offer tw...

englishRaw: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever performs Wudu' and does it well, then prays two Rak'ahs in which his heart and face are focused, Paradise will be his."
body: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever performs Wudu' and does it well, then prays two Rak'ahs in which his heart and face are focused, Paradise will be his."
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «مَنْ تَوَضَّأَ فَأَحْسَنَ الْوُضُوءَ ثُمَّ صَلَّى رَكْعَتَيْنِ يُقْبَلُ عَلَيْهِمَا بِقَلْبِهِ وَوَجْهِهِ وَجَبَتْ لَهُ الْجَنَّةُ»
chain: Mūsá b. ʿAbd al-Raḥman \u003e Zayd b. Ḥubāb \u003e Muʿāwiyah b. Ṣāliḥ \u003e Rabīʿah b. Yazīd al-Dimashqī \u003e Abū Idrīs al-Khawlānī And ʾAbī ʿUthmān \u003e Jubayr b. Nufayr \u003e ʿUqbah b. ʿĀmir
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُوسَى بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا زَيْدُ بْنُ حُبَابٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ صَالِحٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي رَبِيعَةُ بْنُ يَزِيدَ الدِّمَشْقِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي إِدْرِيسَ الْخَوْلَانِيِّ وَأَبِي عُثْمَانَ عَنْ جُبَيْرِ بْنِ نُفَيْرٍ عَنْ عُقْبَةَ بْنِ عَامِرٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 178

chapter.englishTitle: The command for ablution from what the fire has touched.

englishRaw: "I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'Perform Wudu' from that which has been touched by fire.'"
body: "I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'Perform Wudu' from that which has been touched by fire.'"
arabic: سَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ يَقُولُ «تَوَضَّؤُوا مِمَّا مَسَّتِ النَّارُ»
chain: Hishām b. ʿAbd al-Malik Abū Taqī al-Ḥimṣī \u003e Muḥammad / Ibn Ḥarb \u003e al-Zubaydī \u003e al-Zuhrī \u003e ʿUmar b. ʿAbd al-ʿAzīz \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Qāriẓ \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا هِشَامُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْمَلِكِ أَبُو تَقِيٍّ الْحِمْصِيُّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدٌ يَعْنِي ابْنَ حَرْبٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي الزُّبَيْدِيُّ عَنِ الزُّهْرِيِّ أَنَّ عُمَرَ بْنَ عَبْدِ الْعَزِيزِ أَخْبَرَهُ أَنَّ عَبْدَ اللهِ بْنَ قَارِظٍ أَخْبَرَهُ أَنَّ أَبَا هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 179

chain: Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Ismāʿīl And ʿAbd al-Razzāq \u003e Maʿmar \u003e al-Zuhrī \u003e ʿUmar b. ʿAbd al-ʿAzīz \u003e Ibrāhīm b. ʿAbdullāh b. Qāriẓ \u003e Abū Hurayrah

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 184

chapter.englishTitle: The command for ablution from what the fire has touched.

englishRaw: "Perform Wudu' O son of my sister! For the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Perform Wudu' from that which has been touched by fire.'"
body: "Perform Wudu' O son of my sister! For the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Perform Wudu' from that which has been touched by fire.'"
arabic: أَنَّهُ دَخَلَ عَلَى أُمِّ حَبِيبَةَ زَوْجِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ وَهِيَ خَالَتُهُ فَسَقَتْهُ سَوِيقًا ثُمَّ قَالَتْ لَهُ تَوَضَّأْ يَا ابْنَ أُخْتِي فَإِنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ قَالَ «تَوَضَّؤُوا مِمَّا مَسَّتِ النَّارُ»
chain: Hishām b. ʿAbd al-Malik \u003e Ibn Ḥarb \u003e al-Zubaydī \u003e al-Zuhrī \u003e Abū Salamah b. ʿAbd al-Raḥman \u003e Abū Sufyān b. Saʿīd b. al-Akhnas b. Sharīq
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا هِشَامُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْمَلِكِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ حَرْبٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا الزُّبَيْدِيُّ عَنِ الزُّهْرِيِّ أَنَّ أَبَا سَلَمَةَ بْنَ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ أَخْبَرَهُ عَنْ أَبِي سُفْيَانَ بْنِ سَعِيدِ بْنِ الْأَخْنَسِ بْنِ شَرِيقٍ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 185

chapter.englishTitle: Copying that

englishRaw: It was narrated from Umm Salamah that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ at (meat from) a shoulder, then Bilal came to him and he went out to pray, and he did not touch water.
body: It was narrated from Umm Salamah that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ at (meat from) a shoulder, then Bilal came to him and he went out to pray, and he did not touch water.
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ «أَكَلَ كَتِفًا فَجَاءَهُ بِلَالٌ فَخَرَجَ إِلَى الصَّلَاةِ وَلَمْ يَمَسَّ مَاءً»
chain: Muḥammad b. al-Muthanná \u003e Yaḥyá / Ibn Saʿīd \u003e Jaʿfar / Ibn Muḥammad b. ʿAlī b. Ḥusayn from his father \u003e ʿAlī b. Ḥusayn \u003e Zaynab b. Um Salamah \u003e Um Salamah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى يَعْنِي ابْنَ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا جَعْفَرٌ وَهُوَ ابْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ حُسَيْنٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ حُسَيْنٍ عَنْ زَيْنَبَ بِنْتِ أُمِّ سَلَمَةَ عَنْ أُمِّ سَلَمَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 186

chapter.englishTitle: Copying that

englishRaw: "I entered upon Umm Salamah and she told me that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to wake up in a state of Janabah without having had a wet dream, then he would fast." And she told him that she brought the Prophet ﷺ some grilled ribs and he ate from that, then he got up and prayed, and did not perform Wudu'.
body: "I entered upon Umm Salamah and she told me that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to wake up in a state of Janabah without having had a wet dream, then he would fast." And she told him that she brought the Prophet ﷺ some grilled ribs and he ate from that, then he got up and prayed, and did not perform Wudu'.
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ كَانَ يُصْبِحُ جُنُبًا مِنْ غَيْرِ احْتِلَامٍ ثُمَّ يَصُومُ وَحَدَّثَنَا مَعَ هَذَا الْحَدِيثِ أَنَّهَا حَدَّثَتْهُ أَنَّهَا قَرَّبَتْ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ جَنْبًا مَشْوِيًّا فَأَكَلَ مِنْهُ ثُمَّ قَامَ إِلَى الصَّلَاةِ وَلَمْ يَتَوَضَّأْ
chain: Khālid \u003e Ibn Jurayj \u003e Muḥammad b. Yūsuf \u003e Sulaymān b. Yasār
chainArabic: أخبرنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْأَعْلَى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا خَالِدٌ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ جُرَيْجٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يُوسُفَ عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ يَسَارٍ قَالَ دَخَلْتُ عَلَى أُمِّ سَلَمَةَ فَحَدَّثَتْنِي

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 187

chapter.englishTitle: Copying that

englishRaw: It was reported that Ibn 'Abbas said "I witnessed (that) the Messenger of Allah ﷺ ate bread and meat, then stood for prayer and did not perform ablution. "
body: It was reported that Ibn 'Abbas said "I witnessed (that) the Messenger of Allah ﷺ ate bread and meat, then stood for prayer and did not perform ablution. "
arabic: شَهِدْتُ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ «أَكَلَ خُبْزًا وَلَحْمًا ثُمَّ قَامَ إِلَى الصَّلَاةِ وَلَمْ يَتَوَضَّأْ»
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿAbd al-Aʿlá \u003e Khālid \u003e Ibn Jurayj \u003e Muḥammad b. Yūsuf \u003e Ibn Yasār \u003e Ibn ʿAbbās
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْأَعْلَى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا خَالِدٌ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ جُرَيْجٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يُوسُفَ عَنِ ابْنِ يَسَارٍ عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 188

chapter.englishTitle: Copying that

englishRaw: It was reported that Jabir (ra) said "That last of the two matters from the Messenger ofAllah ﷺ was leaving off ablution from that which had been touched by fire."
body: It was reported that Jabir (ra) said "That last of the two matters from the Messenger ofAllah ﷺ was leaving off ablution from that which had been touched by fire."
arabic: كَانَ آخِرُ الْأَمْرَيْنِ مِنْ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ «تَرْكَ الْوُضُوءِ مِمَّا مَسَّتِ النَّارُ»
chain: ʿAmr b. Manṣūr \u003e ʿAlī b. ʿAyyāsh \u003e Shuʿayb \u003e Muḥammad b. al-Munkadir \u003e Jābir b. ʿAbdullāh
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ مَنْصُورٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ عَيَّاشٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا شُعَيْبٌ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْمُنْكَدِرِ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ جَابِرَ بْنَ عَبْدِ اللهِ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 189

chapter.englishTitle: Mouthwash from Swieq.

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ was brought a bowl of dates, and he ate and we ate with him. Then he rinsed his mouth and stood up and performed the Maghrib prayer without performing ablution.
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ was brought a bowl of dates, and he ate and we ate with him. Then he rinsed his mouth and stood up and performed the Maghrib prayer without performing ablution.
arabic: «أُتِيَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ بِسَوِيقٍ فَأَكَلَ وَأَكَلْنَا مَعَهُ ثُمَّ تَمَضْمَضَ فَقَامَ فَصَلَّى الْمَغْرِبَ وَلَمْ يَتَوَضَّأْ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e al-Layth \u003e Yaḥyá \u003e Bushayr b. Yasār \u003e Sūwayd b. al-Nuʿmān
