chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا اللَّيْثُ عَنْ يَحْيَى عَنْ بُشَيْرِ بْنِ يَسَارٍ عَنْ سُوَيْدِ بْنِ النُّعْمَانَ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 190

chapter.englishTitle: The mouthwash of milk.

englishRaw: it contains greasiness.
body: it contains greasiness.
arabic: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ شَرِبَ لَبَنًا ثُمَّ دَعَا بِمَاءٍ فَتَمَضْمَضَ ثُمَّ قَالَ «إِنَّ لَهُ دَسَمًا»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e al-Layth \u003e ʿUqayl \u003e al-Zuhrī \u003e ʿUbaydullāh b. ʿAbdullāh \u003e Ibn ʿAbbās
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا اللَّيْثُ عَنْ عُقَيْلٍ عَنِ الزُّهْرِيِّ عَنْ عُبَيْدِ اللهِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللهِ عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 191

chapter.englishTitle: Washing the disbeliever when he/she converts to Islam

englishRaw: It was narrated from Qais bin 'Asim that he accepted Islam, and the Prophet commanded him to perform Ghusl with water and lotus leaves.
body: It was narrated from Qais bin 'Asim that he accepted Islam, and the Prophet commanded him to perform Ghusl with water and lotus leaves.
arabic: أَنَّهُ أَسْلَمَ «فَأَمَرَهُ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ أَنْ يَغْتَسِلَ بِمَاءٍ وَسِدْرٍ»
chain: ʿAmr b. ʿAlī \u003e Yaḥyá \u003e Sufyān \u003e al-Aghar / Ibn al-Ṣabbāḥ \u003e Khalīfah b. Ḥuṣayn \u003e Qays b. ʿĀṣim
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ عَلِيٍّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ عَنِ الْأَغَرِّ وَهُوَ ابْنُ الصَّبَّاحِ عَنْ خَلِيفَةَ بْنِ حُصَيْنٍ عَنْ قَيْسِ بْنِ عَاصِمٍ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 192

chapter.englishTitle: Washing the disbeliever when he/she converts to Islam

englishRaw: That Muhammad is his slave and messenger. O Muhammad, I swear by Allah, there was never a face on earth that I disliked more than your face, but now your face has become the most beloved of all faces to me. By Allah, there was never a religion that I disliked more than your religion, but now your religion has become the most beloved of all religions to me. By Allah, there was never a land that I disliked more than your land, but now your land has become the most beloved of all lands to me. And indeed, your cavalry has taken me while I desire to perform Umrah. What do you think?" So the Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave him the glad tidings and commanded him to perform Umrah.
body: That Muhammad is his slave and messenger. O Muhammad, I swear by Allah, there was never a face on earth that I disliked more than your face, but now your face has become the most beloved of all faces to me. By Allah, there was never a religion that I disliked more than your religion, but now your religion has become the most beloved of all religions to me. By Allah, there was never a land that I disliked more than your land, but now your land has become the most beloved of all lands to me. And indeed, your cavalry has taken me while I desire to perform Umrah. What do you think?" So the Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave him the glad tidings and commanded him to perform Umrah.
arabic: أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ يَا مُحَمَّدُ وَاللهِ مَا كَانَ عَلَى الْأَرْضِ وَجْهٌ أَبْغَضَ إِلَيَّ مِنْ وَجْهِكَ فَقَدْ أَصْبَحَ وَجْهُكَ أَحَبَّ الْوُجُوهِ كُلِّهَا إِلَيَّ وَوَاللهِ مَا كَانَ دِينٌ أَبْغَضَ إِلَيَّ مِنْ دَيْنِكَ فَأَصْبَحَ دَيْنُكَ أَحَبَّ الدِّينِ كُلِّهِ إِلَيَّ وَوَاللهِ مَا كَانَ مِنْ بَلَدٍ أَبْغَضَ إِلَيَّ مِنْ بَلَدِكَ فَأَصْبَحَ بَلَدُكَ أَحَبَّ الْبِلَادِ كُلِّهَا إِلَيَّ وَإِنَّ خَيْلَكَ أَخَذَتْنِي وَأَنَا أُرِيدَ الْعُمْرَةَ فَمَاذَا تَرَى؟ «فَبَشَّرَهُ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ وَأَمَرَهُ أَنْ يَعْتَمِرَ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e al-Layth \u003e Saʿīd b. Abū Saʿīd \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا اللَّيْثُ عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ أَبِي سَعِيدٍ أَنَّهُ سَمِعَ أَبَا هُرَيْرَةَ يَقُولُ إِنَّ ثُمَامَةَ بْنَ أُثَالٍ انْطَلَقَ إِلَى نَخْلٍ قَرِيبٍ مِنَ الْمَسْجِدِ فَاغْتَسَلَ ثُمَّ دَخَلَ إِلَى الْمَسْجِدِ فَقَالَ أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَأَشْهَدُ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 193

chapter.englishTitle: The command to perform ritual washing after coming into contact ...

englishRaw: When Abu Talib died, I went to the Prophet ﷺ and said to him, "Indeed, your uncle, the misguided old man, has died." He said, "Go and wash him and do not say anything until you come to me." So, I washed him and then I went to him (the Prophet) and said, "I have washed him." He commanded me, so I performed the ritual washing (ghusl).
body: When Abu Talib died, I went to the Prophet ﷺ and said to him, "Indeed, your uncle, the misguided old man, has died." He said, "Go and wash him and do not say anything until you come to me." So, I washed him and then I went to him (the Prophet) and said, "I have washed him." He commanded me, so I performed the ritual washing (ghusl).
arabic: لَمَّا مَاتَ أَبُو طَالِبٍ أَتَيْتُ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ فَقُلْتُ لَهُ إِنَّ عَمَّكَ الشَّيْخَ الضَّالَّ قَدْ مَاتَ قَالَ اذْهَبْ فَوَارِهِ قُلْتُ إِنَّهُ مَاتَ مُشْرِكًا قَالَ اذْهَبْ فَوَارِهِ وَلَا تُحَدِّثْ شَيْئًا حَتَّى تَأْتِيَنِي « فَوَارَيْتُهُ ثُمَّ أَتَيْتُهُ فَقُلْتُ قَدْ وَارَيْتُهُ فَأَمَرَنِي فَاغْتَسَلْتُ»
chain: Muḥammad b. al-Muthanná \u003e Muḥammad \u003e Ibn Jaʿfar \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e Abū Isḥāq \u003e Muḥammad / Ibn Bashhār \u003e Yaḥyá \u003e Sufyān \u003e Abū Isḥāq \u003e Nājiyah b. Kaʿb \u003e ʿAlī \u003e Lammā
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى عَنْ مُحَمَّدٍ هُوَ ابْنُ جَعْفَرٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي شُعْبَةُ عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ وَأَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدٌ وَهُوَ ابْنُ بَشَّارٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو إِسْحَاقَ عَنْ نَاجِيَةَ بْنِ كَعْبٍ عَنْ عَلِيٍّ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 194

chapter.englishTitle: The necessity for washing if the circumcision wounds meet

englishRaw: "When the two circumcised parts meet, then bath is obligatory. The Messenger of Allah and I did that, and we bathed."
body: "When the two circumcised parts meet, then bath is obligatory. The Messenger of Allah and I did that, and we bathed."
arabic: عَنْ عَائِشَةَ زَوْجِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ قَالَتْ «إِذَا جَاوَزَ الْخِتَانُ الْخِتَانَ وَجَبَ الْغُسْلُ فَعَلْتُهُ أَنَا وَرَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ فَاغْتَسَلْنَا»
chain: ʿUbaydullāh b. Saʿīd \u003e al-Walīd b. Muslim \u003e al-Awzāʿī \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. al-Qāsim \u003e al-Qāsim b. Muḥammad
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللهِ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا الْوَلِيدُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ الْأَوْزَاعِيُّ يَقُولُ حَدَّثَنِي عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ الْقَاسِمِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي الْقَاسِمُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 195

chapter.englishTitle: The necessity for washing if the circumcision wounds meet

englishRaw: "When (a man) sits between the four parts of his wife's body and exerts himself, then Ghusl becomes obligatory."
body: "When (a man) sits between the four parts of his wife's body and exerts himself, then Ghusl becomes obligatory."
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ قَالَ «إِذَا جَلَسَ بَيْنَ شُعَبِهَا الْأَرْبَعِ ثُمَّ اجْتَهَدَ فَقَدْ وَجَبَ الْغُسْلُ»
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿAbd al-Aʿlá \u003e Khālid / Ibn al-Ḥārith \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e Qatādah \u003e al-Ḥasan \u003e Abū Rāfiʿ \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْأَعْلَى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا خَالِدٌ يَعْنِي ابْنَ الْحَارِثِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ عَنْ قَتَادَةَ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ الْحَسَنَ يُحَدِّثُ عَنْ أَبِي رَافِعٍ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 196

chapter.englishTitle: The necessity for washing if the circumcision wounds meet

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "If one sits between the four corners [of the toilet] and strains, then ghusl (ritual bathing) becomes obligatory." Abu 'Abd al-Rahman said, "This is an error and we do not know of anyone who followed 'Isa ibn Yunus (may Allah be pleased with him). The correct narration is from Ash'ath from Al-Hasan from Abu Hurairah, and Al-Hasan did not hear from Abu Hurairah or did not hear this from Abu Hurairah." Abu 'Abd al-Rahman said, "I am uncertain."
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "If one sits between the four corners [of the toilet] and strains, then ghusl (ritual bathing) becomes obligatory." Abu 'Abd al-Rahman said, "This is an error and we do not know of anyone who followed 'Isa ibn Yunus (may Allah be pleased with him). The correct narration is from Ash'ath from Al-Hasan from Abu Hurairah, and Al-Hasan did not hear from Abu Hurairah or did not hear this from Abu Hurairah." Abu 'Abd al-Rahman said, "I am uncertain."
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ قَالَ «إِذَا قَعَدَ بَيْنَ شُعَبِهَا الْأَرْبَعِ ثُمَّ اجْتَهَدَ فَقَدْ وَجَبَ الْغُسْلُ» قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ هَذَا خَطَأٌ وَلَا نَعْلَمُ أَحَدًا تَابَعَ عِيسَى بْنُ يُونُسَ عَلَيْهِ وَالصَّوَابُ أَشْعَثُ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ وَالْحَسَنُ لَمْ يَسْمَعْ مِنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ أَوْ لَمْ يَسْمَعْهُ مِنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ أَنَا أَشُكُّ
chain: Ibrāhīm b. Yaʿqūb b. Isḥāq \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Yūsuf \u003e ʿĪsá b. Yūnus \u003e Ashʿath b. ʿAbd al-Malik \u003e Ibn Sīrīn \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنِي إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ يُوسُفَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عِيسَى بْنُ يُونُسَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَشْعَثُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْمَلِكِ عَنِ ابْنِ سِيرِينَ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 197

chapter.englishTitle: The obligation of washing from semen

englishRaw: "I was one who had a lot of prostatic discharge, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to me: 'If you see Madhi (prostatic fluid) then wash your penis and perform Wudu' like that for Salah, but if you ejaculate semen, then perform Ghusl.'"
body: "I was one who had a lot of prostatic discharge, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to me: 'If you see Madhi (prostatic fluid) then wash your penis and perform Wudu' like that for Salah, but if you ejaculate semen, then perform Ghusl.'"
arabic: رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «إِذَا رَأَيْتَ الْمَذْيَ فَاغْسِلْ ذَكَرَكَ وَتَوَضَّأَ وُضُوءَكَ لِلصَّلَاةِ وَإِذَا فَضَخْتَ الْمَاءَ فَاغْتَسِلْ»
chain: ʿAlī b. Ḥujr And Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e ʿAbīdah \u003e al-Rukayn b. al-Rabīʿ \u003e Ḥuṣayn b. Qabīṣah \u003e ʿAlī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ حُجْرٍ وَقُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ وَاللَّفْظُ لَهُ عَنْ عَبِيدَةَ عَنِ الرُّكَيْنِ بْنِ الرَّبِيعِ عَنْ حُصَيْنِ بْنِ قَبِيصَةَ عَنْ عَلِيٍّ قَالَ كُنْتُ رَجُلًا مَذَّاءً فَقَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 198

chapter.englishTitle: The obligation of washing from semen

englishRaw: I was a man who emitted a great deal of madhi, so I asked the Prophet ﷺ and he said: “If you see madhi then do wudoo’ and wash your private part, and if you see water gushing then do ghusl.ʿ I [the narrator] mentioned that to Sufyan and he said: I heard that from Rukain. Muʿawiyah and ibn Abi Bukair told us: Zaʿidah told us: ar-Rukain bin ar-Rabee bin ‘Ameelah al-Fazari told us... And he mentioned a similar report, and they said: water gushing. And Ibn Abu Bukair told us: Zaʿidah told us, and he also said, gushing.
body: I was a man who emitted a great deal of madhi, so I asked the Prophet ﷺ and he said: “If you see madhi then do wudoo’ and wash your private part, and if you see water gushing then do ghusl.ʿ I [the narrator] mentioned that to Sufyan and he said: I heard that from Rukain. Muʿawiyah and ibn Abi Bukair told us: Zaʿidah told us: ar-Rukain bin ar-Rabee bin ‘Ameelah al-Fazari told us... And he mentioned a similar report, and they said: water gushing. And Ibn Abu Bukair told us: Zaʿidah told us, and he also said, gushing.
arabic: كُنْتُ رَجُلًا مَذَّاءً فَسَأَلْتُ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ فَقَالَ «إِذَا رَأَيْتَ الْمَذْيَ فَتَوَضَّأْ وَاغْسِلْ ذَكَرَكَ وَإِذَا رَأَيْتَ فَضْخَ الْمَاءِ فَاغْتَسِلْ»
chain: ʿUbaydullāh b. Saʿīd \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman \u003e Zāʾidah \u003e Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Abū al-Walīd \u003e Zāʾidah \u003e al-Rukayn b. Rabīʿ b. ʿUmaylah al-Fazārī \u003e Ḥuṣayn b. Qabīṣah \u003e ʿAlī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللهِ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ عَنْ زَائِدَةَ وَأَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَاللَّفْظُ لَهُ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو الْوَلِيدِ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا زَائِدَةُ عَنِ الرُّكَيْنِ بْنِ رَبِيعِ بْنِ عُمَيْلَةَ الْفَزَارِيِّ عَنْ حُصَيْنِ بْنِ قَبِيصَةَ عَنْ عَلِيٍّ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 199

chapter.arabicTitle: إِيجَابُ الْغُسْلِ عَلَى الْمَرْأَةِ إِذَا احْتَلَمَتْ وَرَأَتِ الْمَاءَ
chapter.englishTitle: The positive aspects of washing for a woman when she has a wet d...

englishRaw: Um Salama said, "Um Sulaim said, 'O Messenger of Allah ﷺ! Allah does not refrain from saying the truth! Is it obligatory for a woman to take a bath after she gets nocturnal discharge?' He said, 'Yes, if she notices the water (i.e. discharge).' Um Salama smiled and said, 'Does a woman get discharge?' Allah's Apostle said. 'Then why does a child resemble (its mother)?"
body: Um Salama said, "Um Sulaim said, 'O Messenger of Allah ﷺ! Allah does not refrain from saying the truth! Is it obligatory for a woman to take a bath after she gets nocturnal discharge?' He said, 'Yes, if she notices the water (i.e. discharge).' Um Salama smiled and said, 'Does a woman get discharge?' Allah's Apostle said. 'Then why does a child resemble (its mother)?"
arabic: يَا رَسُولَ اللهِ إِنَّ اللهَ لَا يَسْتَحْيِي مِنَ الْحَقِّ هَلْ عَلَى الْمَرْأَةِ غُسْلٌ إِذَا احْتَلَمَتْ؟ قَالَ «نَعَمْ إِذَا رَأَتِ الْمَاءَ» فَضَحِكَتْ أُمُّ سَلَمَةَ وَقَالَتْ أَتَحْتَلِمُ الْمَرْأَةُ؟ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «فَبِمَ يُشْبِهُ الْوَلَدُ؟»
chain: Shuʿayb b. Yūsuf \u003e Yaḥyá \u003e Hishām from my father \u003e Zaynab b. Um Salamah \u003e Um Salamah \u003e Āmraʾah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنِي شُعَيْبُ بْنُ يُوسُفَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى عَنْ هِشَامٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي أَبِي عَنْ زَيْنَبَ بِنْتِ أُمِّ سَلَمَةَ عَنْ أُمِّ سَلَمَةَ أَنَّ امْرَأَةً قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 200

chapter.arabicTitle: إِيجَابُ الْغُسْلِ عَلَى الْمَرْأَةِ إِذَا احْتَلَمَتْ وَرَأَتِ الْمَاءَ
chapter.englishTitle: The positive aspects of washing for a woman when she has a wet d...

englishRaw: "If water is released then let her perform Ghusl."
body: "If water is released then let her perform Ghusl."
arabic: أَنَّ أُمَّ سُلَيْمٍ سَأَلَتِ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ عَنِ الْمَرْأَةِ تَرَى فِي مَنَامِهَا مَا يَرَى الرَّجُلُ قَالَ «إِذَا أَنْزَلْتِ الْمَاءَ فَلْتَغْتَسِلْ»
chain: Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm \u003e ʿAbdah \u003e Saʿīd \u003e Qatādah \u003e Anas
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدَةُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سَعِيدٌ عَنْ قَتَادَةَ عَنْ أَنَسٍ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 203

chapter.arabicTitle: فِي الَّذِي يَحْتَلِمُ وَلَا يَرَى الْمَاءَ
chapter.englishTitle: Into the one who stumbles but does not see the water

englishRaw: "Water is for Water." [1] [1] That is, water for peforming Ghusl is obligatory when the ejaculation of water (semen) occurs.
body: "Water is for Water." [1] [1] That is, water for peforming Ghusl is obligatory when the ejaculation of water (semen) occurs.
arabic: عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ قَالَ «الْمَاءُ مِنَ الْمَاءِ»
chain: ʿAbd al-Jabbār b. al-ʿAlāʾ b. ʿAbd al-Jabbār \u003e Sufyān \u003e ʿAmr \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. al-Sāʾib \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. Suʿād \u003e Abū Ayyūb
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الْجَبَّارِ بْنُ الْعَلَاءِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الْجَبَّارِ عَنْ سُفْيَانَ عَنْ عَمْرٍو عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ السَّائِبِ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ سُعَادٍ عَنْ أَبِي أَيُّوبَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 204

chapter.arabicTitle: الْفَصْلُ بَيْنَ مَاءِ الرَّجُلِ وَمَاءِ الْمَرْأَةِ
chapter.englishTitle: Differentiating Between Male and Female Water

englishRaw: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The man's water is thick and white, and the woman's water is thin and yellow. Whichever of them comes first, the child will resemble (that parent).'"
body: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The man's water is thick and white, and the woman's water is thin and yellow. Whichever of them comes first, the child will resemble (that parent).'"
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «مَاءُ الرَّجُلِ غَلِيظٌ أَبْيَضُ وَمَاءُ الْمَرْأَةِ رَقِيقٌ أَصْفَرُ فَأَيُّهُمَا سَبَقَ كَانَ الشَّبَهُ»
chain: Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm \u003e ʿAbdah \u003e Saʿīd \u003e Qatādah \u003e Anas
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدَةُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سَعِيدٌ عَنْ قَتَادَةَ عَنْ أَنَسٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 205

chapter.englishTitle: The purification from menstruation and postpartum bleeding

englishRaw: "Umm Habibah bint Jahsh consulted the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and said: 'O Messenger of Allah, I suffer from Istihadah (non-menstrual vaginal bleeding).' He said: 'That is a vein, so perform Ghusl and pray.' And she used to perform Ghusl for every prayer."
body: "Umm Habibah bint Jahsh consulted the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and said: 'O Messenger of Allah, I suffer from Istihadah (non-menstrual vaginal bleeding).' He said: 'That is a vein, so perform Ghusl and pray.' And she used to perform Ghusl for every prayer."
arabic: اسْتَفْتَتْ أُمُّ حَبِيبَةَ بِنْتِ جَحْشٍ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ فَقَالَتْ يَا رَسُولَ اللهِ إِنِّي أُسْتَحَاضُ فَقَالَ «إِنَّمَا ذَلِكَ عِرْقٌ فَاغْتَسِلِي وَصَلِّي فَكَانَتْ تَغْتَسِلُ عِنْدَ كُلِّ صَلَاةٍ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e al-Layth \u003e Ibn Shihāb \u003e ʿUrwah \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا اللَّيْثُ عَنِ ابْنِ شِهَابٍ عَنْ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 206

chapter.englishTitle: The purification from menstruation and postpartum bleeding

englishRaw: Umm Habibah asked the prophet ﷺ about the blood (which flows beyond the period of menstruation). ‘A’ishah said: I saw her wash-tub full of blood. The apostle of Allah (May peace be upon him) said; Keep away (from prayer) equal (to the length of time) that your menses prevented you. Then wash yourself. Abu Dawud said: Qutaibah mentioned the name Jaftar b. Rabi’ah in the middle of the text of the tradition for the second time (i.e., Qutaibah, being doubtful about the narrator Jafar b. Rabi’ah, mentioned his name twice: once in the chain and again while reporting the text). Ali b. ‘Ayyash and yunus b. Muhammad reported it on the authority of al-Laith. They mentioned the name Jafar b. Rabi’ah.
body: Umm Habibah asked the prophet ﷺ about the blood (which flows beyond the period of menstruation). ‘A’ishah said: I saw her wash-tub full of blood. The apostle of Allah (May peace be upon him) said; Keep away (from prayer) equal (to the length of time) that your menses prevented you. Then wash yourself. Abu Dawud said: Qutaibah mentioned the name Jaftar b. Rabi’ah in the middle of the text of the tradition for the second time (i.e., Qutaibah, being doubtful about the narrator Jafar b. Rabi’ah, mentioned his name twice: once in the chain and again while reporting the text). Ali b. ‘Ayyash and yunus b. Muhammad reported it on the authority of al-Laith. They mentioned the name Jafar b. Rabi’ah.
arabic: إِنَّ أُمَّ حَبِيبَةَ سَأَلَتْ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ عَنِ الدَّمِ؟ وَقَالَتْ عَائِشَةُ رَأَيْتُ مِرْكَنَهَا مَلْآنَ دَمًا فَقَالَ لَهَا رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «امْكُثِي قَدْرَ مَا كَانَتْ تَحْبِسُكِ حَيْضَتُكِ ثُمَّ اغْتَسِلِي»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e al-Layth \u003e Yazīd b. Abū Ḥabīb \u003e Jaʿfar \u003e ʿIrāk \u003e ʿUrwah \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا اللَّيْثُ عَنْ يَزِيدَ بْنِ أَبِي حَبِيبٍ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ عَنْ عِرَاكِ عَنْ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 207

chapter.englishTitle: The purification from menstruation and postpartum bleeding

englishRaw: "That is (bleeding from) a vein, so when the time of menstruation comes, stop praying, and when it goes, then wash the blood from yourself then pray."
body: "That is (bleeding from) a vein, so when the time of menstruation comes, stop praying, and when it goes, then wash the blood from yourself then pray."
arabic: أَنَّهَا أَتَتِ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ فَذَكَرَتْ أَنَّهَا تُسْتَحَاضُ فَزَعَمَتْ أَنَّهُ قَالَ «إِنَّمَا ذَلِكَ عِرْقٌ فَإِذَا أَقْبَلَتِ الْحَيْضَةُ فَدَعِي الصَّلَاةَ وَإِذَا أَدْبَرَتْ فَاغْتَسِلِي وَاغْسِلِي عَنْكِ الدَّمَ ثُمَّ صَلِّي»
chain: ʿImrān b. Yazīd \u003e Ismāʿīl b. ʿAbdullāh \u003e al-Awzāʿī \u003e Yaḥyá b. Saʿīd \u003e Hishām b. ʿUrwah \u003e ʿUrwah \u003e Fāṭimah Āb.ah Qays from Banī Asad Quraysh
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عِمْرَانُ بْنُ يَزِيدَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا الْأَوْزَاعِيُّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي هِشَامُ بْنُ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ فَاطِمَةَ ابْنَةَ قَيْسٍ مِنْ بَنِي أَسَدِ قُرَيْشٍ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 208

chapter.englishTitle: The purification from menstruation and postpartum bleeding

englishRaw: "When the time of menstruation comes, stop praying, and when it goes, perform Ghusl."
body: "When the time of menstruation comes, stop praying, and when it goes, perform Ghusl."
arabic: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ قَالَ «إِذَا أَقْبَلْتِ الْحَيْضَةُ فَاتْرُكِي الصَّلَاةَ فَإِذَا أَدْبَرَتْ فَاغْتَسِلِي»
chain: Hishām b. ʿAmmār \u003e Sahl b. Hāshim \u003e al-Awzāʿī \u003e al-Zuhrī \u003e ʿUrwah \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا هِشَامُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سَهْلُ بْنُ هَاشِمٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا الْأَوْزَاعِيُّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا الزُّهْرِيِّ عَنْ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 209

chapter.englishTitle: The purification from menstruation and postpartum bleeding

englishRaw: "Umm Habibah bint Jahsh suffered Istihadah (non-menstrual vaginal bleeding) for seven years. She complained about that to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'That is not menstruation; rather that is (bleeding from) a vein, so perform Ghusl then pray.'"
body: "Umm Habibah bint Jahsh suffered Istihadah (non-menstrual vaginal bleeding) for seven years. She complained about that to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'That is not menstruation; rather that is (bleeding from) a vein, so perform Ghusl then pray.'"
arabic: قَالَتِ اسْتُحِيضَتْ أُمُّ حَبِيبَةَ بِنْتُ جَحْشٍ سَبْعَ سِنِينَ فَاشْتَكَتْ ذَلِكَ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «إِنَّ هَذِهِ لَيْسَتْ بِالْحَيْضَةِ وَلَكِنْ هَذَا عِرْقٌ فَاغْتَسِلِي ثُمَّ صَلِّي»
chain: ʿImrān b. Yazīd \u003e Ismāʿīl b. ʿAbdullāh \u003e al-Awzāʿī \u003e al-Zuhrī \u003e ʿUrwah And ʿUmrah \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عِمْرَانُ بْنُ يَزِيدَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا الْأَوْزَاعِيُّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا الزُّهْرِيُّ عَنْ عُرْوَةَ وَعُمْرَةَ أَنَّ عَائِشَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 210

chapter.englishTitle: The purification from menstruation and postpartum bleeding

englishRaw: "Umm Habibah bint Jahsh- the wife of 'Abdur-Rahman bin 'Awf and the sister of Zainab bint Jahsh - suffered Istihadah (non-mentrual vaginal bleeding)." She said: "She consulted the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to her: 'That is not menstruation, rather that is a vein. When you period goes, perform Ghusl and pray, and when it comes, stop praying (for that period).'" 'Aishah said: "She used to perform Ghusl for every prayer and pray. Sometimes she would perform Ghusl in a washtub in the room of her sister Zainab when she was with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and the water would turn red with blood, then she would go out and pray with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. That did not stop her from praying."
body: "Umm Habibah bint Jahsh- the wife of 'Abdur-Rahman bin 'Awf and the sister of Zainab bint Jahsh - suffered Istihadah (non-mentrual vaginal bleeding)." She said: "She consulted the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to her: 'That is not menstruation, rather that is a vein. When you period goes, perform Ghusl and pray, and when it comes, stop praying (for that period).'" 'Aishah said: "She used to perform Ghusl for every prayer and pray. Sometimes she would perform Ghusl in a washtub in the room of her sister Zainab when she was with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and the water would turn red with blood, then she would go out and pray with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. That did not stop her from praying."
arabic: قَالَتِ اسْتُحِيضَتْ أُمُّ حَبِيبَةَ بِنْتُ جَحْشٍ امْرَأَةُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ عَوْفٍ وَهِيَ أُخْتُ زَيْنَبَ بِنْتِ جَحْشٍ فَاسْتَفْتَتْ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «إِنَّ هَذِهِ لَيْسَتْ بِالْحَيْضَةِ وَلَكِنْ هَذَا عِرْقٌ فَإِذَا أَدْبَرَتِ الْحَيْضَةُ فَاغْتَسِلِي وَصَلِّي وَإِذَا أَقْبَلَتْ فَاتْرُكِي لَهَا الصَّلَاةَ» قَالَتْ عَائِشَةُ فَكَانَتْ تَغْتَسِلُ لِكُلِّ صَلَاةٍ وَتُصَلِّي وَكَانَتْ تَغْتَسِلُ أَحْيَانًا فِي مِرْكَنٍ فِي حُجْرَةِ أُخْتِهَا زَيْنَبَ وَهِيَ عِنْدَ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ حَتَّى إِنَّ حُمْرَةَ الدَّمِ لَتَعْلُو الْمَاءَ ثُمَّ تَخْرُجُ فَتُصَلِّي مَعَ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ فَمَا يَمْنَعُهَا ذَلِكَ مِنَ الصَّلَاةِ
chain: al-Rabīʿ b. Sulaymān b. Dāwud \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Yūsuf \u003e al-Haytham b. Ḥumayd \u003e al-Nuʿmān And al-Awzāʿī Waʾabū Muʿayd Wahū Ḥafṣ b. Ghaylān \u003e al-Zuhrī \u003e ʿUrwah b. al-Zubayr Waʿumrah b. ʿAbd al-Raḥman \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا الرَّبِيعُ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنُ دَاوُدَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ يُوسُفَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا الْهَيْثَمُ بْنُ حُمَيْدٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي النُّعْمَانُ وَالْأَوْزَاعِيُّ وَأَبُو مُعَيْدٍ وَهُوَ حَفْصُ بْنُ غَيْلَانَ عَنِ الزُّهْرِيِّ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي عُرْوَةُ بْنُ الزُّبَيْرِ وَعُمْرَةُ بِنْتُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 211

chapter.englishTitle: The purification from menstruation and postpartum bleeding

englishRaw: Umm Habibah, daughter of Jahsh and sister-in-law of Messenger of Allah ﷺm and wife of 'Abd al-Rahman b. 'Awf, had a prolonged flow of blood for seven years. She inquired from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about it. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: This is not menstruation, but this (due to) a vein. Therefore, wash yourself and pray. Abu Dawud said: In this tradition which is transmitted by al-Zuhri from 'Urwah and 'Urwah on the authority of 'Aishah, al-Awza'i added: She ('Aishah) said: Umm Habibah daughter of Jahsh and wife of 'Abd al-Rahman b. 'Awf had a prolonged flow of blood for seven years. The Prophet ﷺ commander her saying: When the menstruation begins, abandon prayer; when it is finished, take a bath and pray. Abu Dawud said: None of the disciple of al-Zuhri mentioned these words except al-Awza'i, from al-Zuhri it has been narrated by 'Amr b. al-Harith, al-Laith, Yunus, Ibn Abi Dhi'b, Ma'mar, Ibrahim b. Sa'd, Sulaiman b. Kathir, Ibn Ishaq and Sufyan b. 'Uyainah, they did not narrate these words. Abu Dawud said: These are the words of the version reported by Hisham b. 'Urwah from this father on the authority of 'Aishah. Abu Dawud said: In this tradition Ibn 'Uyainah also added the words: He commander her to abandon prayer during her menstrual period. This is a misunderstanding on the part of Ibn 'Uyainah. The version of this tradition narrated by Muhammad b. 'Amr from al-Zuhri has the addition similar to that made by al-Awza'i in his version.
body: Umm Habibah, daughter of Jahsh and sister-in-law of Messenger of Allah ﷺm and wife of 'Abd al-Rahman b. 'Awf, had a prolonged flow of blood for seven years. She inquired from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about it. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: This is not menstruation, but this (due to) a vein. Therefore, wash yourself and pray. Abu Dawud said: In this tradition which is transmitted by al-Zuhri from 'Urwah and 'Urwah on the authority of 'Aishah, al-Awza'i added: She ('Aishah) said: Umm Habibah daughter of Jahsh and wife of 'Abd al-Rahman b. 'Awf had a prolonged flow of blood for seven years. The Prophet ﷺ commander her saying: When the menstruation begins, abandon prayer; when it is finished, take a bath and pray. Abu Dawud said: None of the disciple of al-Zuhri mentioned these words except al-Awza'i, from al-Zuhri it has been narrated by 'Amr b. al-Harith, al-Laith, Yunus, Ibn Abi Dhi'b, Ma'mar, Ibrahim b. Sa'd, Sulaiman b. Kathir, Ibn Ishaq and Sufyan b. 'Uyainah, they did not narrate these words. Abu Dawud said: These are the words of the version reported by Hisham b. 'Urwah from this father on the authority of 'Aishah. Abu Dawud said: In this tradition Ibn 'Uyainah also added the words: He commander her to abandon prayer during her menstrual period. This is a misunderstanding on the part of Ibn 'Uyainah. The version of this tradition narrated by Muhammad b. 'Amr from al-Zuhri has the addition similar to that made by al-Awza'i in his version.
arabic: أَنَّ أُمَّ حَبِيبَةَ خَتَنَةَ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ وَتَحْتَ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ عَوْفٍ اسْتُحِيضَتْ سَبْعَ سِنِينَ فَاسْتَفْتَتْ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ فِي ذَلِكَ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «إِنَّ هَذِهِ لَيْسَتْ بِالْحَيْضَةِ وَلَكِنْ هَذَا عِرْقٌ فَاغْتَسِلِي وَصَلِّي»
chain: Muḥammad b. Salamah \u003e Ibn Wahb \u003e ʿAmr b. al-Ḥārith \u003e Ibn Shihāb \u003e ʿUrwah Waʿumrah \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ سَلَمَةَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ وَهْبٍ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ الْحَارِثِ عَنِ ابْنِ شِهَابٍ عَنْ عُرْوَةَ وَعُمْرَةَ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 212

chapter.englishTitle: The purification from menstruation and postpartum bleeding

englishRaw: It was narrated from 'Aishah that a woman who suffered from Istihadah during the time of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was told that it was a stubborn vein (i.e., one that would not stop bleeding). She was told to delay Zuhr and bring 'Asr forward, and to perform one Ghusl for both, and to delay Maghrib and bring 'Isha' forward, and to perform one Ghusl for both, and to perform one Ghusl for Subh.
body: It was narrated from 'Aishah that a woman who suffered from Istihadah during the time of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was told that it was a stubborn vein (i.e., one that would not stop bleeding). She was told to delay Zuhr and bring 'Asr forward, and to perform one Ghusl for both, and to delay Maghrib and bring 'Isha' forward, and to perform one Ghusl for both, and to perform one Ghusl for Subh.
arabic: أَنَّ امْرَأَةً مُسْتَحَاضَةً عَلَى عَهْدِ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ قِيلَ لَهَا إِنَّهُ عِرْقُ عَانِدٌ وَأُمِرَتْ أَنْ تُؤَخِّرَ الظُّهْرَ وَتُعَجِّلَ الْعَصْرَ وَتَغْتَسِلَ لَهُمَا غُسْلًا وَاحِدًا وَتُؤَخِّرَ الْمَغْرِبَ وَتُعَجِّلَ الْعِشَاءَ وَتَغْتَسِلَ لَهُمَا غُسْلًا وَاحِدًا وَتَغْتَسِلَ لِصَلَاةِ الصُّبْحِ غُسْلًا وَاحِدًا
chain: Muḥammad b. Bashhār \u003e Muḥammad \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. al-Qāsim from his father \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدٌ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ الْقَاسِمِ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 213

chapter.englishTitle: The mention/recitation of the Aqra'.

englishRaw: "That is not menstruation, rather it is a vein. Tell her not to pray for the amount of time that her period used to last, then let her perform Ghusl and pray.' She used to perform Ghusl for every prayer.
body: "That is not menstruation, rather it is a vein. Tell her not to pray for the amount of time that her period used to last, then let her perform Ghusl and pray.' She used to perform Ghusl for every prayer.
arabic: أَنَّ أُمَّ حَبِيبَةَ بِنْتَ جَحْشٍ كَانَتْ تُسْتَحَاضُ سَبْعَ سِنِينَ فَسَأَلْتِ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ؟ فَقَالَ «لَيْسَتْ بِالْحَيْضَةِ إِنَّمَا هُوَ عِرْقٌ فَأَمَرَهَا أَنْ تَتْرُكَ الصَّلَاةَ قَدْرَ أَقْرَائِهَا وَحَيْضَتِهَا وَتَغْتَسِلَ وَتُصَلِّي فَكَانَتْ تَغْتَسِلُ عِنْدَ كُلِّ صَلَاةٍ»
chain: Muḥammad b. al-Muthanná \u003e Sufyān \u003e al-Zuhrī \u003e ʿAmrah \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ عَنِ الزُّهْرِيِّ عَنْ عَمْرَةَ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 214

chapter.englishTitle: The mention/recitation of the Aqra'.

englishRaw: Urwah ibn az-Zubayr said that Fatimah daughter of AbuHubaysh narrated to him that she asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and complained to him about the flowing of (her) blood. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to her: That is only (due to) a vein: look, when your menstruation comes, do not pray; and when your menstruation ends, wash yourself and then offer prayer during the period from one menstruation to another.
body: Urwah ibn az-Zubayr said that Fatimah daughter of AbuHubaysh narrated to him that she asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and complained to him about the flowing of (her) blood. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to her: That is only (due to) a vein: look, when your menstruation comes, do not pray; and when your menstruation ends, wash yourself and then offer prayer during the period from one menstruation to another.
arabic: أَنَّهَا أَتَتْ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ فَشَكَتْ إِلَيْهِ الدَّمَ فَقَالَ لَهَا رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «إِنَّمَا ذَلِكَ عِرْقٌ فَانْظُرِي إِذَا أَتَاكِ قُرْؤُكِ فَلَا تُصَلِّي فَإِذَا مَرَّ قُرْؤُكِ فَتَطَهَّرِي ثُمَّ صَلِّي مَا بَيْنَ الْقُرْءِ إِلَى الْقُرْءِ»
chain: ʿĪsá b. Ḥammād \u003e al-Layth \u003e Yazīd b. Abū Ḥabīb \u003e Bukayr b. ʿAbdullāh b. al-Ashaj \u003e al-Mundhir b. al-Mughīrah \u003e ʿUrwah \u003e Fāṭimah b. Abū Ḥubaysh
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عِيسَى بْنُ حَمَّادٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا اللَّيْثُ عَنْ يَزِيدَ بْنِ أَبِي حَبِيبٍ عَنْ بُكَيْرِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ الْأَشَجِّ عَنِ الْمُنْذِرِ بْنِ الْمُغِيرَةِ عَنْ عُرْوَةَ أَنَّ فَاطِمَةَ بِنْتَ أَبِي حُبَيْشٍ حَدَّثَتْهُ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 215

chapter.englishTitle: The distinction between menstrual blood and istihadah.

englishRaw: "If it is menstrual blood then it is blood that is black and recognizable, so stop prying, and if it is other than that then perform Wudu', for it is just a vein."
body: "If it is menstrual blood then it is blood that is black and recognizable, so stop prying, and if it is other than that then perform Wudu', for it is just a vein."
arabic: لَهَا رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «إِذَا كَانَ دَمُ الْحَيْضِ فَإِنَّهُ دَمٌ أَسْوَدُ يُعْرَفُ فَأَمْسِكِي عَنِ الصَّلَاةِ فَإِذَا كَانَ الْآخَرُ فَتَوَضَّئِي فَإِنَّمَا هُوَ عِرْقٌ» قَالَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ أَبِي عَدِيٍّ هَذَا مِنْ كِتَابِهِ
chain: Muḥammad b. al-Muthanná \u003e Ibn By ʿAdī \u003e Muḥammad / Ibn ʿAmr b. ʿAlqamah b. Waqqāṣ \u003e Ibn Shihāb \u003e ʿUrwah b. al-Zubayr \u003e Fāṭimah b. Abū Ḥubaysh \u003e Kānat Tustaḥāḍ
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا ابْنُ أبي عَدِيٍّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدٍ وَهُوَ ابْنُ عَمْرِو بْنِ عَلْقَمَةَ بْنِ وَقَّاصٍ عَنِ ابْنِ شِهَابٍ عَنْ عُرْوَةَ بْنِ الزُّبَيْرِ عَنْ فَاطِمَةَ بِنْتِ أَبِي حُبَيْشٍ أَنَّهَا كَانَتْ تُسْتَحَاضُ فَقَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 216

chapter.englishTitle: The distinction between menstrual blood and istihadah.

englishRaw: Urwah ibn az-Zubayr reported from Fatimah daughter of AbuHubaysh that her blood kept flowing, so the Prophet ﷺ said to her: When the blood of the menses comes, it is black blood which can be recognised; so when that comes, refrain from prayer; but when a different type of blood comes, perform ablution and pray, for it is (due only to) a vein. Abu Dawud said: Ibn al-Muthanna narrates this tradition from his book on the authority of Ibn 'Adi in a similar way. Later on he transmitted it to us from his memory: Muhammad b. 'Amr reported to us from al-Zuhri from 'Urwah on the authority of 'Aishah who said: Fatimah used to have her blood flowing. He then reported the tradition conveying the same meaning. Abu Dawud said: Anas b. Sirin reported from Ibn 'Abbas about the woman who has a prolonged flow of blood. He said: If she sees thick blood, she should not pray; if she finds herself purified even for a moment, she should was an pray. Makhul said: Menses are not hidden from women. Their blood is black and thick. When it (blackness and thickness) goes away and there appears yellowness and liquidness, that is the flow of blood (from vein). She should wash and pray. Abu Dawud said: This tradition has been transmitted by Sa'id b. al-Musayyab through a different chain of narrators, saying: The woman who has a prolonged flow of blood should abandon prayer when the menstruation begins; when it is finished, she should wash and pray. Sumayy and others have also reported it from Sa'id b. al-Musayyab. This version adds: She should refrain (from prayer) during her menstrual period. Hammad b. Salamah has reported it similarly from Yahya b. Sa'id on the authority of Sa'id b. al-Musayyab. Abu Dawud said: Yunus has reported from Al-Hasan: When the bleeding of a menstruating woman extends (beyond the normal period), she should refrain (from prayer), after her menses are over, for one or two days. Now she becomes the woman who has a prolonged flow of blood. Al-Taimi reported from Qatadah: If her menstrual period is prolonged by five days, she should pray. Al-Taimi said: I kept on reducing (the number of days) until I reached two days. He said: If the period extends by two days, they will be counted from the menstrual period. When Ibn Sirin was questioned about it, he said: Women have better knowledge of that.
body: Urwah ibn az-Zubayr reported from Fatimah daughter of AbuHubaysh that her blood kept flowing, so the Prophet ﷺ said to her: When the blood of the menses comes, it is black blood which can be recognised; so when that comes, refrain from prayer; but when a different type of blood comes, perform ablution and pray, for it is (due only to) a vein. Abu Dawud said: Ibn al-Muthanna narrates this tradition from his book on the authority of Ibn 'Adi in a similar way. Later on he transmitted it to us from his memory: Muhammad b. 'Amr reported to us from al-Zuhri from 'Urwah on the authority of 'Aishah who said: Fatimah used to have her blood flowing. He then reported the tradition conveying the same meaning. Abu Dawud said: Anas b. Sirin reported from Ibn 'Abbas about the woman who has a prolonged flow of blood. He said: If she sees thick blood, she should not pray; if she finds herself purified even for a moment, she should was an pray. Makhul said: Menses are not hidden from women. Their blood is black and thick. When it (blackness and thickness) goes away and there appears yellowness and liquidness, that is the flow of blood (from vein). She should wash and pray. Abu Dawud said: This tradition has been transmitted by Sa'id b. al-Musayyab through a different chain of narrators, saying: The woman who has a prolonged flow of blood should abandon prayer when the menstruation begins; when it is finished, she should wash and pray. Sumayy and others have also reported it from Sa'id b. al-Musayyab. This version adds: She should refrain (from prayer) during her menstrual period. Hammad b. Salamah has reported it similarly from Yahya b. Sa'id on the authority of Sa'id b. al-Musayyab. Abu Dawud said: Yunus has reported from Al-Hasan: When the bleeding of a menstruating woman extends (beyond the normal period), she should refrain (from prayer), after her menses are over, for one or two days. Now she becomes the woman who has a prolonged flow of blood. Al-Taimi reported from Qatadah: If her menstrual period is prolonged by five days, she should pray. Al-Taimi said: I kept on reducing (the number of days) until I reached two days. He said: If the period extends by two days, they will be counted from the menstrual period. When Ibn Sirin was questioned about it, he said: Women have better knowledge of that.
arabic: رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «إِنَّ دَمَ الْحَيْضِ دَمٌ أَسْوَدٌ يُعْرَفُ فَإِذَا كَانَ ذَلِكَ فَأَمْسِكِي عَنِ الصَّلَاةِ وَإِذَا كَانَ الْآخَرُ فَتَوَضَّئِي وَصَلِّي»
chain: Muḥammad b. al-Muthanná \u003e Ibn Abū ʿAdī from Ḥifẓih \u003e Muḥammad b. ʿAmr \u003e Ibn Shihāb \u003e ʿUrwah \u003e ʿĀʾishah \u003e Fāṭimah b. Abū Ḥubaysh Kānat Tustaḥāḍ
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ أَبِي عَدِيٍّ مِنْ حِفْظِهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَمْرٍو عَنِ ابْنِ شِهَابٍ عَنْ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ أَنَّ فَاطِمَةَ بِنْتَ أَبِي حُبَيْشٍ كَانَتْ تُسْتَحَاضُ فَقَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 217

chapter.englishTitle: The distinction between menstrual blood and istihadah.

englishRaw: "Fatimah bint Abi Hubaish suffered from Istihadah and she asked the Prophet ﷺ: 'O Messenger of Allah, I suffer from Istihadah and I do not become pure; should I stop praying?' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'That is a vein and is not menstruation. When your period comes, stop praying, and when it goes wash the traces of blood from yourself and perform Wudu'. That is a vein and is not menstruation.'" It was said to him: "What about Ghusl?' He ﷺ said: "no one doubts that." Abu 'Abdur-Rahman said: "I do not know anyone who mentioned 'and perform Wudu' in this Hadith except Hammad bin Zaid, for some others have reported it from Hisham, and they did not mention 'and perform Wudu' in it."
body: "Fatimah bint Abi Hubaish suffered from Istihadah and she asked the Prophet ﷺ: 'O Messenger of Allah, I suffer from Istihadah and I do not become pure; should I stop praying?' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'That is a vein and is not menstruation. When your period comes, stop praying, and when it goes wash the traces of blood from yourself and perform Wudu'. That is a vein and is not menstruation.'" It was said to him: "What about Ghusl?' He ﷺ said: "no one doubts that." Abu 'Abdur-Rahman said: "I do not know anyone who mentioned 'and perform Wudu' in this Hadith except Hammad bin Zaid, for some others have reported it from Hisham, and they did not mention 'and perform Wudu' in it."
arabic: اسْتُحِيضَتْ فَاطِمَةُ بِنْتُ أَبِي حُبَيْشٍ فَسَأَلَتِ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ فَقَالَتْ يَا رَسُولَ اللهِ إِنِّي أُسْتَحَاضُ فَلَا أَطْهُرُ أَفَأَدَعُ الصَّلَاةَ؟ فقَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «إِنَّمَا ذَلِكَ عِرْقٌ وَلَيْسَتْ بِالْحَيْضَةِ فَإِذَا أَقْبَلَتِ الْحَيْضَةُ فَدَعِي الصَّلَاةَ فَإِذَا أَدْبَرَتْ فَاغْسِلِي عَنْكِ أَثَرَ الدَّمِ وَتَوَضَّئِي فَإِنَّمَا ذَلِكَ عِرْقٌ وَلَيْسَتْ بِالْحَيْضَةِ» قِيلَ لَهُ فَالْغُسْلُ قَالَ وذَلِكَ يَشُكُّ فِيهِ أَحَدٌ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ لَا أَعْلَمُ أَحَدًا ذَكَرَ فِي هَذَا الْحَدِيثِ «وَتَوَضَّئِي» غَيْرَ حَمَّادِ بْنِ زَيْدٍ وَقَدْ رَوَى غَيْرُ وَاحِدٍ عَنْ هِشَامٍ وَلَمْ يَذْكُرْ فِيهِ وَتَوَضَّئِي
chain: Yaḥyá b. Ḥabīb b. ʿArabī \u003e Ḥammād \u003e Hishām from his father \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ حَبِيبِ بْنِ عَرَبِيٍّ عَنْ حَمَّادٍ عَنْ هِشَامٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 218

chapter.englishTitle: The distinction between menstrual blood and istihadah.

englishRaw: "O Messenger of Allah, I am not in a state of purification, so should I abandon prayer?" He said, "It is only menstruation." Khaled said in what I have read to him, "It is not considered as menstruation. So when the menstruation starts, leave the prayer, and when it ends, wash off the blood and then perform the prayer." Abu Abdur Rahman said, this hadith is narrated by Malik from Hisham from his father from Aisha, and it is the most authentic narration regarding menstruation. Also, Sulaiman narrated from Umm Salama, he did not hear it from Umm Salama, but there was a man between them.
body: "O Messenger of Allah, I am not in a state of purification, so should I abandon prayer?" He said, "It is only menstruation." Khaled said in what I have read to him, "It is not considered as menstruation. So when the menstruation starts, leave the prayer, and when it ends, wash off the blood and then perform the prayer." Abu Abdur Rahman said, this hadith is narrated by Malik from Hisham from his father from Aisha, and it is the most authentic narration regarding menstruation. Also, Sulaiman narrated from Umm Salama, he did not hear it from Umm Salama, but there was a man between them.
arabic: يَا رَسُولَ اللهِ إِنِّي لَا أَطْهُرُ أَفَأَتْرُكُ الصَّلَاةَ؟ قَالَ «إِنَّمَا هُوَ عِرْقٌ» قَالَ خَالِدٌ فِيمَا قَرَأْتُ عَلَيْهِ «وَلَيْسَتْ بِالْحَيْضَةِ فَإِذَا أَقْبَلَتِ الْحَيْضَةُ فَدَعِي الصَّلَاةَ وَإِذَا أَدْبَرَتْ فَاغْسِلِي عَنْكِ الدَّمَ ثم صَلِّي» قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ حَدِيثُ مَالِكٍ عَنْ هِشَامٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ أَصَحُّ مَا يَأْتِي فِي الْمُسْتَحَاضَةِ وَحَدِيثُ سُلَيْمَانَ عَنْ أُمِّ سَلَمَةَ لَمْ يَسْمَعْهُ مِنْ أُمِّ سَلَمَةَ بَيْنَهُمَا رَجُلٌ
chain: Abū al-Ashʿath \u003e Khālid b. al-Ḥārith \u003e Hishām from his father \u003e ʿĀʾishah \u003e Ābinh Abū Ḥubaysh
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو الْأَشْعَثِ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا خَالِدُ بْنُ الْحَارِثِ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ هِشَامًا يُحَدِّثُ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ أَنَّ ابِنْة أَبِي حُبَيْشٍ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 219

chapter.englishTitle: Postnatal washing

englishRaw: "Tell her to perform Ghusl and enter Ihram."
body: "Tell her to perform Ghusl and enter Ihram."
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ قَالَ لِأَبِي بَكْرٍ «مُرْهَا أَنْ تَغْتَسِلَ وَتُهِلَّ»
chain: Muḥammad b. Qudāmah \u003e Jarīr \u003e Yaḥyá b. Saʿīd \u003e Jaʿfar b. Muḥammad from his father
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ قُدَامَةَ عَنْ جَرِيرٍ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ جَابِرِ فِي حَدِيثِ أَسْمَاءَ حِينَ نُفِسْتِ بِذِي الْحُلَيْفَةِ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 220

chapter.arabicTitle: النَّهْيُ عَنِ الْبَوْلِ فِي الْمَاءِ الرَّاكِدِ وَالِاغْتِسَالِ مِنْهُ
chapter.englishTitle: Prohibition of urinating in stagnant water and bathing from it

englishRaw: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade urinating into standing water then performing Ghusl with it.
body: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade urinating into standing water then performing Ghusl with it.
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ «نَهَى أَنْ يَبُولَ الرَّجُلُ فِي الْمَاءِ الرَّاكِدِ ثُمَّ يَغْتَسِلُ مِنْهُ»
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿAbdullāh b. Yazīd \u003e Sufyān \u003e Abū al-Zinād \u003e Mūsá b. Abū ʿUthmān from his father \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنُ يَزِيدَ عَنْ سُفْيَانَ عَنْ أَبِي الزِّنَادِ عَنْ مُوسَى بْنِ أَبِي عُثْمَانَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 221

chapter.englishTitle: Nighttime Washing

englishRaw: "I entered upon 'Aishah and asked her: 'Did the Messenger of Allah ﷺ perform Ghusl at the beginning of the night or at the end?' She said: 'Both. Sometimes he performed Ghusl at the beginning and sometimes at the end.' I said: 'Praise be to Allah who has made the matter flexible.'"
body: "I entered upon 'Aishah and asked her: 'Did the Messenger of Allah ﷺ perform Ghusl at the beginning of the night or at the end?' She said: 'Both. Sometimes he performed Ghusl at the beginning and sometimes at the end.' I said: 'Praise be to Allah who has made the matter flexible.'"
arabic: دَخَلْتُ عَلَى عَائِشَةَ فَسَأَلْتُهَا فَقُلْتُ أَكَانَ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ يَغْتَسِلُ مِنْ أَوَّلِ اللَّيْلِ أَوْ مِنْ آخِرِهِ؟ قَالَتْ كُلُّ ذَلِكَ رُبَّمَا اغْتَسَلَ مِنْ أَوَّلِهِ وَرُبَّمَا اغْتَسَلَ مِنْ آخِرِهِ قُلْتُ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي جَعَلَ فِي الْأَمْرِ سَعَةً
chain: Yaḥyá b. Ḥabīb b. ʿArabī \u003e Ḥammād \u003e Barad \u003e ʿUbādah b. Nusay \u003e Ghuḍayf b. al-Ḥārith
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ حَبِيبِ بْنِ عَرَبِيٍّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادُ عَنْ بَرَدِ عَنْ عُبَادَةَ بْنُ نُسَيٍّ عَنْ غُضَيْفِ بْنِ الْحَارِثِ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 222

chapter.englishTitle: Nighttime Washing

englishRaw: "Sometimes he performed Ghusl at the beginning of the night and sometimes he performed Ghusl at the end." I said: "Praise be to Allah Who has made the matter flexible."
body: "Sometimes he performed Ghusl at the beginning of the night and sometimes he performed Ghusl at the end." I said: "Praise be to Allah Who has made the matter flexible."
arabic: عَنْ أَيُّ اللَّيْلِ كَانَ يَغْتَسِلُ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ قَالَتْ رُبَّمَا اغْتَسَلَ أَوَّلَ اللَّيْلِ وَرُبَّمَا اغْتَسَلَ آخِرَهُ قُلْتُ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي جَعَلَ فِي الْأَمْرِ سَعَةً
chain: ʿAmr b. Hishām \u003e Makhlad \u003e Sufyān \u003e Abū al-ʿAlāʾ \u003e ʿUbādah b. Nusay \u003e Ghuḍayf b. al-Ḥārith
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ هِشَامٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مَخْلَدٌ عَنْ سُفْيَانَ عَنْ أَبِي الْعَلَاءِ عَنْ عُبَادَةَ بْنِ نُسَيٍّ عَنْ غُضَيْفِ بْنِ الْحَارِثِ أَنَّهُ سَأَلَ عَائِشَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 223

chapter.englishTitle: Covering when showering

englishRaw: "I used to serve the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and when he wanted to perform Ghusl he said: 'Turn your back.' So I turned my back to him and concealed him."
body: "I used to serve the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and when he wanted to perform Ghusl he said: 'Turn your back.' So I turned my back to him and concealed him."
arabic: كُنْتُ أَخْدُمُ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ فَكَانَ إِذَا أَرَادَ أَنْ يَغْتَسِلَ قَالَ «وَلِّنِي قَفَاكَ فَأُوَلِّيهِ قَفَايَ فَأَسْتُرُهُ بِهِ»
chain: Mujāhid b. Mūsá \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman \u003e Yaḥyá b. al-Walīd \u003e Muḥil b. Khalīfah \u003e Abū al-Samḥ
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُجَاهِدُ بْنُ مُوسَى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي يَحْيَى بْنُ الْوَلِيدِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي مُحِلُّ بْنُ خَلِيفَةَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو السَّمْحِ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 224

chapter.englishTitle: Covering when showering

englishRaw: "Who is this?" She said: "Umm Hani'." When he had finished his Ghusl he stood up and prayed eight Rak'ahs wrapped in a garment.
body: "Who is this?" She said: "Umm Hani'." When he had finished his Ghusl he stood up and prayed eight Rak'ahs wrapped in a garment.
arabic: أَنَّهَا ذَهَبَتْ إِلَى النَّبِيِّ ﷺ يَوْمَ الْفَتْحِ فَوَجَدْتُهُ يَغْتَسِلُ وَفَاطِمَةُ تَسْتُرُهُ بِثَوْبٍ فَسَلَّمْتُ فَقَالَ «مَنْ هَذَا؟» قُلْتُ أُمُّ هَانِئٍ فَلَمَّا فَرَغَ مِنْ غُسْلِهِ قَامَ فَصَلَّى ثَمَانِيَ رَكَعَاتٍ فِي ثَوْبٍ مُلْتَحِفًا بِهِ
chain: Yaʿqūb b. Ibrāhīm \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman \u003e Mālik \u003e Sālim \u003e Abū Murrah a freed slave of ʿUqayl b. Abū Ṭālib \u003e Um Hāniʾ
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا يَعْقُوبُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ عَنْ مَالِكٍ عَنْ سَالِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي مُرَّةَ مَوْلَى عُقَيْلِ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ عَنْ أُمِّ هَانِئٍ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 225

chapter.arabicTitle: الْقَدْرُ الَّذِي يَكْتَفِي بِهِ الرَّجُلُ مِنَ الْمَاءِ لِلْغُسْلِ
chapter.englishTitle: The amount of water needed by a person for ablution.

englishRaw: That the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to perform ablution like this.
body: That the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to perform ablution like this.
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ «كَانَ يَغْتَسِلُ بِمِثْلِ هَذَا»
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿUbayd \u003e Yaḥyá b. Zakariyyā \u003e Mūsá al-Juhanī \u003e Utī Mujāhid Biqadaḥ Ḥazartuh Thamāniyah Arṭāl \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عُبَيْدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ زَكَرِيَّا عَنْ مُوسَى الْجُهَنِيِّ قَالَ أُتِيَ مُجَاهِدٌ بِقَدَحٍ حَزَرْتُهُ ثَمَانِيَةَ أَرْطَالٍ فَقَالَ حَدَّثَتْنِي عَائِشَةُ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 226

chapter.arabicTitle: الْقَدْرُ الَّذِي يَكْتَفِي بِهِ الرَّجُلُ مِنَ الْمَاءِ لِلْغُسْلِ
chapter.englishTitle: The amount of water needed by a person for ablution.

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to bathe in a container called al-Qadah while standing.
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to bathe in a container called al-Qadah while standing.
arabic: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «يَغْتَسِلُ فِي الْقَدَحِ وَهُوَ الْفَرَقُ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e al-Layth \u003e Ibn Shihāb \u003e ʿUrwah \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا اللَّيْثُ عَنِ ابْنِ شِهَابٍ عَنْ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 227

chapter.arabicTitle: الْقَدْرُ الَّذِي يَكْتَفِي بِهِ الرَّجُلُ مِنَ الْمَاءِ لِلْغُسْلِ
chapter.englishTitle: The amount of water needed by a person for ablution.

englishRaw: "I heard Abu Salamah say: 'I entered upon 'Aishah and her foster-brother was with her. He asked her about the Ghusl of the Prophet ﷺ. She called for a vessel in which was a Sa' of water, then she concealed herself and performed Ghusl and poured water over her head three times.'"
body: "I heard Abu Salamah say: 'I entered upon 'Aishah and her foster-brother was with her. He asked her about the Ghusl of the Prophet ﷺ. She called for a vessel in which was a Sa' of water, then she concealed herself and performed Ghusl and poured water over her head three times.'"
arabic: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا سَلَمَةَ يَقُولُ دَخَلْتُ عَلَى عَائِشَةَ وَأَخُوهَا مِنَ الرَّضَاعَةِ فَسَأَلَهَا عَنْ غُسْلِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ؟ «فَدَعَتْ بِإِنَاءٍ فِيهِ قَدْرُ صَاعٍ فَسَتَرَتْ سِتْرًا فَأَفْرَغَتْ عَلَى رَأْسِهَا ثَلَاثًا»
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿAbd al-Aʿlá \u003e Khālid \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e Abū Bakr b. Ḥafṣ \u003e Abū Salamah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْأَعْلَى قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا خَالِدٌ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ عَنْ أَبِي بَكْرِ بْنِ حَفْصٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 228

chapter.arabicTitle: الْقَدْرُ الَّذِي يَكْتَفِي بِهِ الرَّجُلُ مِنَ الْمَاءِ لِلْغُسْلِ
chapter.englishTitle: The amount of water needed by a person for ablution.

englishRaw: "We argued about Ghusl in the presence of jabir in 'Abdullah, and Jabir said: 'One Sa' of water is sufficient for ghusl from Janabah.' We said: 'One Sa' is not enough and neither is two.' Jabir said: 'It was sufficient for one who was better than you and had more hair.'"
body: "We argued about Ghusl in the presence of jabir in 'Abdullah, and Jabir said: 'One Sa' of water is sufficient for ghusl from Janabah.' We said: 'One Sa' is not enough and neither is two.' Jabir said: 'It was sufficient for one who was better than you and had more hair.'"
arabic: جَابِرٌ يَكْفِي مِنَ الْغُسْلِ مِنَ الْجَنَابَةِ صَاعٌ مِنْ مَاءٍ قُلْنَا مَا يَكْفِي صَاعٌ وَلَا صَاعَانِ قَالَ جَابِرٌ قَدْ كَانَ يَكْفِي مَنْ كَانَ خَيْرًا مِنْكُمْ وَأَكْثَرَ شَعْرًا
chain: Qutaybah \u003e Abū al-Aḥwaṣ \u003e Abū Isḥāq \u003e Abū Jaʿfar
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْأَحْوَصِ عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ قَالَ تَمَارَيْنَا فِي الْغُسْلِ عِنْدَ جَابِرِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللهِ فَقَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 229

chapter.arabicTitle: اغْتِسَالُ الرَّجُلِ وَالْمَرْأَةِ مِنْ نِسَائِهِ مِنَ الْإِنَاءِ الْوَاحِدِ
chapter.englishTitle: The washing of men and women from their private utensil

englishRaw: The Prophet ﷺ and I used to take a bath from one container (of water).
body: The Prophet ﷺ and I used to take a bath from one container (of water).
arabic: «كُنْتُ أَغْتَسِلُ أَنَا وَرَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ مِنْ إِنَاءٍ وَاحِدٍ»
chain: ʿAmr b. ʿAlī \u003e Yaḥyá \u003e Sufyān \u003e Manṣūr \u003e Ibrāhīm \u003e al-Aswad \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ عَلِيٍّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي مَنْصُورٌ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنِ الْأَسْوَدِ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 230

chapter.arabicTitle: اغْتِسَالُ الرَّجُلِ وَالْمَرْأَةِ مِنْ نِسَائِهِ مِنَ الْإِنَاءِ الْوَاحِدِ
chapter.englishTitle: The washing of men and women from their private utensil

englishRaw: "I used to perform Ghusl with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ from one vessel, which was the size of a Faraq."
body: "I used to perform Ghusl with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ from one vessel, which was the size of a Faraq."
arabic: «كُنْتُ أَغْتَسِلُ أَنَا وَرَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ مِنْ إِنَاءٍ وَاحِدٍ وَهُوَ قَدْرُ الْفَرَقِ»
chain: Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm \u003e ʿAbd al-Razzāq \u003e Maʿmar And Ibn Jurayj \u003e al-Zuhrī \u003e ʿUrwah \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّزَّاقِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مَعْمَرٌ وَابْنُ جُرَيْجٍ عَنِ الزُّهْرِيِّ عَنْ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 231

chapter.arabicTitle: اغْتِسَالُ الرَّجُلِ وَالْمَرْأَةِ مِنْ نِسَائِهِ مِنَ الْإِنَاءِ الْوَاحِدِ
chapter.englishTitle: The washing of men and women from their private utensil

englishRaw: It was narrated from 'Aishah that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to perform Ghusl; he and I from a single vessel, both of us scooping water from it.
body: It was narrated from 'Aishah that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to perform Ghusl; he and I from a single vessel, both of us scooping water from it.
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ كَانَ «يَغْتَسِلُ وَأَنَا مِنْ إِنَاءٍ وَاحِدٍ نَغْتَرِفُ مِنْهُ جَمِيعًا»
chain: Qutaybah \u003e Mālik \u003e Hishām b. ʿUrwah from his father \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ عَنْ مَالِكٍ عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 232

chapter.arabicTitle: اغْتِسَالُ الرَّجُلِ وَالْمَرْأَةِ مِنْ نِسَائِهِ مِنَ الْإِنَاءِ الْوَاحِدِ
chapter.englishTitle: The washing of men and women from their private utensil

englishRaw: "I heard Al-Qasim narrating that 'Aishah said: 'I used to perform Ghusl, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and I from a single vessel, from Janabah.'"
body: "I heard Al-Qasim narrating that 'Aishah said: 'I used to perform Ghusl, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and I from a single vessel, from Janabah.'"
arabic: كُنْتُ «أَغْتَسِلُ أَنَا وَرَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ مِنْ إِنَاءٍ وَاحِدٍ منَ الْجَنَابَةِ»
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿAbd al-Aʿlá \u003e Khālid \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. al-Qāsim \u003e al-Qāsim \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْأَعْلَى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا خَالِدٌ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ الْقَاسِمِ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ الْقَاسِمَ يُحَدِّثُ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 233

chapter.arabicTitle: اغْتِسَالُ الرَّجُلِ وَالْمَرْأَةِ مِنْ نِسَائِهِ مِنَ الْإِنَاءِ الْوَاحِدِ
chapter.englishTitle: The washing of men and women from their private utensil

englishRaw: She and the Messenger of Allah used to take a bath from a single vessel.
body: She and the Messenger of Allah used to take a bath from a single vessel.
arabic: أَنَّهَا كَانَتْ «تَغْتَسِلُ وَرَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ مِنْ إِنَاءٍ وَاحِدٍ»
chain: Yaḥyá b. Mūsá \u003e Sufyān \u003e ʿAmr \u003e Jābir b. Zayd \u003e Ibn ʿAbbās \u003e Khālatī Maymūnah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ مُوسَى عَنْ سُفْيَانَ عَنْ عَمْرٍو عَنْ جَابِرِ بْنِ زَيْدٍ عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَتْنِي خَالَتِي مَيْمُونَةُ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 234

chapter.arabicTitle: اغْتِسَالُ الرَّجُلِ وَالْمَرْأَةِ مِنْ نِسَائِهِ مِنَ الْإِنَاءِ الْوَاحِدِ
chapter.englishTitle: The washing of men and women from their private utensil

englishRaw: Yes, "If it was a small container, you would see me and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ washing ourselves from a single vessel, pouring water onto our hands to cleanse them, and then pouring water onto ourselves." Al-A'raj said: "You don't mention the private parts and you don't care about them."
body: Yes, "If it was a small container, you would see me and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ washing ourselves from a single vessel, pouring water onto our hands to cleanse them, and then pouring water onto ourselves." Al-A'raj said: "You don't mention the private parts and you don't care about them."
arabic: نَعَمْ «إِذَا كَانَتْ كَيِّسَةً رَأَيْتُنِي وَرَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ نَغْتَسِلُ مِنْ مِرْكَنٍ وَاحِدٍ نُفِيضُ عَلَى أَيْدِينَا حَتَّى نُنَقِّيهَا ثُمَّ نُفِيضُ عَلَيْنَا الْمَاءَ» قَالَ الْأَعْرَجُ لَا تَذْكُرُ فَرْجًا وَلَا تُبَالِيهِ
chain: Sūwayd b. Naṣr \u003e ʿAbdullāh \u003e Saʿīd b. Yazīd \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. Hurmuz al-Aʿraj \u003e Nāʿim a freed slave of Um Salamah \u003e Um Salamah Suʾilat Ataghtasil al-Marʾah Maʿ al-a man
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا سُوَيْدُ بْنُ نَصْرٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ يَزِيدَ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ عَبْدَ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنَ هُرْمُزَ الْأَعْرَجَ يَقُولُ حَدَّثَنِي نَاعِمٌ مَوْلَى أُمِّ سَلَمَةَ أَنَّ أُمَّ سَلَمَةَ سُئِلَتْ أَتَغْتَسِلُ الْمَرْأَةَ مَعَ الرَّجُلِ؟ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 235

chapter.englishTitle: The prohibition of not showering due to being in a state of majo...

englishRaw: "I met a man who accompanied the Prophet ﷺ as Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him), accompanied him for four years. He said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade any one of us to comb his hair each day,[1] or to urinate in the place where he performs Ghusl, or for a man to perform Ghusl using the leftover water of a women, or a woman to perform Ghusl using the leftover water of a man - they should scoop it out together.'" [1] It is said this is to prevent him from making his physical appearance his main aim.
body: "I met a man who accompanied the Prophet ﷺ as Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him), accompanied him for four years. He said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade any one of us to comb his hair each day,[1] or to urinate in the place where he performs Ghusl, or for a man to perform Ghusl using the leftover water of a women, or a woman to perform Ghusl using the leftover water of a man - they should scoop it out together.'" [1] It is said this is to prevent him from making his physical appearance his main aim.
arabic: لَقِيتُ رَجُلًا صَحِبَ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ كَمَا صَحِبَهُ أَبُو هُرَيْرَةَ أَرْبَعَ سِنِينَ قَالَ «نَهَى رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ أَنْ يَمْتَشِطَ أَحَدُنَا كُلَّ يَوْمٍ أَوْ يَبُولَ فِي مُغْتَسَلِهِ أَوْ يَغْتَسِلَ الرَّجُلُ بِفَضْلِ الْمَرْأَةِ أَوِ الْمَرْأَةُ بِفَضْلِ الرَّجُلِ وَلْيَغْتَرِفَا جَمِيعًا»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Abū ʿAwānah \u003e Dāwud al-Awdī \u003e Ḥumayd b. ʿAbd al-Raḥman
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَوَانَةَ عَنْ دَاوُدَ الْأَوْدِيِّ عَنْ حُمَيْدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 236

chapter.englishTitle: The license in that

englishRaw: "I used to perform Ghusl - the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and I - from one vessel. He would compete with me and I would with him until he would say: 'Leave me some' and I would say: 'Leave me some.'"
body: "I used to perform Ghusl - the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and I - from one vessel. He would compete with me and I would with him until he would say: 'Leave me some' and I would say: 'Leave me some.'"
arabic: كُنْتُ أَغْتَسِلُ أَنَا وَرَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ مِنْ إِنَاءٍ وَاحِدٍ يُبَادِرُنِي وَأُبَادِرُهُ حَتَّى يَقُولَ «دَعِي لِي» وَأَقُولَ أَنَا دَعْ لِي
chain: Muḥammad b. Bashhār \u003e Muḥammad \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e ʿĀṣim \u003e Muʿādhah \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ عَنْ عَاصِمِ عَنْ مُعَاذَةَ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 237

chapter.arabicTitle: الِاغْتِسَالُ فِي الْقَصْعَةِ الَّتِي يُعْجَنُ فِيهَا
chapter.englishTitle: Washing in the basin where the dough is kneaded.

englishRaw: The Prophet and Maimunah took a bath from a single vessel, a large bowl in which they were some traces of dough.
body: The Prophet and Maimunah took a bath from a single vessel, a large bowl in which they were some traces of dough.
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ «اغْتَسَلَ هُوَ وَمَيْمُونَةُ مِنْ إِنَاءٍ وَاحِدٍ فِي قَصْعَةٍ فِيهَا أَثَرُ الْعَجِينِ»
chain: Muḥammad b. Bashhār \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman \u003e Ibrāhīm b. Nāfiʿ \u003e Ibn Abū Najīḥ \u003e Mujāhid \u003e Um Hāniʾ
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ نَافِعٍ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي نَجِيحٍ عَنْ مُجَاهِدٍ عَنْ أُمِّ هَانِئٍ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 238

chapter.arabicTitle: الرُّخْصَةُ فِي تَرْكِ الْمَرْأَةِ نَقْضَ ضَفْرِ رَأْسِهَا عِنْدَ اغْتِسَالِهَا مِنَ الْجَنَابَةِ
chapter.englishTitle: The license to break a woman's nail when washing her from impuri...

englishRaw: "I said: 'O Messenger of Allah, I am a woman with tightly braided hair; should I undo it when performing Ghusl from Janabah?' He said: 'No it is sufficient for you to pour three handfuls of water over your body.'"
body: "I said: 'O Messenger of Allah, I am a woman with tightly braided hair; should I undo it when performing Ghusl from Janabah?' He said: 'No it is sufficient for you to pour three handfuls of water over your body.'"
arabic: عَنْ أُمِّ سَلَمَةَ زَوْجِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ قَالَتْ قُلْتُ يَا رَسُولَ اللهِ إِنِّي امْرَأَةٌ شَدِيدَةُ ضَفْرِ رَأْسِي أَفَأَنْقُضُهُ عِنْدَ غَسْلِهِا مِنَ الْجَنَابَةِ؟ قَالَ «إِنَّمَا يَكْفِيكِ أَنْ تَحْفِنِي عَلَى رَأْسِكِ ثَلَاثَ حَفَنَاتٍ مِنْ مَاءٍ ثُمَّ تُفِيضِي عَلَى جَسَدِكِ»
chain: Sulaymān b. Manṣūr \u003e Sufyān \u003e Ayyūb b. Mūsá \u003e Saʿīd b. Abū Saʿīd \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Rāfiʿ
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ مَنْصُورٍ عَنْ سُفْيَانَ عَنْ أَيُّوبِ بْنِ مُوسَى عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ أَبِي سَعِيدٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ رَافِعٍ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 239

chapter.arabicTitle: إِزَالَةُ الْجُنُبِ الْأَذَى عَنْ جَسَدِهِ بَعْدَ غَسْلِهِ يَدَيْهِ ثَلَاثًا
chapter.englishTitle: Removing impurities from his body after washing his hands three ...

englishRaw: "A vessel would be brought to the prophet ﷺ then he would pour water on his hand three times and wash them, then he would pour water with his right hand onto his left and wash off whatever was on his thighs. Then he would wash his hands, rinse his mouth and nose, pour water on his head three times, then pour water over the rest of his body."
body: "A vessel would be brought to the prophet ﷺ then he would pour water on his hand three times and wash them, then he would pour water with his right hand onto his left and wash off whatever was on his thighs. Then he would wash his hands, rinse his mouth and nose, pour water on his head three times, then pour water over the rest of his body."
arabic: عَنْ غُسْلِ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ مِنَ الْجَنَابَةِ؟ فَقَالَتْ كَانَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ «يُؤْتَى بِإِنَاءٍ فَيُصَبُّ عَلَى يَدَيْهِ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ يَصُبُّ بِيَمِينِهِ عَلَى شِمَالِهِ فَيَغْسِلُ مَا عَلَى فَخِذَيْهِ ثُمَّ يَغْسِلُ يَدَيْهِ وَيُمَضْمِضُ وَيَسْتَنْشِقُ وَيَصُبُّ عَلَى رَأْسِهِ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ يُفِيضُ عَلَى سَائِرِ جَسَدِهِ»
chain: Maḥmūd b. Ghaylān \u003e al-Naḍr \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e ʿAṭāʾ b. al-Sāʾib \u003e Abū Salamah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مَحْمُودُ بْنُ غَيْلَانَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا النَّضْرُ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا شُعْبَةُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَطَاءُ بْنُ السَّائِبِ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا سَلَمَةَ أَنَّهُ دَخَلَ عَلَى عَائِشَةَ فَسَأَلَهَا

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 240

chapter.arabicTitle: إِزَالَةُ الْجُنُبِ الْأَذَى عَنْ جَسَدِهِ بَعْدَ غَسْلِهِ يَدَيْهِ ثَلَاثًا
chapter.englishTitle: Removing impurities from his body after washing his hands three ...

englishRaw: "Aishah described how the Prophet ﷺ performed Ghusl for Janabah. She said: 'He used to wash his hands three times, then pour water with his right hand onto his left and wash his private part and whatever was on it.' - (One of the narrators) 'Umar said: "I think he said: 'He would pour water with his right hand onto his left hand three times.'" - "Then he would rinse his mouth three times and his nose three times, and wash his face and hands three times, then he would pour water over his head three times, then pour water over himself.'"
body: "Aishah described how the Prophet ﷺ performed Ghusl for Janabah. She said: 'He used to wash his hands three times, then pour water with his right hand onto his left and wash his private part and whatever was on it.' - (One of the narrators) 'Umar said: "I think he said: 'He would pour water with his right hand onto his left hand three times.'" - "Then he would rinse his mouth three times and his nose three times, and wash his face and hands three times, then he would pour water over his head three times, then pour water over himself.'"
arabic: وَصَفَتْ عَائِشَةُ غُسْلَ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ مِنَ الْجَنَابَةِ فَقَالَتْ كَانَ يَغْسِلُ يَدَيْهِ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ يُفِيضُ بِيَدِهِ الْيُمْنَى عَلَى الْيُسْرَى فَيَغْسِلُ فَرْجَهُ وَمَا أَصَابَهُ قَالَ عُمَرُ وَلَا أَعْلَمُهُ إِلَّا قَالَ ثُمَّ يُفِيضُ بِيَدِهِ الْيُمْنَى عَلَى الْيُسْرَى ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ ثُمَّ يَتَمَضْمَضُ ثَلَاثًا وَيَسْتَنْشِقُ ثَلَاثًا وَيَغْسِلُ وَجْهَهُ وَيَدَيْهِ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ يُفِيضُ عَلَى رَأْسِهِ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ يَصُبُّ عَلَيْهِ الْمَاءَ
chain: Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm \u003e ʿUmar b. ʿUbayd \u003e ʿAṭāʾ b. al-Sāʾib \u003e Abū Salamah b. ʿAbd al-Raḥman
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا عُمَرُ بْنُ عُبَيْدٍ عَنْ عَطَاءِ بْنِ السَّائِبِ عَنْ أَبِي سَلَمَةَ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 241

chapter.englishTitle: The Description of Ghusl from Janabah

englishRaw: Whenever the Prophet ﷺ took a bath after Janaba he started by washing his hands and then performed ablution like that for the prayer. After that he would put his fingers in water and move the roots of his hair with them, and then pour three handfuls of water over his head and then pour water all over his body.
body: Whenever the Prophet ﷺ took a bath after Janaba he started by washing his hands and then performed ablution like that for the prayer. After that he would put his fingers in water and move the roots of his hair with them, and then pour three handfuls of water over his head and then pour water all over his body.
arabic: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ كَانَ إِذَا اغْتَسَلَ مِنَ الْجَنَابَةِ «بَدَأَ فَغَسَلَ يَدَيْهِ ثُمَّ تَوَضَّأَ كَمَا يَتَوَضَّأُ لِلصَّلَاةِ ثُمَّ يُدْخِلُ أَصَابِعَهُ الْمَاءَ فَيُخَلِّلُ بِهَا أُصُولَ شَعْرِهِ ثُمَّ يَصُبُّ عَلَى رَأْسِهِ ثَلَاثَ غُرَفٍ ثُمَّ يُفِيضُ الْمَاءَ عَلَى جِلْدِهِ كُلِّهِ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Mālik \u003e Hishām b. ʿUrwah from his father \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ مَالِكٍ عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 242

chapter.englishTitle: The Description of Ghusl from Janabah

englishRaw: Jumay' ibn Umayr, one of the sons of Banu Taym Allah ibn Tha'labah, said: Accompanied by my mother and aunt I entered upon Aisha. One of them asked her: How did you do while taking a bath? Aisha replied: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ performed ablution (in the beginning) as he did for prayer. He then poured (water) upon his head three times. But we poured water upon our heads five times due to plaits.
body: Jumay' ibn Umayr, one of the sons of Banu Taym Allah ibn Tha'labah, said: Accompanied by my mother and aunt I entered upon Aisha. One of them asked her: How did you do while taking a bath? Aisha replied: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ performed ablution (in the beginning) as he did for prayer. He then poured (water) upon his head three times. But we poured water upon our heads five times due to plaits.
arabic: دَخَلْتُ مَعَ أُمِّي وَخَالَتِي عَلَى عَائِشَةَ فَسَأَلَتْهَا إِحْدَاهُمَا كَيْفَ كُنْتُمْ تَصْنَعُونَ فِي الْغُسْلِ؟ فَقَالَتْ عَائِشَةُ «كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ يَتَوَضَّأُ وَضُوءَهُ لِلصَّلَاةِ ثُمَّ يُفِيضُ عَلَى رَأْسِهِ ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ وَنَحْنُ نُفِيضُ عَلَى رُؤُوسِنَا خَمْسًا مِنْ أَجْلِ الضُّفُرِ»
chain: Muḥammad b. Ismāʿīl b. Ibrāhīm \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. Mahdī \u003e Zāʾidah
chainArabic: عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْمَاعِيلَ بْنِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ مَهْدِيٍّ عَنْ زَائِدَةَ عَنْ صَدَقَةَ بْنِ سَعِيدٍ الْحَنَفِيِّ عَنْ جُمَيْعِ بْنِ عُمَيْرٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 243

chapter.englishTitle: The Description of Ghusl from Janabah

englishRaw: "They argued about Ghusl in the presence of the messenger of Allah ﷺ. One of the people said: 'I perform Ghusl in such-and-such a manner.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'As for me, I pour three handfuls of water over my head.'"
body: "They argued about Ghusl in the presence of the messenger of Allah ﷺ. One of the people said: 'I perform Ghusl in such-and-such a manner.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'As for me, I pour three handfuls of water over my head.'"
arabic: تَمَارُوا فِي الْغُسْلِ عِنْدَ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ فَقَالَ بَعْضُ الْقَوْمِ إِنِّي لَأَغْتَسِلُ كَذَا وَكَذَا فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «أَمَّا أَنَا فَإِنِّي أُفِيضُ عَلَى رَأْسِي ثَلَاثَ أَكُفٍّ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Abū al-Aḥwaṣ \u003e Abū Isḥāq \u003e Sulaymān b. Ṣurad \u003e Jubayr b. Muṭʿim
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْأَحْوَصِ عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ صُرَدٍ عَنْ جُبَيْرِ بْنِ مُطْعِمٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 244

chapter.englishTitle: Working During Menstruation

englishRaw: "Take a piece of cloth perfumed with musk and purify yourself with it." She said: "How should I purify myself with it?" He covered his face then said: "Subhan Allah! Purify yourself with it." 'Aishah said: "I took the woman aside and said: 'Wipe away the traces of blood with it.'"
body: "Take a piece of cloth perfumed with musk and purify yourself with it." She said: "How should I purify myself with it?" He covered his face then said: "Subhan Allah! Purify yourself with it." 'Aishah said: "I took the woman aside and said: 'Wipe away the traces of blood with it.'"
arabic: أَنَّ امْرَأَةً سَأَلْتِ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ عَنْ غُسْلِهَا مِنَ الْمَحِيضِ؟ فَأَخْبَرَهَا كَيْفَ تَغْتَسِلُ ثُمَّ قَالَ «خُذِي فِرْصَةً مِنْ مِسْكٍ فَتَطَهَّرِي بِهَا» قَالَتْ وَكَيْفَ أَتَطَهَّرُ بِهَا؟ فَاسْتَتَرَ كَذَا ثُمَّ قَالَ «سُبْحَانَ اللهِ تَطَهَّرِي بِهَا» قَالَتْ عَائِشَةُ فَجَذَبْتُ الْمَرْأَةَ وَقُلَتُ تَتَّبِعِينَ بِهَا أَثَرَ الدَّمِ
chain: ʿAbdullāh b. Muḥammad b. ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. al-Miswar al-Zuhrī \u003e Sufyān \u003e Manṣūr from his mother \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ الْمِسْوَرِ الزُّهْرِيُّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ عَنْ مَنْصُورٍ عَنْ أُمِّهِ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 245

chapter.englishTitle: Leaving ablution after washing

englishRaw: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used not to perform Wudu' after Ghusl."
body: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used not to perform Wudu' after Ghusl."
arabic: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «لَا يَتَوَضَّأُ بَعْدَ الْغُسْلِ»
chain: Aḥmad b. ʿUthmān b. Ḥakīm from my father \u003e Ḥasan / Ibn Ṣāliḥ b. Ṣāliḥ b. Ḥay \u003e Abū Isḥāq \u003e ʿAmr b. ʿAlī \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman \u003e Sharīk \u003e Abū Isḥāq \u003e al-Aswad \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ عُثْمَانَ بْنِ حَكِيمٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبِي قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا حَسَنٌ وَهُوَ ابْنُ صَالِحِ بْنِ صَالِحِ بْنِ حَيٍّ عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ وَأَخْبَرَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ عَلِيٍّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا شَرِيكُ عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ عَنِ الْأَسْوَدِ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 246

chapter.englishTitle: Leaving Drips After Washing

englishRaw: "My maternal aunt Maimunah told me: 'I brought the Messenger of Allah ﷺ water for his Ghusl from Janabah, and he washed his hands two or three times, then he put his right hand in the vessel and poured water over his private part, then he washed it with his left hand. Then he put his left hand on the ground and rubbed it hard. Then he performed Wudu' as for prayer,then poured three scoops with his two hands full of water over his head, then he washed his entire body, then he moved away from where he had been standing and washed his feet.' She said: 'Then I brought him a towel but he refused it.'"
body: "My maternal aunt Maimunah told me: 'I brought the Messenger of Allah ﷺ water for his Ghusl from Janabah, and he washed his hands two or three times, then he put his right hand in the vessel and poured water over his private part, then he washed it with his left hand. Then he put his left hand on the ground and rubbed it hard. Then he performed Wudu' as for prayer,then poured three scoops with his two hands full of water over his head, then he washed his entire body, then he moved away from where he had been standing and washed his feet.' She said: 'Then I brought him a towel but he refused it.'"
arabic: أَدْنَيْتُ لِرَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ غُسْلَهُ مِنَ الْجَنَابَةِ فَغَسَلَ كَفَّيْهِ مَرَّتَيْنِ أَوْ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ أَدْخَلَ يَمِينَهُ فِي الْإِنَاءِ فَأَفْرَغَ بِهَا عَلَى فَرْجِهِ ثُمَّ غَسَلَهُ بِشِمَالِهِ ثُمَّ ضَرَبَ بِشِمَالِهِ الْأَرْضَ فَدَلَكَهَا دَلْكًا شَدِيدًا ثُمَّ تَوَضَّأَ وُضُوءَهُ لِلصَّلَاةِ ثُمَّ أَفْرَغَ عَلَى رَأْسِهِ ثَلَاثَ حَفْنَاتٍ مِلْءَ كَفَّيْهِ ثُمَّ غَسَلَ سَائِرَ جَسَدِهِ ثُمَّ تَنَحَّى عَنْ مَقَامِهِ فَغَسَلَ رِجْلَيْهِ قَالَتْ ثُمَّ أَتَيْتُهُ بِالْمِنْدِيلِ فَرَدَّهُ 247 وَعَنْ يُوسُفَ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنِ الْفَضْلِ بْنِ مُوسَى عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ بِهِ نَحْوَهُ
chain: ʿAlī b. Ḥujr b. Iyās \u003e ʿĪsá \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e Sālim \u003e Kurayb \u003e Ibn ʿAbbās \u003e Khālatī Maymūnah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ حُجْرِ بْنِ إِيَاسٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا عِيسَى عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنْ سَالِمٍ عَنْ كُرَيْبٍ عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَتْنِي خَالَتِي مَيْمُونَةُ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 248

chapter.englishTitle: Leaving Drips After Washing

englishRaw: It was narrated from Ibn 'Abbas that the Prophet ﷺ performed Ghusl and a cloth was brought to him, but he did not touch it, and he started doing like this with the water. [1] [1] This is a demonstration of his wiping off the water on his body with his hands.
body: It was narrated from Ibn 'Abbas that the Prophet ﷺ performed Ghusl and a cloth was brought to him, but he did not touch it, and he started doing like this with the water. [1] [1] This is a demonstration of his wiping off the water on his body with his hands.
arabic: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ اغْتَسَلَ فَأُتِيَ بِمِنْدِيلٍ فَلَمْ يَمَسَّهُ وَجَعَلَ يَقُولُ «بِالْمَاءِ هَكَذَا»
chain: Muḥammad b. Yaḥyá b. Ayyūb b. Ibrāhīm \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Idrīs \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e Sālim \u003e Kurayb \u003e Ibn ʿAbbās
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى بْنِ أَيُّوبَ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ إِدْرِيسَ عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنْ سَالِمٍ عَنْ كُرَيْبٍ عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 249

chapter.arabicTitle: وَضُوءُ الْجُنُبِ إِذَا أَرَادَ أَنْ يَأْكُلَ
chapter.englishTitle: The ablution of the one in a state of major ritual impurity when...

englishRaw: "If the Prophet ﷺ" - (one of the narrators) 'Amr said: "If the Messenger of Allah ﷺ" - "wanted to eat or sleep while he was Junub, he would perform Wudu'." In his narration, 'Amr (one of the narrators) added: "Wudu' was for prayer."
body: "If the Prophet ﷺ" - (one of the narrators) 'Amr said: "If the Messenger of Allah ﷺ" - "wanted to eat or sleep while he was Junub, he would perform Wudu'." In his narration, 'Amr (one of the narrators) added: "Wudu' was for prayer."
arabic: كَانَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ وَقَالَ عَمْرٌو كَانَ رَسُولُ الله ﷺ إِذَا أَرَادَ أَنْ يَأْكُلَ أَوْ يَنَامَ وَهُوَ جُنُبٌ تَوَضَّأَ زَادَ عَمْرٌو فِي حَدِيثِهِ وُضُوءَهُ لِلصَّلَاةِ
chain: Ḥumayd b. Masʿadah \u003e Sufyān b. Ḥabīb \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e ʿAmr b. ʿAlī \u003e Yaḥyá And ʿAbd al-Raḥman \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e al-Ḥakam \u003e Ibrāhīm \u003e al-Aswad \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا حُمَيْدُ بْنُ مَسْعَدَةَ عَنْ سُفْيَانَ بْنِ حَبِيبٍ عَنْ شُعْبَةَ وَأَخْبَرَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ عَلِيٍّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى وَعَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ عَنْ شُعْبَةَ عَنِ الْحَكَمِ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنِ الْأَسْوَدِ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 250

chapter.arabicTitle: اقْتِصَارُ الْجُنُبِ عَلَى غَسْلِ يَدَيْهِ إِذَا أَرَادَ أَنْ يَأْكُلَ أَوْ يَشْرَبَ
chapter.englishTitle: The limitation of washing hands of the south when he wants to ea...

englishRaw: It was narrated from 'Aishah that if the Messenger of Allah ﷺ wanted to sleep while he was Junub, he would perform Wudu', and if he wanted to eat he would wash his hands.
body: It was narrated from 'Aishah that if the Messenger of Allah ﷺ wanted to sleep while he was Junub, he would perform Wudu', and if he wanted to eat he would wash his hands.
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ كَانَ «إِذَا أَرَادَ أَنْ يَنَامَ وَهُوَ جُنُبٌ تَوَضَّأَ وَإِذَا أَرَادَ أَنْ يَأْكُلَ غَسَلَ يَدَيْهِ»
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿUbayd \u003e Ibn al-Mubārak \u003e Yūnus \u003e al-Zuhrī \u003e Abū Salamah \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عُبَيْدٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا ابْنُ الْمُبَارَكِ عَنْ يُونُسَ عَنِ الزُّهْرِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي سَلَمَةَ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 251

chapter.arabicTitle: اقْتِصَارُ الْجُنُبِ عَلَى غَسْلِ يَدَيْهِ إِذَا أَرَادَ أَنْ يَأْكُلَ أَوْ يَشْرَبَ
chapter.englishTitle: The limitation of washing hands of the south when he wants to ea...

englishRaw: "If the Messenger of Allah ﷺ wanted to sleep while he was Junub, he would perform Wudu', and if he wanted to eat or drink," she said: "he would wash his hands and then eat or drink."
body: "If the Messenger of Allah ﷺ wanted to sleep while he was Junub, he would perform Wudu', and if he wanted to eat or drink," she said: "he would wash his hands and then eat or drink."
