arabic: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ إِذَا أَرَادَ أَنْ يَنَامَ وَهُوَ جُنُبٌ تَوَضَّأَ وَإِذَا أَرَادَ أَنْ يَأْكُلَ أَوْ يَشْرَبَ قَالَتْ غَسَلَ يَدَيْهِ ثُمَّ يَأْكُلُ وَيُشْرَبُ
chain: Sūwayd b. Naṣr \u003e ʿAbdullāh / Ibn al-Mubārak \u003e Yūnus \u003e al-Zuhrī \u003e Abū Salamah \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا سُوَيْدُ بْنُ نَصْرٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ يَعْنِي ابْنَ الْمُبَارَكِ عَنْ يُونُسَ عَنِ الزُّهْرِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي سَلَمَةَ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 252

chapter.arabicTitle: وُضُوءُ الْجُنُبِ وَغَسْلُهُ ذَكَرَهُ إِذَا أَرَادَ أَنْ يَنَامَ
chapter.englishTitle: The purification of intercourse and its washing, mentioned when ...

englishRaw: "Umar mentioned to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ that he became Junub at night, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Perform Wudu' and wash you penis, then sleep.'"
body: "Umar mentioned to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ that he became Junub at night, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Perform Wudu' and wash you penis, then sleep.'"
arabic: ذَكَرَ عُمَرُ لِرَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ أَنَّهُ تُصِيبُهُ جَنَابَةٌ مِنَ اللَّيْلِ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «تَوَضَّأْ وَاغْسِلْ ذَكَرَكَ ثُمَّ نَمْ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Mālik \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Dīnār \u003e Ibn ʿUmar
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ مَالِكٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ دِينَارٍ عَنِ ابْنِ عُمَرَ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 253

chapter.englishTitle: The heading translates to: "What happens if one does not perform...

englishRaw: “The angels do not enter a house in which there is an image or a person who is junub or a dog.ʿ
body: “The angels do not enter a house in which there is an image or a person who is junub or a dog.ʿ
arabic: عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ قَالَ «لَا تَدْخُلُ الْمَلَائِكَةُ بَيْتًا فِيهِ صُورَةٌ وَلَا كَلْبٌ وَلَا جُنُبٌ»
chain: Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Hishām b. ʿAbd al-Malik \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e ʿUbaydullāh b. Saʿīd \u003e Yaḥyá \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e ʿAlī b. Mudrik \u003e Abū Zurʿah \u003e Ibn Nujay from his father \u003e ʿAlī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا هِشَامُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْمَلِكِ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا شُعْبَةُ وَأَخْبَرَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللهِ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى عَنْ شُعْبَةَ وَاللَّفْظُ لَهُ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ مُدْرِكٍ عَنْ أَبِي زُرْعَةَ عَنِ ابْنِ نُجَيٍّ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَلِيٍّ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 254

chapter.arabicTitle: فِي الْجُنُبِ إِذَا أَرَادَ أَنْ يَعُودَ
chapter.englishTitle: In the south, when he wants to return

englishRaw: "When any one of you a wants to return (to have intercourse again), let him perform Wudu'."
body: "When any one of you a wants to return (to have intercourse again), let him perform Wudu'."
arabic: عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ قَالَ «إِذَا أَرَادَ أَحَدُكُمْ أَنْ يَعُودَ تَوَضَّأَ»
chain: al-Ḥusayn b. Ḥurayth \u003e Sufyān \u003e ʿĀṣim \u003e Abū al-Mutawakkil \u003e Abū Saʿīd
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ حُرَيْثٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ عَنْ عَاصِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي الْمُتَوَكِّلِ عَنْ أَبِي سَعِيدٍ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 255

chapter.englishTitle: The arrival of women before performing ablution

englishRaw: It was narrated from Anas bin Malik that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ went around all his wives and only performed Ghusl once.
body: It was narrated from Anas bin Malik that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ went around all his wives and only performed Ghusl once.
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ «طَافَ عَلَى نِسَائِهِ فِي لَيْلَةٍ بِغُسْلٍ وَاحِدٍ»
chain: Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm And Yaʿqūb b. Ibrāhīm Wa-al-Lafẓ Liʾisḥāq \u003e Ismāʿīl b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Ḥumayd al-Ṭawīl \u003e Anas b. Mālik
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَيَعْقُوبُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَاللَّفْظُ لِإِسْحَاقَ قَالَا أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ حُمَيْدٍ الطَّوِيلِ عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 256

chapter.englishTitle: The arrival of women before performing ablution

englishRaw: The Prophet used to go round to all his wives with one bath.
body: The Prophet used to go round to all his wives with one bath.
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ كَانَ «يَطُوفُ عَلَى نِسَائِهِ فِي غُسْلٍ وَاحِدٍ»
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿUbayd \u003e Ibn al-Mubārak \u003e Maʿmar \u003e Qatādah \u003e Anas
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عُبَيْدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ الْمُبَارَكِ عَنْ مَعْمَرٍ عَنْ قَتَادَةَ عَنْ أَنَسٍ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 257

chapter.englishTitle: The prohibition of the junub from reading the Quran.

englishRaw: "I came to 'Ali with two other men and he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to come out of the toilet and recite Qur'an, and he would eat meat with us and nothing would prevent him from (reciting) Qur'an except Janabah."
body: "I came to 'Ali with two other men and he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to come out of the toilet and recite Qur'an, and he would eat meat with us and nothing would prevent him from (reciting) Qur'an except Janabah."
arabic: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «يَخْرُجُ مِنَ الْخَلَاءِ فَيَقْرَأُ الْقُرْآنَ وَيَأْكُلُ مَعَنَا اللَّحْمُ وَلَمْ يَكُنْ يَحْجُبُهُ عَنِ الْقُرْآنِ شَيْءٌ لَيْسَ الْجَنَابَةَ»
chain: ʿAlī b. Ḥujr \u003e Ismāʿīl b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e ʿAmr b. Murrah \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Salamah \u003e Atayt ʿAlī \u003e And two men
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ حُجْرٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ شُعْبَةَ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ مُرَّةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ سَلَمَةَ قَالَ أَتَيْتُ عَلِيًّا أَنَا وَرَجُلَانِ فَقَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 258

chapter.englishTitle: The prohibition of the junub from reading the Quran.

englishRaw: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to recite Qur'an in all circumstances except when he was Junub."
body: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to recite Qur'an in all circumstances except when he was Junub."
arabic: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «يُقْرَأُ الْقُرْآنَ عَلَى كُلِّ حَالٍ إِلَّا الْجَنَابَةَ»
chain: Muḥammad b. Aḥmad Abū Yūsuf al-Ṣaydalānī \u003e ʿĪsá b. Yūnus \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e ʿAmr b. Murrah \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Salamah \u003e ʿAlī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ أَبُو يُوسُفَ الصَّيْدَلَانِيُّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عِيسَى بْنُ يُونُسَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا الْأَعْمَشُ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ مُرَّةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ سَلَمَةَ عَنْ عَلِيٍّ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 259

chapter.englishTitle: The heading translates to: "Socializing and physical contact

englishRaw: 0 Abu Huraira, where were you? He said: Messenger of Allah, you met when I was (sexually) defiled and I did not like to sit in your company before taking a bath. Upon this the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: Hallowed be Allah, verily a believer is never defiled.
body: 0 Abu Huraira, where were you? He said: Messenger of Allah, you met when I was (sexually) defiled and I did not like to sit in your company before taking a bath. Upon this the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: Hallowed be Allah, verily a believer is never defiled.
arabic: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ لَقِيَهُ فِي طَرِيقٍ مِنْ طُرُقِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَهُوَ جُنُبٌ فَانْسَلَّ فَذَهَبَ فَاغْتَسَلَ فَفَقَدَهُ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ فَلَمَّا جَاءَ قَالَ «أَيْنَ كُنْتَ يَا أَبَا هُرَيْرَةَ؟» فَقَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اللهِ إِنَّكَ لَقِيتَنِي وَأنا جُنُبٌ فَكَرِهْتُ أَنْ أُجَالِسَكَ حَتَّى أَغْتَسِلَ فَقَالَ سُبْحَانَ اللهِ إِنَّ «الْمُؤْمِنَ لَا يَنْجُسُ»
chain: Ḥumayd b. Masʿadah \u003e Bishr / Ibn al-Mufaḍḍal \u003e Ḥumayd \u003e Bakr \u003e Abū Rāfiʿ \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا حُمَيْدُ بْنُ مَسْعَدَةَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا بِشْرٌ يَعْنِي ابْنَ الْمُفَضَّلِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا حُمَيْدٌ عَنْ بَكْرٍ عَنْ أَبِي رَافِعٍ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 260

chapter.englishTitle: The heading translates to: "Socializing and physical contact

englishRaw: "And he came close to me and reached out his hand. I said: 'I am Junub.' He said: 'The Muslim is not made impure (Najis).'"
body: "And he came close to me and reached out his hand. I said: 'I am Junub.' He said: 'The Muslim is not made impure (Najis).'"
arabic: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ لَقِيَهُ وَهُوَ جُنُبٌ فَأَهْوَى إِلَيَّ قُلْتُ إِنِّي جُنُبٌ قَالَ إِنَّ «الْمُسْلِمَ لَا يَنْجُسُ»
chain: Isḥāq b. Manṣūr \u003e Yaḥyá \u003e Misʿar \u003e Wāṣil \u003e Abū Wāʾil \u003e Ḥudhayfah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ مَنْصُورٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا يَحْيَى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مِسْعَرٌ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي وَاصِلٌ عَنْ أَبِي وَائِلٍ عَنْ حُذَيْفَةَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 261

chapter.englishTitle: The heading translates to: "Socializing and physical contact

englishRaw: "When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ met a man from among his Companions, he would shake hands with him and supplicate for him. I saw him one day in the early morning, and I tried to avoid him, then I came to him later in the day. He said: 'I saw you but you were avoiding me.' I said: 'I was Junub and I was afraid that you would touch me.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The Muslim is not made impure (Najis).'"
body: "When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ met a man from among his Companions, he would shake hands with him and supplicate for him. I saw him one day in the early morning, and I tried to avoid him, then I came to him later in the day. He said: 'I saw you but you were avoiding me.' I said: 'I was Junub and I was afraid that you would touch me.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The Muslim is not made impure (Najis).'"
arabic: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ إِذَا لَقِيَ الرَّجُلَ مِنْ أَصْحَابِهِ مَاسَحَهُ وَدَعَا لَهُ قَالَ فَرَأَيْتُهُ يومًا بُكْرَةً فَحِدْتُ عَنْهُ ثُمَّ أَتَيْتُهُ حِينَ ارْتَفَعَ النَّهَارُ فَقَالَ إِنِّي رَأَيْتُكَ فَحِدْتَ عَنِّي فَقُلُتُ إِنِّي كُنْتُ جُنُبًا فَخَشِيتُ أَنْ تَمَسَّنِي فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ إِنَّ «الْمُسْلِمَ لَا يَنْجُسُ»
chain: Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Jarīr \u003e al-Shaybānī \u003e Abū Burdah \u003e Ḥudhayfah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا جَرِيرٌ عَنِ الشَّيْبَانِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي بُرْدَةَ عَنْ حُذَيْفَةَ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 262

chapter.englishTitle: The use of sanitary pads

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to me, "Pass me the container of wine from the mosque." So, I said, "I am menstruating." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Your menstruation is not in your hands." This is a narration from Jarir and Abu Mu'awyah similar to it.
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to me, "Pass me the container of wine from the mosque." So, I said, "I am menstruating." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Your menstruation is not in your hands." This is a narration from Jarir and Abu Mu'awyah similar to it.
arabic: قَالَ لِي رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ نَاوِلِينِي الْخُمْرَةَ مِنَ الْمَسْجِدِ فَقُلْتُ إِنِّي حَائِضٌ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «لَيْسَتْ حَيْضَتُكِ فِي يَدَكِ» هَذَا حَدِيثُ جَرِيرٍ وَأَبُو مُعَاوِيَةَ مِثْلُهُ
chain: Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Abū Muʿāwiyah \u003e Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Jarīr \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e Thābit b. ʿUbayd \u003e al-Qāsim b. Muḥammad \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو مُعَاوِيَةَ وَأَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا جَرِيرٌ عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنْ ثَابِتٍ بْن عُبَيْدٍ عَنْ الْقَاسِمِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 263

chapter.englishTitle: The spreading of alcohol in the mosque

englishRaw: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to lay his head in the lap of one of us while she was menstruating and recite Qur'an, and one of us would take the mat to the Masjid and spread it out while she was menstruating."
body: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to lay his head in the lap of one of us while she was menstruating and recite Qur'an, and one of us would take the mat to the Masjid and spread it out while she was menstruating."
arabic: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «يَضَعُ رَأْسَهُ فِي حِجْرِ إِحْدَانَا فَيَتْلُو الْقُرْآنَ وَهِيَ حَائِضٌ وَتَقُومُ إِحْدَانَا بِخُمْرَتِهِ إِلَى الْمَسْجِدِ فَتَبْسُطُهَا وَهِيَ حَائِضٌ»
chain: Muḥammad b. Manṣūr \u003e Sufyān \u003e Manbūdh from his mother \u003e Maymūnah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مَنْصُورٍ عَنْ سُفْيَانَ عَنْ مَنْبُوذٍ عَنْ أُمِّهِ أَنَّ مَيْمُونَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 264

chapter.arabicTitle: فِي الرَّجُلِ يُقْرَأُ الْقُرْآنَ وَرَأْسُهُ فِي حِجْرِ امْرَأَتِهِ وَهِيَ حَائِضٌ
chapter.englishTitle: In English, the heading translates to: "The man reads the Quran ...

englishRaw: "The head of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would rest in the lap of one of us when she was menstruating, and he would recite Qur'an."
body: "The head of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would rest in the lap of one of us when she was menstruating, and he would recite Qur'an."
arabic: «كَانَ رَأْسُ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ فِي حِجْرِ إِحْدَانَا وَهِيَ حَائِضٌ وَهُوَ يُقْرَأُ الْقُرْآنَ»
chain: Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm b. Makhlad b. Ibrāhīm b. Rāhawayh And ʿAlī b. Ḥajar b. Iyās \u003e Sufyān \u003e Manṣūr from his mother \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ مَخْلَدِ بْنِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ رَاهَوَيْهِ وَعَلِيُّ بْنُ حَجَرِ بْنِ إِيَاسٍ وَاللَّفْظُ لَهُ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا سُفْيَانُ عَنْ مَنْصُورٍ عَنْ أُمِّهِ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 265

chapter.englishTitle: Washing the head of one's wife during menstruation

englishRaw: "The Prophet ﷺ would put his head out while he was in I'tikaf and I would wash it, while I was menstruating."
body: "The Prophet ﷺ would put his head out while he was in I'tikaf and I would wash it, while I was menstruating."
arabic: كَانَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ «يُومِئُ إِلَيَّ بِرَأْسِهِ وَهُوَ مُعْتَكِفٌ فَأَغْسِلُهُ وَأَنَا حَائِضٌ»
chain: ʿAmr b. ʿAlī \u003e Yaḥyá \u003e Sufyān \u003e Manṣūr \u003e Ibrāhīm \u003e al-Aswad \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ عَلِيٍّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي مَنْصُورٌ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنِ الْأَسْوَدِ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 266

chapter.englishTitle: In menstruation, she makes her husband's head move.

englishRaw: "I used to support the head of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ while I was menstruating. Qutaybah ibn Sa'id informed us, on the authority of Malik, who informed us, on the authority of Ali ibn Shuayb, who said, Ma'n informed us, who said, Malik informed us, on the authority of Az-Zuhri, on the authority of Uruwah, on the authority of Aisha, with a similar narration."
body: "I used to support the head of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ while I was menstruating. Qutaybah ibn Sa'id informed us, on the authority of Malik, who informed us, on the authority of Ali ibn Shuayb, who said, Ma'n informed us, who said, Malik informed us, on the authority of Az-Zuhri, on the authority of Uruwah, on the authority of Aisha, with a similar narration."
arabic: «كُنْتُ أُرَجِّلُ رَأْسَ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ وَأَنَا حَائِضٌ» 267 أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ مَالِكٍ وَأَخْبَرَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ شُعَيْبٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مَعْنٌ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مَالِكٌ عَنِ الزُّهْرِيِّ عَنْ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ مِثْلُ ذَلِكَ
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Mālik \u003e Hishām b. ʿUrwah from his father \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ مَالِكٍ عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 268

chapter.arabicTitle: مُؤَاكَلَةُ الْحَائِضِ وَالشُّرْبُ مِنْ سُؤْرِهَا وَالِانْتِفَاعُ بِفَضْلِهَا
chapter.englishTitle: Intimacy during menstruation and drinking from its waters and be...

englishRaw: "Can a woman eat with her husband while she is menstruating? She said: 'Yes. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would call me to eat with him while I was menstruating. He would take a piece of bone on which some bits of meat were left and insist that I take it first, so I would nibble a little from it, then put it down. Then he would take it and nibble from it, and he would put his mouth where mine had been on the bone. Then he would ask for a drink and insist that I take it first before he drank from it. So I would take it and drink from it, then put it down, then he would take it and drink from it, putting his mouth where mine had been on the cup.'"
body: "Can a woman eat with her husband while she is menstruating? She said: 'Yes. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would call me to eat with him while I was menstruating. He would take a piece of bone on which some bits of meat were left and insist that I take it first, so I would nibble a little from it, then put it down. Then he would take it and nibble from it, and he would put his mouth where mine had been on the bone. Then he would ask for a drink and insist that I take it first before he drank from it. So I would take it and drink from it, then put it down, then he would take it and drink from it, putting his mouth where mine had been on the cup.'"
arabic: أَنَّهُ سَأَلَ عَائِشَةَ هَلْ تَأْكُلُ الْمَرْأَةُ مَعَ زَوْجِهَا وَهِيَ طَامِثٌ؟ قَالَتْ نَعَمْ كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «يَدْعُونِي فَآكُلُ مَعَهُ وَأنا عَارِكٌ وَكَانَ يَأْخُذُ الْعِرْقَ فَيُقْسِمُ عَلَيَّ فِيهِ فَأَعْتَرِقُ مِنْهُ ثُمَّ أَضَعُهُ فَيَأْخُذُهُ فَيَعْتَرِقُ مِنْهُ وَيَضَعُ فَمَهُ حَيْثُ وَضَعْتُ فَمِي مِنَ الْعِرْقِ وَيَدْعُو بِالشَّرَابِ فَيُقْسِمُ عَلَيَّ فِيهِ مِنْ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَشْرَبَ مِنْهُ فَآخُذُهُ فَأَشْرَبُ مِنْهُ ثُمَّ أَضَعُهُ فَيَأْخُذُهُ فَيُشْرَبُ مِنْهُ وَيَضَعُ فَمَهُ حَيْثُ وَضَعْتُ فَمِي مِنَ الْقَدَحِ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Yazīd / Ibn al-Miqdām b. Shurayḥ b. Hāniʾ from his father \u003e Abīh Shurayḥ
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا يَزِيدُ يَعْنِي ابْنَ الْمِقْدَامِ بْنِ شُرَيْحِ بْنِ هَانِئٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ أَبِيهِ شُرَيْحٍ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 269

chapter.arabicTitle: مُؤَاكَلَةُ الْحَائِضِ وَالشُّرْبُ مِنْ سُؤْرِهَا وَالِانْتِفَاعُ بِفَضْلِهَا
chapter.englishTitle: Intimacy during menstruation and drinking from its waters and be...

englishRaw: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would put his mouth on the place from which I had drunk, and he would drink from my leftovers when I was menstruating."
body: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would put his mouth on the place from which I had drunk, and he would drink from my leftovers when I was menstruating."
arabic: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «يَضَعُ فَاهُ عَلَى الْمَوْضِعِ الَّذِي أَشْرَبُ مِنْهُ وَيُشْرَبُ مِنْ فَضْلِ شَرَابِي وَأَنَا حَائِضٌ»
chain: Ayyūb b. Muḥammad \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Jaʿfar \u003e ʿUbaydullāh b. ʿAmr \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e al-Miqdām b. Shurayḥ from his father \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنِي أَيُّوبُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللهِ بْنُ عَمْرٍو عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنِ الْمِقْدَامِ بْنِ شُرَيْحٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 270

chapter.arabicTitle: مُؤَاكَلَةُ الْحَائِضِ وَالشُّرْبُ مِنْ سُؤْرِهَا وَالِانْتِفَاعُ بِفَضْلِهَا
chapter.englishTitle: Intimacy during menstruation and drinking from its waters and be...

englishRaw: "I heard 'Aishah say: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would hand me the vessel and I would drink from it, while I was menstruating, then I would give it to him and he would look for the place where I had put my mouth and put that to his mouth.'"
body: "I heard 'Aishah say: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would hand me the vessel and I would drink from it, while I was menstruating, then I would give it to him and he would look for the place where I had put my mouth and put that to his mouth.'"
arabic: سَمِعْتُ عَائِشَةَ تَقُولُ كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «يُنَاوِلُنِي الْإِنَاءَ فَأَشْرَبُ مِنْهُ وَأَنَا حَائِضٌ ثُمَّ أُعْطِيَهُ فَيَتَحَرَّى مَوْضِعَ فِيَّ فَيَضَعُهُ عَلَى فِيهِ»
chain: Muḥammad b. Manṣūr \u003e Sufyān \u003e Misʿar \u003e al-Miqdām b. Shurayḥ from his father \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مَنْصُورٍ حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ عَنْ مِسْعَرٍ عَنِ الْمِقْدَامِ بْنِ شُرَيْحٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 271

chapter.englishTitle: Intercourse during menstruation

englishRaw: While I was laying with the Prophet ﷺ under a single woolen sheet, I got the menses. I slipped away and put on the clothes for menses. He said, "Have you got "Nifas" (menses)?" I replied, "Yes." He then called me and made me lie with him under the same sheet.
body: While I was laying with the Prophet ﷺ under a single woolen sheet, I got the menses. I slipped away and put on the clothes for menses. He said, "Have you got "Nifas" (menses)?" I replied, "Yes." He then called me and made me lie with him under the same sheet.
arabic: بَيْنَا أَنَا مُضْطَجِعَةٌ مَعَ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ فِي الْخَمِيلَةِ فَانْسَلَلْتُ مِنَ اللِّحَافِ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «أَنُفِسْتِ؟» فَقُلْتُ نَعَمْ «فَدَعَانِي فَاضْطَجَعْتُ مَعَهُ فِي الْخَمِيلَةِ»
chain: Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Muʿādh b. Hishām from my father \u003e Yaḥyá b. Abū Kathīr \u003e Abū Salamah b. ʿAbd al-Raḥman \u003e Zaynab b. Um Salamah \u003e Um Salamah Ḥaddathathā \u003e Baynā
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا مُعَاذُ بْنُ هِشَامٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ أَبِي كَثِيرٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو سَلَمَةَ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ أَنَّ زَيْنَبَ بِنْتَ أُمِّ سَلَمَةَ حَدَّثَتْهُ أَنَّ أُمَّ سَلَمَةَ حَدَّثَتْهَا قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 272

chapter.englishTitle: Intercourse during menstruation

englishRaw: While I was laying with the Prophet ﷺ under a single woolen sheet, I got the menses. I slipped away and put on the clothes for menses. He said, "Have you got "Nifas" (menses)?" I replied, "Yes." He then called me and made me lie with him under the same sheet.
body: While I was laying with the Prophet ﷺ under a single woolen sheet, I got the menses. I slipped away and put on the clothes for menses. He said, "Have you got "Nifas" (menses)?" I replied, "Yes." He then called me and made me lie with him under the same sheet.
arabic: بَيْنَمَا أَنَا مُضْطَجِعَةٌ مَعَ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ فِي الْخَمِيلَةِ إِذْ حِضْتُ فَانْسَلَلْتُ فَأَخَذْتُ ثِيَابَ حِيضَتِي فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «أَنُفِسْتِ؟» قُلْتُ نَعَمْ «فَدَعَانِي فَاضْطَجَعْتُ مَعَهُ فِي الْخَمِيلَةِ»

chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ مَسْعُودٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا خَالِدٌ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا هِشَامٌ وأَخبرنا عُبَيْدُ اللهِ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قال حَدَّثَنَا مُعَاذُ بْنُ هِشَامٍ وَاللَّفْظُ لَهُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي عَنْ يَحْيَى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو سَلَمَةَ أَنَّ زَيْنَبَ بِنْتَ أُمِّ سَلَمَةَ حَدَّثَتْهُ أَنَّ أُمَّ سَلَمَةَ حَدَّثَتْهَا قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 273

chapter.englishTitle: Intercourse during menstruation

englishRaw: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ and I would sleep under a single blanket when I was menstruating. If anything got on him from me, he would wash that spot and no more, and pray in it, then come back. If anything got on it again from me, he would do likewise and no more, and he would pray in it."
body: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ and I would sleep under a single blanket when I was menstruating. If anything got on him from me, he would wash that spot and no more, and pray in it, then come back. If anything got on it again from me, he would do likewise and no more, and he would pray in it."
arabic: «كُنْتُ أَنَا وَرَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ نَبِيتُ فِي الشِّعَارِ الْوَاحِدِ وَأَنَا طَامِثٌ حَائِضٌ فَإِنْ أَصَابَهُ مِنِّي شَيْءٌ غَسَلَ مَكَانَهُ لَمْ يَعْدُهُ وَصَلَّى فِيهِ ثُمَّ يَعُودُ فَإِنْ أَصَابَهُ مِنْهُ شيء فِعْلَ مِثْلَ ذَلِكَ غَسَلَ مَكَانَهُ لَمْ يَعْدُهُ وَصَلَّى فِيهِ»
chain: Muḥammad b. al-Muthanná \u003e Yaḥyá b. Saʿīd \u003e Jābir b. Ṣubḥ \u003e Khilās \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ جَابِرِ بْنِ صُبْحٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ خِلَاسًا يُحَدِّثُ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 274

chapter.englishTitle: Onset of menstruation

englishRaw: "If one of us was menstruating, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would tell her to put on an Izar (waist wrap) then he would fondle her."
body: "If one of us was menstruating, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would tell her to put on an Izar (waist wrap) then he would fondle her."
arabic: كَانَتْ إِحْدَانَا إِذَا حَاضَتْ «أَمَرَهَا رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ أَنْ تَتَزِرَ ثُمَّ يُبَاشِرُهَا»
chain: Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Khbrnā Jarīr \u003e Manṣūr \u003e Ibrāhīm \u003e al-Aswad \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ أخبرنا جَرِيرٌ عَنْ مَنْصُورٍ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنِ الْأَسْوَدِ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 275

chapter.englishTitle: Onset of menstruation

englishRaw: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would tell one of us, if she was menstruating, to tie her Izar (waist wrap) tightly then he would fondle her."
body: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would tell one of us, if she was menstruating, to tie her Izar (waist wrap) tightly then he would fondle her."
arabic: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «يَأْمُرُ إِحْدَانَا إِذَا كَانَتْ حَائِضًا أَنْ تَشُدَّ إِزَارَهَا ثُمَّ يُبَاشِرُهَا»
chain: Abū al-Aḥwaṣ \u003e Abū Isḥāq \u003e ʿAmr b. Shuraḥbīl \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أخبرنا قُتَيْبَةُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْأَحْوَصِ عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ شُرَحْبِيلَ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 276

chapter.englishTitle: The position of the belt

englishRaw: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would fondle one of his wives while she was menstruating, if she wore an Izar (waist wrap) that reached halfway down to the middle of her thighs or to her knees." In the narration of Al-Laith: "Being covered with it."
body: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would fondle one of his wives while she was menstruating, if she wore an Izar (waist wrap) that reached halfway down to the middle of her thighs or to her knees." In the narration of Al-Laith: "Being covered with it."
arabic: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ «يُبَاشِرُ الْمَرْأَةَ مِنْ نِسَائِهِ وَهِيَ حَائِضٌ إِذَا كَانَ عَلَيْهَا إِزَارٌ يَبْلُغُ أَنْصَافَ الْفَخِذَيْنِ وَالوَرِكَيْنِ» وَفِي حَدِيثِ اللَّيْثِ مُحْتَجِزَتَهُ
chain: Asmaʿ \u003e Ibn Wahb \u003e Yūnus Wa-al-Layth \u003e Ibn Shihāb \u003e Ḥabīb a freed slave of ʿUrwah
chainArabic: الْحَارِثُ بْنُ مِسْكِينٍ قِرَاءَةً عَلَيْهِ وَأَنَا أَسْمَعُ عَنِ ابْنِ وَهْبٍ عَنْ يُونُسَ وَاللَّيْثِ عَنِ ابْنِ شِهَابٍ عَنْ حَبِيبٍ مَوْلَى عُرْوَةَ عَنْ بُدَيَّةَ وَكَانَ اللَّيْثُ يَقُولُ نَدْبَةَ مَوْلَاةِ مَيْمُونَةَ عَنْ مَيْمُونَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 277

chapter.arabicTitle: تَأْوِيلُ قَوْلِ اللهِ جَلَّ ثَنَاؤُهُ {وَيَسْئَلُونَكَ عَنِ الْمَحِيضِ قُلْ هُوَ أَذًى فَاعْتَزِلُوا النِّسَاءَ فِي الْمَحِيضِ}
chapter.englishTitle: Interpretation of the Saying of Allah, may He be glorified and e...

englishRaw: "When one of their womenfolk menstruated, the Jews would not eat or drink with them, or mix with them in their houses. They (the Companions) asked the Prophet of Allah ﷺ about that, and Allah, the Mighty and Sublime, revealed the Ayah: They ask you concerning menstruation. Say: "That is an Adha (a harmful thing).[2] So the Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded them to eat and drink with them (menstruating women) and to mix them in their houses, and to do everything with them except intercourse. The Jews said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ does not leave anything of our affairs except he goes against it.' Usaid bin Hudair and 'Abbad bin Bishr went and told the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and they said: 'Should we have intercourse with them when they are menstruating?' The expression of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ changed greatly until we thought he was angry with them, and they left. Then the Messenger of Allah ﷺ received a gift of milk, so he sent someone to bring them back and he gave them some to drink, so we knew that he was not angry with them." [1] Al-Baqarah 2:222 [2] Al-Baqarah 2:222
body: "When one of their womenfolk menstruated, the Jews would not eat or drink with them, or mix with them in their houses. They (the Companions) asked the Prophet of Allah ﷺ about that, and Allah, the Mighty and Sublime, revealed the Ayah: They ask you concerning menstruation. Say: "That is an Adha (a harmful thing).[2] So the Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded them to eat and drink with them (menstruating women) and to mix them in their houses, and to do everything with them except intercourse. The Jews said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ does not leave anything of our affairs except he goes against it.' Usaid bin Hudair and 'Abbad bin Bishr went and told the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and they said: 'Should we have intercourse with them when they are menstruating?' The expression of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ changed greatly until we thought he was angry with them, and they left. Then the Messenger of Allah ﷺ received a gift of milk, so he sent someone to bring them back and he gave them some to drink, so we knew that he was not angry with them." [1] Al-Baqarah 2:222 [2] Al-Baqarah 2:222
arabic: كَانَتِ الْيَهُودُ إِذَا حَاضَتِ الْمَرْأَةُ مِنْهُمْ لَمْ يُؤَاكِلُوهُنَّ وَلَمْ يُشَارِبُوهُنَّ وَلَمْ يُجَامِعُوهُنَّ فِي الْبُيُوتِ فَسَأَلُوا النَّبِيَّ ﷺ عَنْ ذَلِكَ فَأَنْزَلَ اللهُ تَبَارَكَ وَتَعَالَى {وَيَسْئَلُونَكَ عَنِ الْمَحِيضِ قُلْ هُوَ أَذًى} الْآيَةُ فَأَمَرَهُمْ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ أَنْ يُؤَاكِلُوهُنَّ وَيُشَارِبُوهُنَّ وَيُجَامِعُوهُنَّ فِي الْبُيُوتِ وَأَنْ يَصْنَعُوا بِهِنَّ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ مَا خَلَا النِّكَاحِ فَقَالَتِ الْيَهُودُ مَا يَدَعُ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ شَيْئًا مِنْ أَمْرِنَا إِلَّا خَالَفَنَا فَقَامَ أُسَيْدُ بْنُ الْحُضَيْرِ وَعَبَّادُ بْنُ بِشْرٍ فَأَخْبَرَا رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ وَقَالَا أَنُجَامِعُهُنَّ فِي الْمَحِيضِ فَتَمَعَّرَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ تَمَعُّرًا شَدِيدًا حَتَّى ظَنَنَّا أَنَّهُ قَدْ غَضِبَ عَلَيْهِمَا فَقَامَا فَاسْتَقْبَلَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ هَدِيَّةَ لَبَنٍ فَبَعَثَ فِي آثَارِهِمَا فَرَدَّهُمَا فَسَقَاهُمَا فَعَرَفَا أَنَّهُ لَمْ يَغْضَبْ عَلَيْهِمَا
chain: Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Sulaymān b. Ḥarb \u003e Ḥammād b. Salamah \u003e Thābit \u003e Anas
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ حَرْبٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ سَلَمَةَ عَنْ ثَابِتٍ عَنْ أَنَسٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 278

chapter.arabicTitle: مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى مَنْ أَتَى امْرَأَتَهُ فِي حَالِ حَيْضَتِهَا مَعَ عِلْمِهِ بِنَهْيِ اللهِ ﷻ عَنْ وَطْئِهَا
chapter.englishTitle: What a person should do if he approaches his wife during her men...

englishRaw: "Let him give a Dinar or half a Dinar in charity."
body: "Let him give a Dinar or half a Dinar in charity."
arabic: عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ فِي الرَّجُلِ يَأْتِي امْرَأَتَهُ وَهِيَ حَائِضٌ قَالَ «يَتَصَدَّقُ بِدِينَارٍ أَوْ بِنِصْفِ دِينَارٍ»
chain: ʿAmr b. ʿAlī \u003e Yaḥyá \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e al-Ḥakam \u003e ʿAbd al-Ḥamīd \u003e Miqsam \u003e Ibn ʿAbbās
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ عَلِيٍّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى عَنْ شُعْبَةَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي الْحَكَمُ عَنْ عَبْدِ الْحَمِيدِ عَنْ مِقْسَمٍ عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 279

chapter.englishTitle: What do women do when they menstruate?

englishRaw: "We went out with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ with no intention other than Hajj. When he was in Sarif I began menstruating. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ entered upon me and I was weeping. He said: 'What is the matter with you? Has you Nifas begun?' I said: 'Yes.' He said: 'This is something that Allah the Mighty and Sublime has decreed for the daughters of Adam. Do what the pilgrims do but do not perform Tawaf around the House.'"
body: "We went out with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ with no intention other than Hajj. When he was in Sarif I began menstruating. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ entered upon me and I was weeping. He said: 'What is the matter with you? Has you Nifas begun?' I said: 'Yes.' He said: 'This is something that Allah the Mighty and Sublime has decreed for the daughters of Adam. Do what the pilgrims do but do not perform Tawaf around the House.'"
arabic: خَرَجْنَا مَعَ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ لَا نَرَى إِلَّا الْحَجَّ فَلَمَّا كَانَ بِسَرَفٍ حِضْتُ فَدَخَلَ عَلَيَّ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ وَأَنَا أَبْكِي فَقَالَ «مَا لَكِ أَنُفِسْتِ؟» فَقُلْتُ نَعَمْ فَقَالَ «هَذَا أَمْرٌ قَدْ كَتَبَهُ اللهُ عَلَى بَنَاتِ آدَمَ فَاقْضِي مَا يَقْضِي الْحَاجُّ غَيْرَ أَنْ لَا تَطُوفِي بِالْبَيْتِ»
chain: Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Sufyān \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. al-Qāsim from his father \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا سُفْيَانُ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ الْقَاسِمِ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 280

chapter.englishTitle: What do women do during ihram?

englishRaw: "My father told me: 'We cam to jabir bin 'Abdullah and asked him about the hajj of the prophet ﷺ. He narrated: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ set out when there were five (days) remaining in Dhul-Qa'dah, and we set out with him. When he came to Dhul-Hulaifah, Asma' bint 'Umais gave birth to Muhammad bin Abi Bakr. She sent word to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ asking what she should do. He said: 'Perform Ghusl, bind yourself with a cloth then begin (the Talbiyah for Ihram).'"
body: "My father told me: 'We cam to jabir bin 'Abdullah and asked him about the hajj of the prophet ﷺ. He narrated: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ set out when there were five (days) remaining in Dhul-Qa'dah, and we set out with him. When he came to Dhul-Hulaifah, Asma' bint 'Umais gave birth to Muhammad bin Abi Bakr. She sent word to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ asking what she should do. He said: 'Perform Ghusl, bind yourself with a cloth then begin (the Talbiyah for Ihram).'"
arabic: عَنْ حَجَّةِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ فَحَدَّثَنَا أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ خَرَجَ لِخَمْسٍ بَقِينَ مِنْ ذِي الْقَعْدَةِ وَخَرَجْنَا مَعَهُ حَتَّى أَتَى ذَا الْحُلَيْفَةِ وَلَدَتْ أَسْمَاءُ بِنْتُ عُمَيْسٍ بِمُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي بَكْرٍ فَأَرْسَلَتْ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ كَيْفَ أَصْنَعُ؟ قَالَ «اغْتَسِلِي وَاسْتَثْفِرِي ثُمَّ أَهِلِّي»
chain: ʿAmr b. ʿAlī And Muḥammad b. al-Muthanná Wayaʿqūb b. Ibrāhīm Wa-al-Lafẓ Liyaʿqūb \u003e Yaḥyá b. Saʿīd \u003e Jaʿfar b. Muḥammad from my father \u003e Ataynā Jābir b. ʿAbdullāh Fasaʾalnāh
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ عَلِيٍّ وَمُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى وَيَعْقُوبُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَاللَّفْظُ لِيَعْقُوبَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا جَعْفَرُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي قَالَ أَتَيْنَا جَابِرَ بْنَ عَبْدِ اللهِ فَسَأَلْنَاهُ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 281

chapter.englishTitle: In menstrual blood, the garment gets stained.

englishRaw: That a woman asked the Prophet ﷺ about menstrual blood staining clothes. He said, "Scrub it, then soak it, and then rinse it off, and then pray in it."
body: That a woman asked the Prophet ﷺ about menstrual blood staining clothes. He said, "Scrub it, then soak it, and then rinse it off, and then pray in it."
arabic: أَنَّ امْرَأَةً اسْتَفْتَتِ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ عَنْ دَمِ الْحَيضِ يُصِيبُ الثَّوْبَ؟ قَالَ «حُتِّيهِ وَاقْرُصِيهِ ثُمَّ انْضَحِيهِ وَصَلِّي فِيهِ»
chain: Yaḥyá b. Ḥabīb b. ʿArabī \u003e Ḥammād \u003e Hishām \u003e Fāṭimah b. al-Mundhir \u003e Asmāʾ b. Abū Bakr
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ حَبِيبِ بْنِ عَرَبِيٍّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادٌ عَنْ هِشَامٍ عَنْ فَاطِمَةَ بِنْتَ الْمُنْذِرِ عَنْ أَسْمَاءَ بِنْتِ أَبِي بَكْرٍ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 282

chapter.englishTitle: In menstrual blood, the garment gets stained.

englishRaw: "I heard Umm Qais bint Mihsan say that she asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about menstrual blood that gets on one's clothes. He said: 'Scratch it with a stick and wash it with water and lotus leaves.'"
body: "I heard Umm Qais bint Mihsan say that she asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about menstrual blood that gets on one's clothes. He said: 'Scratch it with a stick and wash it with water and lotus leaves.'"
arabic: أَنَّهَا سَأَلَتْ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ عَنْ دَمِ الْحَيْضَةِ يُصِيبُ الثَّوْبَ؟ قَالَ «حُكِّيهِ بِضِلْعٍ وَاغْسِلِيهِ بِمَاءٍ وَسِدْرٍ»
chain: ʿUbaydullāh b. Saʿīd \u003e Yaḥyá \u003e Sufyān \u003e Abū al-Miqdām Thābit al-Ḥaddād \u003e ʿAdī b. Dīnār \u003e Um Qays b. Miḥṣan
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللهِ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى عَنْ سُفْيَانَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو الْمِقْدَامِ ثَابِتٌ الْحَدَّادُ عَنْ عَدِيِّ بْنِ دِينَارٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أُمَّ قَيْسٍ بِنْتَ مِحْصَنٍ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 283

chapter.englishTitle: Semen stains the garment.

englishRaw: He asked his sister Umm Habibah, the wife of the Prophet: "Did the Messenger of Allah ever offered prayer in a garment in which he had sexual intercourse?" She said: "Yes, if there was nothing noxious on it."
body: He asked his sister Umm Habibah, the wife of the Prophet: "Did the Messenger of Allah ever offered prayer in a garment in which he had sexual intercourse?" She said: "Yes, if there was nothing noxious on it."
arabic: أَنَّهُ سَأَلَ أُمَّ حَبِيبَةَ زَوْجِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ هَلْ كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ يُصَلِّي فِي الثَّوْبِ الَّذِي يُجَامِعُ فِيهِ؟ قَالَتْ نَعَمْ «إِذَا لَمْ يَرَ فِيهِ أَذًى»
chain: ʿĪsá b. Ḥammād \u003e al-Layth \u003e Yazīd b. Abū Ḥabīb \u003e Sūwayd b. Qays \u003e Muʿāwiyah b. Khadīj \u003e Muʿāwiyah b. Abū Sufyān
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عِيسَى بْنُ حَمَّادٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا اللَّيْثُ عَنْ يَزِيدَ بْنِ أَبِي حَبِيبٍ عَنْ سُوَيْدِ بْنِ قَيْسٍ عَنْ مُعَاوِيَةَ بْنِ خَدِيجٍ عَنْ مُعَاوِيَةَ بْنِ أَبِي سُفْيَانَ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 284

chapter.englishTitle: Washing semen off clothes

englishRaw: I used to wash the traces of Janaba (semen) from the clothes of the Prophet ﷺ and he used to go for prayers while traces of water were still on it (water spots were still visible).
body: I used to wash the traces of Janaba (semen) from the clothes of the Prophet ﷺ and he used to go for prayers while traces of water were still on it (water spots were still visible).
arabic: كُنْتُ «أَغْسِلُ الْجَنَابَةَ مِنْ ثَوْبِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ فَيَخْرُجُ إِلَى الصَّلَاةِ وَإِنَّ بُقَعَ الْمَاءِ لَفِي ثَوْبِهِ»
chain: Sūwayd b. Naṣr \u003e ʿAbdullāh \u003e ʿAmr b. Maymūn \u003e Sulaymān b. Yasār \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا سُوَيْدُ بْنُ نَصْرٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ مَيْمُونٍ عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ يَسَارٍ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 285

chapter.englishTitle: Cleaning semen from clothing

englishRaw: I used to rub off the semen from the clothe of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He would would pray in it. Abu Dawud said: Mughirah, Abu Ma'shar, and Wasil also narrated it to the same effect.
body: I used to rub off the semen from the clothe of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He would would pray in it. Abu Dawud said: Mughirah, Abu Ma'shar, and Wasil also narrated it to the same effect.
arabic: «كُنْتُ أَفْرُكُ الْمَنِيَّ مِنْ ثَوْبِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Ḥammād \u003e Abū Hāshim \u003e Abū Mijlaz \u003e al-Ḥārith b. Nawfal \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادٌ عَنْ أَبِي هَاشِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي مِجْلَزٍ عَنِ الْحَارِثِ بْنِ نَوْفَلٍ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 286

chapter.englishTitle: Cleaning semen from clothing

englishRaw: "I used to see it on the garment of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and scratch it off."
body: "I used to see it on the garment of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and scratch it off."
arabic: كُنْتُ أَرَاهُ فِي ثَوْبِ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ فَأَحُكُّهُ الْمَنِيَّ
chain: Shuʿayb b. Yūsuf \u003e Yaḥyá \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e Ibrāhīm \u003e Hammām \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنِي شُعَيْبُ بْنُ يُوسُفَ عَنْ يَحْيَى عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ هَمَّامٍ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 287

chapter.arabicTitle: بَوْلُ الصَّبِيِّ الَّذِي لَمْ يَأْكُلِ الطَّعَامَ وَيُصِيبُ الثَّوْبَ
chapter.englishTitle: The subtitle: "The urine of a baby who hasn't eaten food and it ...

englishRaw: Umm Qais daughter of Mihsan reported that she came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ with her little son who had not attained the age of eating food. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ seated him in his lap, and he urinated on his clothe. He sent for water and sprayed it (over his clothe) and did not wash it.
body: Umm Qais daughter of Mihsan reported that she came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ with her little son who had not attained the age of eating food. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ seated him in his lap, and he urinated on his clothe. He sent for water and sprayed it (over his clothe) and did not wash it.
arabic: أَنَّهَا أَتَتْ بِابْنٍ لَهَا صَغِيرٍ لَمْ يَأْكُلِ الطَّعَامَ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ «فَأَجْلَسَهُ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ فِي حِجْرِهِ فَبَالَ عَلَى ثَوْبِهِ فَدَعَا بِمَاءٍ فَنَضَحَهُ وَلَمْ يَغْسِلْهُ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Mālik \u003e Ibn Shihāb \u003e ʿUbaydullāh b. ʿAbdullāh b. ʿUtbah \u003e Um Qays b. Miḥṣan
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ مَالِكٍ عَنِ ابْنِ شِهَابٍ عَنْ عُبَيْدِ اللهِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ عُتْبَةَ عَنْ أُمِّ قَيْسٍ بِنْتِ مِحْصَنٍ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 288

chapter.arabicTitle: بَوْلُ الصَّبِيِّ الَّذِي لَمْ يَأْكُلِ الطَّعَامَ وَيُصِيبُ الثَّوْبَ
chapter.englishTitle: The subtitle: "The urine of a baby who hasn't eaten food and it ...

englishRaw: (the mother of faithful believers) A child was brought to Messenger of Allah ﷺ and it urinated on the garment of the Prophet. The Prophet ﷺ asked for water and poured it over the soiled place.
body: (the mother of faithful believers) A child was brought to Messenger of Allah ﷺ and it urinated on the garment of the Prophet. The Prophet ﷺ asked for water and poured it over the soiled place.
arabic: أُتِيَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ بِصَبِيٍّ «فَبَالَ عَلَى ثَوْبِهِ فَدَعَا بِمَاءٍ فَأَتْبَعَهُ إِيَّاهُ»
chain: Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Mālik \u003e Hishām b. ʿUrwah from his father \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ مَالِكٍ عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 289

chapter.englishTitle: The distinction between male and female.

englishRaw: "The Prophet ﷺ said: 'A girl's urine should be washed away and a boy's urine should be sprinkled with water.'"
body: "The Prophet ﷺ said: 'A girl's urine should be washed away and a boy's urine should be sprinkled with water.'"
arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ «يُغْسَلُ مِنْ بَوْلِ الْجَارِيَةِ وَيُرَشُّ مِنْ بَوْلِ الْغُلَامِ»
chain: Mujāhid b. Mūsá \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. Mahdī \u003e Yaḥyá b. al-Walīd \u003e Muḥil b. Khalīfah \u003e Abū al-Samḥ
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُجَاهِدُ بْنُ مُوسَى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ مَهْدِيٍّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي يَحْيَى بْنُ الْوَلِيدِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي مُحِلُّ بْنُ خَلِيفَةَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو السَّمْحِ

title: Sunan an-Nasa'i al-Kubra 290

chapter.arabicTitle: بَوْلُ مَا يُؤْكَلُ لَحْمُهُ يُصِيبُ الثَّوْبَ
chapter.englishTitle: The urine of an animal whose meat is consumed stains the cloth.

englishRaw: 'O Messenger of Allah, we are nomads who follows the herds, not farmers and growers, and the climate of Al-Madinah does not suit us.' So the Messenger of Allah ﷺtold them to go out to a flock of female camels and drink their milk and urine. When they recovered - and they were in the vicinity of Al-Harrah - they apostatized after having become Muslim, killed the camel-herder of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and drove the camels away. News of that reached the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and he sent people after them. They were brought back, their eyes were smoldered with heated nails, their hands and feet cut off, then they were left in Al-Harrah in that state until they died."
body: 'O Messenger of Allah, we are nomads who follows the herds, not farmers and growers, and the climate of Al-Madinah does not suit us.' So the Messenger of Allah ﷺtold them to go out to a flock of female camels and drink their milk and urine. When they recovered - and they were in the vicinity of Al-Harrah - they apostatized after having become Muslim, killed the camel-herder of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and drove the camels away. News of that reached the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and he sent people after them. They were brought back, their eyes were smoldered with heated nails, their hands and feet cut off, then they were left in Al-Harrah in that state until they died."
arabic: أَنَّ نَاسًا أَوْ رِجَالًا مِنْ عُكْلٍ قَدِمُوا عَلَى رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ فَتَكَلَّمُوا بِالْإِسْلَامِ قَالُوا يَا رَسُولَ اللهِ إِنَّا أَهْلُ ضَرْعٍ وَلَمْ نَكُنْ أَهْلَ رِيفٍ وَاسْتَوْخَمُوا الْمَدِينَةَ فَأَمَرَ لَهُمْ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ بِذَوْدٍ وَرَاعٍ وَأَمَرَهُمْ أَنْ يُخْرِجُوا فِيهَا فَيَشْرَبُوا مِنْ أَلْبَانِهَا وَأَبْوَالَهَا فَلَمَّا صَحُّوا وَكَانُوا بِنَاحِيَةِ الْحَرَّةِ كَفَرُوا بَعْدَ إِسْلَامِهِمْ وَقُتِلُوا رَاعِيَ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ وَاسْتَاقُوا الذَّوْدَ فَبَلَغَ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ فَبَعَثَ الطَّلَبَ فِي آثَارِهِمْ فَأُتِيَ بِهِمْ فَسَمَرُوا أَعْيُنَهُمْ وَقَطَعُوا أَيْدِيَهُمْ وَأَرْجُلَهُمْ ثُمَّ تُرْكُوا فِي الْحَرَّةِ عَلَى حَالِهِمْ حَتَّى مُوِّتُوا
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿAbd al-Aʿlá \u003e Yazīd / Ibn Zurayʿ \u003e Saʿīd \u003e Qatādah \u003e Anas b. Mālik
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْأَعْلَى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا يَزِيدُ يَعْنِي ابْنَ زُرَيْعٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سَعِيدٌ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا قَتَادَةَ أَنَّ أَنَسَ بْنَ مَالِكٍ حَدَّثَهُمْ
